name: Team AOC
subject: Trump’s latest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
At a rally this weekend, Trump didn’t bother trying to hide his growing extremism:
He called the January 6th insurrectionists ‘unbelievable patriots’ and vowed to help the ones serving jail time. He called migrants ‘not people’ and ‘animals.’
And when discussing the election, Trump said that if he didn’t win it would be ‘a blood bath for the whole country.’1
He then reported raising over $20 million in February, a massive increase from previous months. **That’s a lot of money to spread hate and disinformation.**
[We need to be ready to fight back against the MAGA movement’s extremism. Will you chip in $5 today to keep our movement going strong? Every contribution helps to power our grassroots campaign for progress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240321.dZD7Yr&refcode=em20240321-6048-P_FND_CTR_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6048%2E2526796%2EdQ4YX-)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240321.dZD7Yr&refcode=em20240321-6048-P_FND_CTR_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=6048%2E2526796%2EdQ4YX-)**
Republican leaders have made it clear — **they are going to do whatever is necessary to protect Donald Trump**.
On the House Oversight Committee, where Alexandria serves as #2 Democrat, Republicans are wasting taxpayer resources with baseless impeachment investigations into President Biden. Their goal is to muddy the waters and create a false sense of equivalency between Trump's criminal activity and a Democratic President they want to oust.
We can’t let that happen.
[Democrats at every level — from the statehouse to Congress — will need to fight back against the MAGA movement’s growing hold on our government. Will you make a $5 contribution today so that we can keep fighting back against their lies and hatred? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240321.dZD7Yr&refcode=em20240321-6048-P_FND_CTR_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=6048%2E2526796%2EdQ4YX-)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240321.dZD7Yr&refcode=em20240321-6048-P_FND_CTR_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=6048%2E2526796%2EdQ4YX-)**
Whether or not you can donate today, thank you for standing with our movement.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

1 - [**NY Times** : Trump Says Some Migrants Are ‘Not People’ and Predicts a ‘Blood Bath’ if He Loses](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/23397?t=23&akid=6048%2E2526796%2EdQ4YX-)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240321?refcode=em20240321-6048-P_FND_CTR_HDL&t=24&refcode2=6048_2526796_dQ4YX-&akid=6048%2E2526796%2EdQ4YX-)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240321-6048-P_FND_CTR_HDL&t=25&akid=6048%2E2526796%2EdQ4YX-)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=6048%2E2526796%2EdQ4YX-) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=6048%2E2526796%2EdQ4YX-) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=6048%2E2526796%2EdQ4YX-)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=6048%2E2526796%2EdQ4YX-)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=6048%2E2526796%2EdQ4YX-)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

body:
No firm is making money off of this, just electing Democrats in Appalachia. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dc51cbae5711/winning-together-my-record-of-success-180?e=ecb4055fc4)

|

# Let’s Keep Winning: Join me in Building a movement
| [Donate $10 and we knock 100 doors](https://benjaminwoods.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f901facd2ebed4bbacc0de3d9&id=9c5e963144&e=ecb4055fc4)
---
| | | | | |
---
# Building a Foundation
_Change what success is for Democrats in Appalachia. This campaign is the first step into gaining ground in the once solidly Democratic region and it’s time to break the GOP’s stronghold. Just like Benjamin has done time and time again._|
---
[Donate $20 and we knock 200 doors](https://benjaminwoods.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f901facd2ebed4bbacc0de3d9&id=f6a1e3132a&e=ecb4055fc4)
---
| [Donate $100 and we knock 1,000 doors](https://benjaminwoods.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f901facd2ebed4bbacc0de3d9&id=15b55b0614&e=ecb4055fc4)
---
This race is just beginning, but I need your help with the simple things. We’re going to knock every door in this city by the end of the campaign, but we need donations make it a lot easier of a lift. A lot of you might be around the corner, or across the country. But every cent will go toward building long term success in the City of Roanoke, Southwest Virginia, and greater Appalachia. Donate above if you want to help, unsubscribe below if you want to be taken off this list. Either way, thank you for reading.-Benjamin Woods

Hello,
[**Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to make a donation to Adam Frisch’s campaign before midnight tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81420137/462396480/1610638071?refcode=em20240321pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=68d87169-e3e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGQ4NzE2OS1lM2U3LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fy2jBx9BBcRJ7pZXWRA5Kcjw362_1bzToS2lCupzQZo=)
What if we told you that in 2022 – after a recount – Adam lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes?
What if we told you that it was the closest race in the entire country?
What if we told you that after Adam announced he was running again and scared off Lauren Boebert, every political pundit said that Adam absolutely _can_ win this seat in November?
_And what if we told you that this is a must-win seat, but our fundraising has really slowed down?_
We know that $5 might not seem like much against the corporate PACs and special interests. But when tens of thousands of grassroots donors like you all chip in, we have something far stronger than any Super PAC.

name: Missy Cotter Smasal
subject: Why I’m Running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64833?t=6&akid=13565%2E878179%2Eslwa-x) Friend, this is Missy Cotter Smasal. I’m a Navy veteran, a former small business owner, and a mom running for Congress in one of the most competitive districts in the country.

I want to share my story with you, but if you can’t spare the time, [will you split a $10 gift between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign to flip the House blue?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64834?t=7&akid=13565%2E878179%2Eslwa-x) | [CHIP IN $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64834?t=8&akid=13565%2E878179%2Eslwa-x)
---
I’ve spent the last six months criss-crossing Coastal Virginia. Everywhere I go, I get asked: **_“Why am I running for Congress?”_**

Simply put. **We must protect our Democracy this November. I’m proud to have served in the Navy, and I feel called to serve and protect our country again.**

MAGA extremists – _like my opponent, Jen Kiggans - have chosen politics over service._

They use servicemembers as political leverage while they leave veterans behind. They’re hellbent on taking away women’s most basic freedoms. They allow the leader of their party to attack the most fundamental aspects of our Constitution.

They cannot be trusted to defend our Democracy.

**So the long and short of it: I’m running to protect the Democracy we hold dear.**

I’m fired up and ready for the tough fight ahead. This race will be one of the most competitive in the country, and I know it will take a committed team to win.

I’m building a grassroots movement to win this fight and take on anti-democracy extremists in November. That’s why I’m humbly asking for your help, friend.

[Can you split a $10 contribution between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign to take on MAGA extremism this November? Your support will make a difference.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64834?t=9&akid=13565%2E878179%2Eslwa-x)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Missy Cotter Smasal and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64835?t=10&akid=13565%2E878179%2Eslwa-x)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64836?t=11&akid=13565%2E878179%2Eslwa-x)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64837?t=12&akid=13565%2E878179%2Eslwa-x)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64838?t=13&akid=13565%2E878179%2Eslwa-x)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/64834?t=14&akid=13565%2E878179%2Eslwa-x)
Thanks,

_Missy_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13565%2E878179%2Eslwa-x). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13565%2E878179%2Eslwa-x).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13565%2E878179%2Eslwa-x) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=13565%2E878179%2Eslwa-x). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=13565%2E878179%2Eslwa-x)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=13565%2E878179%2Eslwa-x)

Peter - My name is Nancy Mace.

I’m a high school dropout who started out working at Waffle House to pay the bills and put food on the table.

Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck as I also worked to earn my high school diploma taking classes at a technical college. **I got by without government handouts or radical socialist policies — and I am a better woman because of it.**

**Through grit and the American dream, I was the first woman to graduate from The Citadel’s Corps of Cadets and now proudly serve in Congress and fight for folks like you to have the same opportunities that I was granted.**

Unlike a lot of folks in Washington, I’ve been working since I was 17. It’s clear Congress is in desperate need of people like me – someone who understands having to make the choice between gas or groceries because you only have enough dollar bills in your wallet to cover one or the other.

Someone who knows what it’s like to actually earn a living and make sacrifices.

_Someone who didn’t grow up with a silver spoon in their mouth._

[**It’s people like you and me who should be representing America – not the liberal elites who are used to always getting their way (or buying their way).**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=81e65940a26046c0839a852420b2f23f&_e=E251CAhkuSc5AYDEZMmSW9NJKDQ1jSrd6qnBR0vZ0DUFgx2lqLJFkfBBHjBItCFAERsOKHB8vvkkUIYFFYW-gpwhavTbGDhHxbL9Vbg2kfTLRSils60_1aS-AEFqXpV8zYZcvb0wEBHqYHQcXCXekA0I94xFps0txKLQ29Dy5HJ1vlHWCtt5QtMBNVfDmKVS1INeMIX4Xei3vCQ_-xH95Vzgf8ia8h12LS-u4q6sceq_yRmUb_bbJWgIkRM4d6QlO4Vs0zbsXSF9vePPW8gXQ3t7aE6NKLKNUTEjX38VDbdF3SE6Yw2cemFW_Bpo40eT00yDMBllbDsbh4s7Bev4auzjGPXDaD9p9OK4HzY7vC5qvkR2NPe2J3F3-0AwVt4jatkbbPU89tHmwRj1LoXTMZ1Y1caLBuESJPh8q-BP1_Y%3D)

**But here’s where I need your help – the rich continue to run Congress because they have the funds to do so._But I have you..._**

[**I’m relying on the support of grassroots donors who want to see real change happen in America. Will you make a donation to my campaign to send a hard-working American, who actually understands the struggles of life, back to Washington?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=81e65940a26046c0839a852420b2f23f&_e=E251CAhkuSc5AYDEZMmSW9NJKDQ1jSrd6qnBR0vZ0DUFgx2lqLJFkfBBHjBItCFAERsOKHB8vvkkUIYFFYW-gpwhavTbGDhHxbL9Vbg2kfTLRSils60_1aS-AEFqXpV8zYZcvb0wEBHqYHQcXCXekA0I94xFps0txKLQ29Dy5HJ1vlHWCtt5QtMBNVfDmKVS1INeMIX4Xei3vCQ_-xH95Vzgf8ia8h12LS-u4q6sceq_yRmUb_bbJWgIkRM4d6QlVJBAL1mvZnpsSpvraphKrYbvhMekUmB4nNpmFhZP39I2wj1A9Fi-4FkPB6_aon18TPUF_QAxZ8-lOk8QzHEfKJSBBWJJrzz545v6AeDl3oY7_00XgB8TCSJsABiEeIlobY108UlvXA6waUotwjZq2BiTkFy4vISA6o2jJyjHW8M%3D)

[** ****SEND ME BACK TO WASHINGTON » **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=81e65940a26046c0839a852420b2f23f&_e=E251CAhkuSc5AYDEZMmSW9NJKDQ1jSrd6qnBR0vZ0DUFgx2lqLJFkfBBHjBItCFAERsOKHB8vvkkUIYFFYW-gpwhavTbGDhHxbL9Vbg2kfTLRSils60_1aS-AEFqXpV8zYZcvb0wEBHqYHQcXCXekA0I94xFps0txKLQ29Dy5HJ1vlHWCtt5QtMBNVfDmKVS1INeMIX4Xei3vCQ_-xH95Vzgf8ia8h12LS-u4q6sceq_yRmUb_bbJWgIkRM4d6Qlg8uKrRGsSS393wgEn2hOrqpTTmk2pTDK-V5qAiGe-fnfidRrNeDX8hiJyeLwVTgXzJfOdw21JNnzoEsfUG9lxpmZE5-JBOFLx9TGGEtyhxdF_zs2EgyXyV4CilZ070-g0wDNfYlTnCYDz-SU5sN82r17D3V-2HHijSNLmJxnDbM%3D)

I have no friends in Washington, Peter because I don’t play into the bull**** swamp and I can’t be bought. I’m a high school dropout who started out working at Waffle House to pay the bills and put food on the table. Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck as I also worked to earn my high school diploma taking classes at a technical college. I got by without government handouts or radical socialist policies — and I am a better woman because of it. Through grit and the American dream, I was the first woman to graduate from The Citadel’s Corps of Cadets and now proudly serve in Congress and fight for folks like you to have the same opportunities that I was granted. Unlike a lot of folks in Washington, I’ve been working since I was 17. It’s clear Congress is in desperate need of people like me – someone who understands having to make the choice between gas or groceries because you only have enough dollar bills in your wallet to cover one or the other. Someone who knows what it’s like to actually earn a living and make sacrifices. Someone who didn’t grow up with a silver spoon in their mouth. body:
Through our work, we've increased funding and resources to protect and grow greater tree canopy across Washington’s cities and towns.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81420335/462401350/-1503679382?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-03-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGE5Njc2OTktZTVlNy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xb7X6pyrRbCF0YEuvg8wc06VKeep6TuP9TqhVGnEXdo=)
---
| Peter,

Our tree canopy isn't just about greenery— _**it's an essential part of our climate resiliency.**_ We all can remember the 2021 Heat Dome when Washington state experienced record-breaking high temperatures for weeks on end. It was our deadliest weather-related disaster in Washington state history.

_**It made clear that trees in our cities are no longer nice to have–they are a must have.**_

Our tree canopy cools our homes, reduces utility costs, and even saves lives from extreme heat. Unfortunately, too many of our communities, especially our low-income communities and communities of color across the state, too often lack adequate tree cover, leading to higher temperatures and greater risk of heat stroke and death.

That's why I set a goal in 2023 for Washington State–the Evergreen State–to become the first state to achieve Tree Equity in every neighborhood. Through our work, we've increased funding and resources to protect and grow greater tree canopy across Washington’s cities and towns. Just this month, I was proud to roll out _**$8 million in grants**_ from the Department of Natural Resources for 45 projects across the state - including in communities across the Sixth District, from Tacoma to Poulsbo to Port Townsend and around Mason County.

These grants will keep our children safe on their walks to school, our air and water cleaner, our homes a little cooler, and more money in our families' pockets.

The challenges we face, from climate change to rising costs, are daunting, but I believe that if we can work together, we can do anything. I'm running for Congress to bring the same critical problem-solving I've used to create EPIC progress for our state to Congress.

[_**But I can't do it alone. My first FEC fundraising deadline of the year is approaching fast. Will you join me in the race for Washington's 6th Congressional District by contributing $10 or whatever you can afford today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81420336/462401359/-1503679382?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-03-21_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGE5Njc2OTktZTVlNy1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xb7X6pyrRbCF0YEuvg8wc06VKeep6TuP9TqhVGnEXdo=)

I'm running for Congress to bring the same critical problem-solving I've used to create EPIC progress for our state to Congress. = | = | = | = | = | = Grateful for your support, Hilary Franz * | | = Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz Friends of Hilary Franz PO Box 7437 Tacoma, WA 98417 United States | = Email is a critical way for our campaign to stay in touch with you, but if you wish to receive less email, you can change your subscription . Here's the situation: Martin is working every day alongside the Senate Majority to deliver results for folks across New Mexico and the lands and waters that sustain our communities. Meanwhile, Mitch McConnell and his allies are laser-focused on advancing an extreme agenda to chip away at reproductive rights, hand out tax cuts to the ultra-wealthy and corporations, and sell our public lands to the highest bidder. That's why Republicans handpicked a hedge fund executive in an attempt to unseat Martin and take back the Senate. Since entering the race, she's written her campaign a $500,000 check and stayed silent on the issues that matter most to New Mexicans. **She's trying to buy this seat — no matter the cost to working families in New Mexico.** We can defeat her, re-elect Martin, and defend the Senate — but first, we need to reach each and every fundraising goal to compete with our opponent's war chest. **That includes our upcoming end-of-quarter goal.** **[Can you help Martin continue putting New Mexico values first in the Senate by chipping in $10 or any amount you can before our deadline? clean_body: Martin is working every day alongside the Senate Majority to deliver results for folks across New Mexico and the lands and waters that sustain our communities. Here's the situation: Martin is working every day alongside the Senate Majority to deliver results for folks across New Mexico and the lands and waters that sustain our communities. Meanwhile, Mitch McConnell and his allies are laser-focused on advancing an extreme agenda to chip away at reproductive rights, hand out tax cuts to the ultra-wealthy and corporations, and sell our public lands to the highest bidder. That's why Republicans handpicked a hedge fund executive in an attempt to unseat Martin and take back the Senate. Since entering the race, she's written her campaign a $500,000 check and stayed silent on the issues that matter most to New Mexicans. She's trying to buy this seat — no matter the cost to working families in New Mexico. We can defeat her, re-elect Martin, and defend the Senate — but first, we need to reach each and every fundraising goal to compete with our opponent's war chest. Truthfully, I’m glad, because New Jersey deserves better. Let’s be honest: Bob Menendez is too busy fighting for his own future to fight for yours.
Now, he’ll be free to focus on his own (many, many) issues, and we can continue to make progress on the issues that matter **to you.**
New Jerseyans have been burned too many times by leaders who ask for their trust one minute and violate it the next. That’s just not who I am.
I promise to be a Senator worthy of that trust. And when I make a promise, I keep it!
This is a pivotal moment for my campaign for the U.S. Senate. I’m relying on all of you to help us navigate the changing dynamics of this race _and_ connect with more voters across the state.
There’s a lot of uncertainty right now, but I know this for sure: Defeating Andy Kim and winning this race will be a formidable challenge.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter — Ami wanted to make sure you saw his petition to protect Social Security and Medicare benefits. Seniors have earned a secure and safe retirement and deserve these benefits.

**_[Will you join us and become one the 547 signers will still need to sign our petition today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81421088/462417129/1808217759?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240321_PT_1.2_1MO_website_NA_NA_ss_medicare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk1ZmQyYS1mMGU3LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhdBl1TmqVhTaV2T8xYFavnwyOBHOBdbRP-ZHGU4oCU=&emci=56bbc924-f0e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=da95fd2a-f0e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=32394541)_**
* * *
**_Begin forwarded message:_**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81421089/462417130/1808217759?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240321_PT_1.2_1MO_website_NA_NA_ss_medicare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk1ZmQyYS1mMGU3LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhdBl1TmqVhTaV2T8xYFavnwyOBHOBdbRP-ZHGU4oCU=&emci=56bbc924-f0e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=da95fd2a-f0e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=32394541)
Hi Peter, once again GOP presidential candidate Donald Trump is talking about cuts to Social Security and Medicare— _something he and his party tried and failed to pass during his presidency._

Trump tried to walk back his comments after significant backlash, but we must take his threats seriously.

**The GOP has a long track record of trying to snatch away these hard-earned benefits from seniors and his remarks signal that’s only going to continue.**

Seniors can’t afford to ignore Trump’s comments because these life-saving programs are important for seniors who are already struggling to make ends meet. **_Which is why I need you to stand with me and not let the GOP destroy these programs._

_[We need to defend Social Security, Medicare, and other critical programs from the GOP. Sign my petition in the next 72 hours to prove we have a mandate of support for the seniors who need these initiatives→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81421090/462417131/1808217759?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240321_PT_1.2_1MO_website_NA_NA_ss_medicare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk1ZmQyYS1mMGU3LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhdBl1TmqVhTaV2T8xYFavnwyOBHOBdbRP-ZHGU4oCU=&emci=56bbc924-f0e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=da95fd2a-f0e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=32394541)_**
**[SIGN ON: STAND UP FOR SOCIAL SECURITY AND MEDICARE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81421091/462417132/1808217759?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240321_PT_1.2_1MO_website_NA_NA_ss_medicare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk1ZmQyYS1mMGU3LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhdBl1TmqVhTaV2T8xYFavnwyOBHOBdbRP-ZHGU4oCU=&emci=56bbc924-f0e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=da95fd2a-f0e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=32394541)**
When House Republicans proposed cuts to Social Security and Medicare during debt ceiling negotiations my Democratic colleagues stopped them, but we knew it wouldn’t be their last attempt.

These programs save lives. Seniors are struggling to make ends meet in the richest country on earth. Yet Republicans try to diminish their benefits every chance possible.

**As elected officials, our job is to improve the lives of constituents, not make them harder.

_[Social Security and Medicare on the ballot and it’s up to us to defend them. clean_body: | Peter — Ami wanted to make sure you saw his petition to protect Social Security and Medicare benefits. Seniors have earned a secure and safe retirement and deserve these benefits. Begin forwarded message: Hi Peter, once again GOP presidential candidate Donald Trump is talking about cuts to Social Security and Medicare— something he and his party tried and failed to pass during his presidency. Trump tried to walk back his comments after significant backlash, but we must take his threats seriously. The GOP has a long track record of trying to snatch away these hard-earned benefits from seniors and his remarks signal that’s only going to continue. Seniors can’t afford to ignore Trump’s comments because these life-saving programs are important for seniors who are already struggling to make ends meet. Which is why I need you to stand with me and not let the GOP destroy these programs. When House Republicans proposed cuts to Social Security and Medicare during debt ceiling negotiations my Democratic colleagues stopped them, but we knew it wouldn’t be their last attempt. These programs save lives. Seniors are struggling to make ends meet in the richest country on earth. Yet Republicans try to diminish their benefits every chance possible. As elected officials, our job is to improve the lives of constituents, not make them harder. Be well, Dr. Ami Bera If you’d like to receive less email from our team If you'd like to stop receiving our emails, Paid for by Bera for Congress Bera for Congress PO Box 582496 Elk Grove, CA 95758 United States ** **

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Cox?=
subject: Trisomy21
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN COX FOR CONGRESS, INC
body:
People with Trisomy21 are humans and are precious. Help me defend life in Congress. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/coxforcongress/trisomy21?e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| |
---
| |
# Happy World Down Syndrome Day
####
_“Now with the help of God, and with the conviction that we are the defenders of civilisation and freedom, we are going to persevere to the end.”_ \- Winston Churchill, PM, October 1, 1939

Dear ,
Today is World Down Syndrome Day \- a celebration of life created by God that must be respected and protected in every civilized nation on earth.

An ominous and deadly evil lurks over our great State. The evil of abortion on demand for any reason at any time up through birth, including the targeting of Down Syndrome babies for death. This is the current state of Maryland law.
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=86f905059e&e=5bb5efcda7)
Now, in addition, the so-called Amendment to the Maryland Constitution to be voted on this Fall by referendum entitled the “Maryland Reproductive Freedom Amendment” is neither about reproduction nor is it about freedom.

Instead, it will remove parental rights and “establish new transgender rights and authorize the government to use taxpayer dollars to fund and promote puberty blocking drugs and surgical mutilation of genitalia - even among children without parental consent.” ** Paid for with your taxpayer Medicaid dollars - including for trafficking of anyone into our state from states that ban this barbaric practice, like [the United Kingdom just did with its National Health Service](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=161587b564&e=5bb5efcda7). ****America should immediately follow suit.**

Parents in Maryland need to be aware that this amendment would not only allow targeted killing of disabled babies on demand in their mother’s wombs and greatly expand our taxpayer-subsidized abortion tourism, it will remove their parental rights over their children and prevent knowledge of a government agent permanently mutilating and transitioning their minor child behind their backs. **_That’s child abuse_**. But it’s not all.
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=eb109d2e32&e=5bb5efcda7)

When Valerie and I observe and admire, interact with and laugh with our Trisomy21 son Caleb, we see much more than a choice. We see a beautiful human being that God created who brightens our lives every day.
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=e7efbaa8d0&e=5bb5efcda7)
While Maryland already allows the targeting killing of disabled and special needs babies up to nine months (yes, that’s right - sick), putting this law into the Constitution will flip our Declaration of Rights on its head.

Like the soiled history of Maryland’s own Chief Justice Taney’s infamous opinion in Dred Scott, Maryland is now poised to once again destroy the dignity of human lives through permanent bodily mutilation, and targeting for destruction the disabled, those with special needs, the voiceless and the poor.

As Churchill said of Britain’s people during WWII, you and I are the last line of defense in support of civilization and freedom today. Right now. Not tomorrow, not next year. _Now_.

[Join me in standing against this measure](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=175de7e70d&e=5bb5efcda7), for parental rights and for the lives of all children, born and unborn. At present, I am the only candidate in the Sixth District doing so. In Congress I will work to pass a superseding Constitutional right to life.

I have 10 days until our major pre-primary report is due. Will you help me tonight with [your generous contribution](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=100d75341d&e=5bb5efcda7)? It truly is urgent.

Thank you. To life!

For Victory and Freedom,
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=1e57ce6297&e=5bb5efcda7)
Dan Cox, Candidate for Congress (R-MD6)
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=13b112e88d&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| | | | | | | [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=e1780d84ec&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| | [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=05b5f4219f&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| | [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=76e4f548cf&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| | [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=1931de5d10&e=5bb5efcda7)

body:
| **Peter,**

I noticed a familiar face in a recent issue of _American Rifleman._ (Yes, I really read it. You’ve got to keep your friends close and enemies closer, after all.)

To no one’s surprise, the NRA took out a full-page ad bashing me — and by extension, all of the folks who are a part of this movement to reform our gun laws, make progressive change, and elect the next generation of bold, young leaders.

The ads in these magazines are always good for a laugh — but this kind of stuff also reminds me how scared of us they really are. I’ve said it before, but **Gen Z will most certainly outlive the NRA.** The gun lobby’s glory days are behind them now. name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: Safe Routes to School Ribbon Cutting in Broadmoor!
body:
Pedestrian Improvement Project | | | |
---
| | |
# [Join me next Wednesday (3/27) in Broadmoor!](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=d41a0991f7&e=c0babbc643)
---
|
---
| [](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=27442dc2d2&e=c0babbc643) **Come celebrate the completion of Broadmoor’s Safe Routes to Schools project** The Broadmoor Safe Routes to School Pedestrian Improvements Project has completed and you are invited to join me for a ribbon cutting 10:30 a.m., Wednesday March 27 at the student drop off location off Park Plaza Drive near 87th Street. The estimated construction cost for this Project is $1,655,330 which includes $1,300,000 in federal Quick-Strike Program funding which I helped secure as a Commissioner on the Metropolitan Transportation Commission. The project includes installing pavement striping along the outside edges of the travel lanes on 87th Street to help provide drivers with a narrower sense of the roadway width. It also includes modifications at the intersection of 87th Street and Larchmont/Stoneyford Drive that will include painted medians and a painted bulb-out area at the corner of 87th Street and Larchmont Drive. These intersection modifications are intended to provide for a narrower area/travel lane to encourage drivers to slow down. The project stretches from 87th Street and Southgate Avenue to Sullivan Avenue and South Park Plaza Drive from 87th Street to approximately Palmcrest Drive. The work in general terms includes a raised midblock crosswalk on South Park Plaza Drive near Garden Village Elementary School and intersection improvements at 87th Street at South Park Plaza Drive/Nimitz Drive and 87th Street at Village Lane/Washington Street. I’m excited to see this project coming to completion as I’ve advocated for the safety of children walking to Garden Village and the nearby Ben Franklin Intermediate School. Thanks to the San Mateo Public Works department for overseeing this project which will benefit the neighborhood for generations to come.

Subject: Because you’re a member of this team, your support keeps this campaign running. Anything you donate to this email will help up our momentum and might land you an evening with me, Barack, and Bill.
Hi Peter, it's Joe.
One of my favorite parts of running for President is getting to connect one-on-one with the people who are powering this campaign. Our volunteers and staff who make sure voters across the country understand the choice in 2024. The more than 80 million voters who believed in my and Kamala’s vision last time around. **And supporters like you who receive emails like this and chip in what you can, when you can.**
I know my friends Barack Obama and Bill Clinton feel the same, so you can imagine how excited we are about our “Evening with the Presidents“ contest. Soon, we’re going to pick a special grassroots donor to fly out to come meet me, Barack, and Bill -- all expenses on us.
But, I’m told you still haven't entered to win yet. This contest is closing tonight, and I’d love to meet you, Peter.

Picture this: You and a guest fly to NYC and meet President Joe Biden, President Barack Obama, and President Bill Clinton, and take a photo you'll cherish for a lifetime. We’ll take care of everything -- your flights and hotel stay are on us! | | | Team Biden-Harris \-----Forwarded message----- Sender: Joe Biden Date: Thursday, March 21, 2024 Subject: Because you’re a member of this team, your support keeps this campaign running. Anything you donate to this email will help up our momentum and might land you an evening with me, Barack, and Bill. Hi Peter, it's Joe. One of my favorite parts of running for President is getting to connect one-on-one with the people who are powering this campaign. Our volunteers and staff who make sure voters across the country understand the choice in 2024. The more than 80 million voters who believed in my and Kamala’s vision last time around. And supporters like you who receive emails like this and chip in what you can, when you can. I know my friends Barack Obama and Bill Clinton feel the same, so you can imagine how excited we are about our “Evening with the Presidents“ contest. Soon, we’re going to pick a special grassroots donor to fly out to come meet me, Barack, and Bill -- all expenses on us. But, I’m told you still haven't entered to win yet. This contest is closing tonight, and I’d love to meet you, Peter. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Month after month, grassroots donations have made up the majority of our campaign’s funding. Anything you donate to this email will help keep up our momentum and might land you an evening with me, Barack, and Bill. I hope to meet you soon, Peter. Joe Joe Biden President of the United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: [WATCH] RE: House Bill 521 (2 mins)
body:
\- - - 🤯 |
---
| | In case you missed it...

Today, I joined 10 others to cast a NO vote against House Bill 521, a decision driven by its clear violation of the "single subject" provision in the Idaho state Constitution, specifically Article III, section 16, which mandates "unity of subject and title."

This bill ambitiously tries to cover an array of topics - tax policy, bonding, public defense funds, election dates, DEI statements, adjustments in the State Board of Education's management, and the creation of a new school modernization fund, among others.

While some sections of the bill might be beneficial...

**_I cannot in good conscience support legislation that so blatantly disregards constitutional mandates. _**

I took an oath to uphold the constitution, and I intend to honor that commitment, regardless of the "political price" I may face.

I'm committed to doing what's right, even in the face of pressure from the all angles, and others telling me it's impossible to vote against a bill like this.

[See what I mean here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=9393ecf409&e=dea908e0fe "watch \(2 mins\)"):

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=f6561823cb&e=dea908e0fe)

Stay frosty,

Brian

\---

name: Your America
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31071%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CHEaVwa2y9P1G3ToGrq3jg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31072%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kX0cMxjOikqDKoF34Q8e%2bg&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31073%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2Fy5K0ctENz7MK3Qpz7OoA&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. name: American Briefing
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z53ti48529ok35lm3e8cd58anmn38lnhhko5mdb0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chg68pr1c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvac5rhulbv9q30c39io6dtfn9uunsi62j3601dg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chg68pr1c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zho7q817bk70s14bbaeofglkfqt7p1h8iilrdehg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chg68pr1c1h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Briefing
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6mmr5lsudak8lqn4b51j7sj0bufao3p50de0o5o_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chg68or1c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpk5hqfjteil9cuc38h1bjoc09u08l9m8k7e4veg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chg68or1c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zug2v14c35ju5dddimo0r78hsvt6p9ujhf02d7a0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chg68or1c1h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: PreBorn
subject: It’s A Bad Idea, Right?
body:
You Won’t Believe This

| |
---
| | Friend, we’ve never seen anything like this... Popstar Olivia Rodrigo handed out FREE Plan B pills at her concert, and the media is praising her for it! Young children are attending these concerts—what kind of example is she setting?! **[Demand she apologizes now!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqhmcqu8lch048krkn314h783q8kct4fhl0t2a40_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chg6apj2c9h2bs)**
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zap92o7qt93ie5f06ghok57spu86jh2ab4tfkpe0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chg6apj2c9h2bs)
---
No, Olivia, this is NOT a good idea. She’s teaching young girls it’s better to take an innocent life. We know the truth: there is no greater impact than SAVING a Preborn life. She’s even pledged to donate a portion of ticket sales from each show to support local abortion funds and hands out leaflets about finding ABORTION CARE.
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4anqp2qpenr066lp5s464jsqfc7p21aurup89vg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chg6apj2c9h2bs)

body:

| |
---

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Hispanic-Americans Prefer Their News In English And Online: Pew
body:
| [](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD0zNjk1NTIifQ/ncHvKMXbezr7OGI5AAFTAg)
---
# **[Hispanic-Americans Prefer Their News In English And Online: Pew](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9MTI1NjE0In0/Q5h_KSGxEhshnd7pLfTVCw)**
---
Nearly three-quarters of Latino adults under age 50 (73%) prefer to get their news on digital devices, including 27% who specifically prefer social media, according to a Pew Research Center survey. More than half of U.S. Hispanic adults (54%) receive their news primarily in English, far more than the percentage who receive their news primarily ......Click to read more

name: Kimberly Guilfoyle
subject: She’s the REAL DEAL, people!
body:
Let me say this in no uncertain terms:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq3b0boog8shibdjqhlsb5grsg14i3c9sfqphopg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chg61o77cjh2bs "Kimberly Guilfoyle")
---

I'll tell you what I said on my show:

**MARSHA BLACKBURN - THE FABULOUS SENATOR FROM TENNESSEE - IS THE REAL DEAL, PEOPLE!**

She's a leader of our MAGA movement. She's a tough-as-nails Conservative. And she's a wall standing in the way of Joe Biden's radical agenda.

She's also up for re-election in November. Normally, she would soar through the finish line since she's a top ally of President Trump... but unfortunately, we have a problem.

Chuck Schumer recruited a power-hungry, showboating socialist in a desperate attempt to destroy any opposition to his agenda and defeat Marsha.

In fact, Marsha's opponent just joined forces with Hollywood elite types to turbocharge her negative campaign to flip Tennessee.

Let me say this in no uncertain terms:

_If this radical socialist manages to flip Tennessee, our path to winning back the Senate Majority will COMPLETELY VANISH. _

_**[So, with all that being said, I respectfully ask you for the FIRST TIME to donate right now to Marsha Blackburn's re-election campaign.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z08fnupb28bkbo8faf0uho8bufr7hl0mab7fms4o_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chg61o77cjh2bs "So, with all that being said, I respectfully ask you for the FIRST TIME to donate right now to Marsha Blackburn’s re-election campaign.")**_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN ME: DONATE NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zivo7gfasghar0309ql9o06cpkahrub4d661ltb0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chg61o77cjh2bs "PLEASE JOIN ME: DONATE NOW")
---
I don't send these types of emails very often.

If you're like me, these types of political emails kind of drive you crazy. But this is no ordinary request.

**Marsha Blackburn is exactly the kind of strong, patriotic conservative President Trump needs in the U.S. Senate. **

No surprise here, but Marsha's socialist opponent turned to big liberal names to help bankroll her campaign. Luckily, we have you on our side. If just 30% respond to my email, Marsha's socialist opponent will have no shot at EVER flipping this key Senate seat.

But first, I need your help right now. Please. I'm personally asking for your help.

_**[So, I hope that's enough to convince you. If it's not, I fear we could lose Tennessee - and the ENTIRE U.S. Senate along with it.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp57a4rtqfg6ehv5l1sd1054nin96jbdurc69ia0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34chg61o77cjh2bs "So, I hope that’s enough to convince you. If it’s not, I fear we could lose Tennessee – and the ENTIRE U.S. Senate along with it.")**_

For America,
Kimberly Guilfoyle

---

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: URGENT: Tell Joe NO!
body:
A disheartening reality is unfolding before us.

__
Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda!| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/dRXqaHJcAN9FxVKfnb6Ttw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn39PGP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Rpb24uc2JhcHJvbGlmZS5vcmcvdGVsbC1qb2Utbm8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRlbGxfam9lX25vJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZhcHBlYWxfaWQ9MTA3NiZwYWNrYWdlX2lkPTI3NTE1JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNfUEEtQUZSLTIwMjQwMzIyVwNzcGNCCmX8LkX9ZVtrKXxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
---
| |
Dear Pro-Life American,

A disheartening reality is unfolding before us.

America, a nation built on freedom and the right to life, is threatened by disturbing policies that endanger thousands of unborn babies. The Biden Administration's policies are catalyzing the most pro-abortion administration we've ever seen.

Biden supports heart-wrenching late-term abortions, encourages cover-up of infanticide, endorses unrestricted access to abortion drugs, and is determined to establish abortion-on-demand in our Constitution.

In essence, his administration serves death rather than life, leaving thousands of unborn babies and vulnerable women at risk.

We at SBA Pro-Life America envision a world where every life is cherished. Where pain, despair, and death are replaced by compassion, support, and life. But this vision requires your unwavering support right now.

It's not just about standing against policies; it's about standing for lives - your life, my life, our children's lives, and those precious babies who are yet to be born.

We believe in the power of collective action. Join us as we champion the cause for life, rise above partisan politics, and fight against the deadly agenda of Big Abortion. You, as an individual, hold a powerful weapon - your voice. Use it in defense of those who cannot defend themselves before it's too late.

Time is ticking and we need you to take action TODAY!

Tell Joe Biden NO! No to unrestricted access to abortion drugs. No to painful late-term abortions. No to abortion-on-demand.

Help us serve women, save babies, and protect America by turning down the most pro-abortion administration in history! Together, we can leave a legacy of life and love for future generations.

name: Kimberly Guilfoyle
subject: She’s the REAL DEAL, people!
body:
Let me say this in no uncertain terms:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkcGOnDAMhp8m3ECOk4HhwGGlFaduVfXSYxSIw0RNwsgEduftK0atVKmX7tn-_Nuff7yZNxtiyMtXm2jwkQ1vphxmmuplD9Gvj0g1k40GAXUNqkY0snIDyN5pXdEgOyklACJUtwFnOfvWtx40wMVZsKSvevISHPUaXBWGcw4oRLjqy0U2inTXSzWDu5KfJAkNNhKXxjORW5PNLoaJuDyY7iuXZl5TFYdbKfdNqBeBo8Bxo3lnat5DZnJnh8BxKocXOP4MaSKOj7_OSZa3mz1JNfJJcsiLUK-FdxLY7iWZ2aa7DUsW6vX3vmC-vdTjl-_YSKmxv5gidau6vqslaCWwpQ9TgvsE8MxZc6FczvCj9pHrP3YEth97Pv4tVDy4-3uIMWxtJzQsyYb4lFL--32_AgAA__-5h5qP "Kimberly Guilfoyle")
---

I'll tell you what I said on my show:

**MARSHA BLACKBURN - THE FABULOUS SENATOR FROM TENNESSEE - IS THE REAL DEAL, PEOPLE!**

She's a leader of our MAGA movement. She's a tough-as-nails Conservative. And she's a wall standing in the way of Joe Biden's radical agenda.

She's also up for re-election in November. Normally, she would soar through the finish line since she's a top ally of President Trump... but unfortunately, we have a problem.

Chuck Schumer recruited a power-hungry, showboating socialist in a desperate attempt to destroy any opposition to his agenda and defeat Marsha.

In fact, Marsha's opponent just joined forces with Hollywood elite types to turbocharge her negative campaign to flip Tennessee.

Let me say this in no uncertain terms:

_If this radical socialist manages to flip Tennessee, our path to winning back the Senate Majority will COMPLETELY VANISH. _

_**[So, with all that being said, I respectfully ask you for the FIRST TIME to donate right now to Marsha Blackburn's re-election campaign.](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkcGOnDAMhp8m3ECOk4HhwGGlFaduVfXSYxSIw0RNwsgEduftK0atVKmX7tn-_Nuff7yZNxtiyMtXm2jwkQ1vphxmmuplD9Gvj0g1k40GAXUNqkY0snIDyN5pXdEgOyklACJUtwFnOfvWtx40wMVZsKSvevISHPUaXBWGcw4oRLjqy0U2inTXSzWDu5KfJAkNNhKXxjORW5PNLoaJuDyY7iuXZl5TFYdbKfdNqBeBo8Bxo3lnat5DZnJnh8BxKocXOP4MaSKOj7_OSZa3mz1JNfJJcsiLUK-FdxLY7iWZ2aa7DUsW6vX3vmC-vdTjl-_YSKmxv5gidau6vqslaCWwpQ9TgvsE8MxZc6FczvCj9pHrP3YEth97Pv4tVDy4-3uIMWxtJzQsyYb4lFL--32_AgAA__-5h5qP "So, with all that being said, I respectfully ask you for the FIRST TIME to donate right now to Marsha Blackburn’s re-election campaign.")**_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN ME: DONATE NOW](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkcGOnDAMhp8m3ECOk4HhwGGlFaduVfXSYxSIw0RNwsgEduftK0atVKmX7tn-_Nuff7yZNxtiyMtXm2jwkQ1vphxmmuplD9Gvj0g1k40GAXUNqkY0snIDyN5pXdEgOyklACJUtwFnOfvWtx40wMVZsKSvevISHPUaXBWGcw4oRLjqy0U2inTXSzWDu5KfJAkNNhKXxjORW5PNLoaJuDyY7iuXZl5TFYdbKfdNqBeBo8Bxo3lnat5DZnJnh8BxKocXOP4MaSKOj7_OSZa3mz1JNfJJcsiLUK-FdxLY7iWZ2aa7DUsW6vX3vmC-vdTjl-_YSKmxv5gidau6vqslaCWwpQ9TgvsE8MxZc6FczvCj9pHrP3YEth97Pv4tVDy4-3uIMWxtJzQsyYb4lFL--32_AgAA__-5h5qP "PLEASE JOIN ME: DONATE NOW")

**Marsha Blackburn is exactly the kind of strong, patriotic conservative President Trump needs in the U.S. Senate. **

No surprise here, but Marsha's socialist opponent turned to big liberal names to help bankroll her campaign. Luckily, we have you on our side. If just 30% respond to my email, Marsha's socialist opponent will have no shot at EVER flipping this key Senate seat.

But first, I need your help right now. Please. I'm personally asking for your help.

_**[So, I hope that's enough to convince you. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: The key to Lincoln's rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qB7zVE3yASqNH9ABsdyJ6A~~/AARclAA~/RgRn3-F8P0S9aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2R2ZC1tYXRoZW1hdGljcy1hbmQtbG9naWMtY291cnNlP3NjPTAwNDcyTjAyNDJMMTVET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1nZW9tZXRyeV9kdmQmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwMzIyVwNzcGNCCmX8jkX9ZVFA_ehSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qB7zVE3yASqNH9ABsdyJ6A~~/AARclAA~/RgRn3-F8P0S9aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2R2ZC1tYXRoZW1hdGljcy1hbmQtbG9naWMtY291cnNlP3NjPTAwNDcyTjAyNDJMMTVET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1nZW9tZXRyeV9kdmQmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwMzIyVwNzcGNCCmX8jkX9ZVFA_ehSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qB7zVE3yASqNH9ABsdyJ6A~~/AARclAA~/RgRn3-F8P0S9aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2R2ZC1tYXRoZW1hdGljcy1hbmQtbG9naWMtY291cnNlP3NjPTAwNDcyTjAyNDJMMTVET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1nZW9tZXRyeV9kdmQmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwMzIyVwNzcGNCCmX8jkX9ZVFA_ehSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. ** You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. | Tuesday night, we drained the Chesterfield GOP Swamp. Listen to my interview with 1140 WRVA's Award Winning radio show host John Reid as we discuss Tuesday night's big grassroots win as the people voted to replace the entire leadership of the Chesterfield GOP.
The Old Guard refused to let me vote despite the election being open to all registered voters. I used the letter they presented to keep me from voting against them by showing it to voters and stating this is exactly why we need new GOP leadership in Chesterfield.
I discussed the politically motivated and false assault charges that have now been charged against me by the girlfriend of a former disgruntled and vindictive ex employee who actively worked with the now overthrown Chesterfield GOP Executive Committee in an attempt to destroy me both politically and personally.
I'm now facing false criminal charges for assault and battery and have to spend thousands of dollars to hire an attorney. Please consider giving to my legal fund.
The bottom line is this. The old guard doesn't want me run for office. They banned me from seeking the Republican nomination for 4 years. They don't want me to ever run for public office ever again.
Now you understand the motivation behind yesterday's series of events and the motivations of those involved.
---

# VIDEO OF THE ALLEGED "ASSAULT"
---
|
# TOGETHER THEY HAVE STALKED ME
# FOR OVER A YEAR
---
| [](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i-j1qoibi3sM4k6ZXm8Z3UgbOXxPJwBYDeLg3jIWdEIlxwGK6seNnFGWzDnzNB8z_7wXcHW0hsfWCPsD1LtyZyPrlsWqTWuq03TbADEseBrekMvlFAzAUE72K0c64s49zDEo3FZEphhlMsSUYgxMlgAWpOgZDdfC7QrR7os_Q_Mv-yecLVZazw==&c=yTNOHRtisokop7AZyN3Ql4uSOdPaihTQuhTYA77FhYmzeqLnggZY-A==&ch=xuyN_mO8CzVWNUrp5kTDbMvG4hTrqUUL80BJnFURgneuZhVvPjNgFQ==)
---
Make no mistake. This was a politically motivated setup by the now overthrown Chesterfield GOP Executive Committee, who worked with a former vindictive ex-employee of mine, in an attempt to keep me from running for governor or state senate again.
First, they denied my ability to vote for chair, then they gave me a letter saying I was kicked out of the party for 4 years, and then things set up to capture my reaction on video by a girlfriend of an ex-employee, who for years has set up anonymous social media accounts to politically and personally destroy me. Thankfully, the slate of grassroots candidates running Tuesday night won and they will correct the illegal actions taken by the ousted Chesterfield Executive Committee.
Keep in mind, my vengeful ex-employee's girlfriend followed me around off and on the entire night and while I was having private conversations with the voters standing in line. She would sneak up from behind and use her cell phone to video me talking to voters. And that's not the first time. This harassment has been taking place for over a year.
Both she and her boyfriend, my vindictive ex-employee have been stalking me for over a year, while I was in office and once I got a protective order against him in February 2023, she was his proxy at events. To give you an idea of the malice of the ousted executive committee, the old guard asked my former employee to serve as the Sergeant of Arms. Keep in mind a Richmond General District Court granted me a protective order against him, which was extended 6 months, until it expired November 2023.
This is the girlfriend's video that she presented to the press, saying falsely that I assaulted her.
Judge for yourself.
If you were present and witnessed the alleged assault, please reply to this email so that I can line up witnesses for my defense on Monday, May 13.
Please also consider giving to my legal fund so that I can pay my legal expenses. Thank you in advance to those who have already contributed.
---

clean_body: WE WON & NOW THEY ARE COMING AFTER ME | | | | MY INTERVIEW ON THE JOHN REID SHOW | WE WON & NOW THEY ARE COMING AFTER ME | == | | == | Tuesday night, we drained the Chesterfield GOP Swamp. Listen to my interview with 1140 WRVA's Award Winning radio show host John Reid as we discuss Tuesday night's big grassroots win as the people voted to replace the entire leadership of the Chesterfield GOP. The Old Guard refused to let me vote despite the election being open to all registered voters. I used the letter they presented to keep me from voting against them by showing it to voters and stating this is exactly why we need new GOP leadership in Chesterfield. I discussed the politically motivated and false assault charges that have now been charged against me by the girlfriend of a former disgruntled and vindictive ex employee who actively worked with the now overthrown Chesterfield GOP Executive Committee in an attempt to destroy me both politically and personally. I'm now facing false criminal charges for assault and battery and have to spend thousands of dollars to hire an attorney. Please consider giving to my legal fund. The bottom line is this. The old guard doesn't want me run for office. They banned me from seeking the Republican nomination for 4 years. They don't want me to ever run for public office ever again. Now you understand the motivation behind yesterday's series of events and the motivations of those involved. | | == | VIDEO OF THE ALLEGED "ASSAULT" | TOGETHER THEY HAVE STALKED ME FOR OVER A YEAR | == Make no mistake. This was a politically motivated setup by the now overthrown Chesterfield GOP Executive Committee, who worked with a former vindictive ex-employee of mine, in an attempt to keep me from running for governor or state senate again. First, they denied my ability to vote for chair, then they gave me a letter saying I was kicked out of the party for 4 years, and then things set up to capture my reaction on video by a girlfriend of an ex-employee, who for years has set up anonymous social media accounts to politically and personally destroy me. Thankfully, the slate of grassroots candidates running Tuesday night won and they will correct the illegal actions taken by the ousted Chesterfield Executive Committee. Keep in mind, my vengeful ex-employee's girlfriend followed me around off and on the entire night and while I was having private conversations with the voters standing in line. She would sneak up from behind and use her cell phone to video me talking to voters. And that's not the first time. This harassment has been taking place for over a year. Both she and her boyfriend, my vindictive ex-employee have been stalking me for over a year, while I was in office and once I got a protective order against him in February 2023, she was his proxy at events. To give you an idea of the malice of the ousted executive committee, the old guard asked my former employee to serve as the Sergeant of Arms. Keep in mind a Richmond General District Court granted me a protective order against him, which was extended 6 months, until it expired November 2023. This is the girlfriend's video that she presented to the press, saying falsely that I assaulted her. Judge for yourself. If you were present and witnessed the alleged assault, please reply to this email so that I can line up witnesses for my defense on Monday, May 13. Please also consider giving to my legal fund so that I can pay my legal expenses. Thank you in advance to those who have already contributed. | | | | | | | | IMPORTANT DATES | MAY 4 SATURDAY CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT CONVENTIONS JUNE 1 SATURDAY REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA CONVENTION HAMPTON, VA JUNE 18 TUESDAY REPUBLICAN PRIMARY FOR U.S. SENATE | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: URGENT: Tell Joe NO!
body:
A disheartening reality is unfolding before us.

__
Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda!| | | [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkb2O1TAQhZ_G6RLZY8e-W6RYEaViEaKhtCb2JOvFf3J8hXh7dGGRKLedT_Np5pzvL_YFQwz5_IKJliM22y6b0V47jp1iHN8KjblY4KBGLkcAKwa_cPHklRpoEUYIweUNxPC6aH2TN-FvwuycgzkAtRGH1mbevUCNQ1geHi4B-JPSME-IBLNU3GvniB-KKY6RWp-ORuRLwuxj2Kn1X41qaX1yJQ1xee29Xkw-M9gYbOh6KHm6dqytxHDQVNrJYPvvfia3e0_WYaoYzszk-oD2rZDNhYF-wKvcmyMm19rKVcn1kM93lMiHe2JypYQhMtBYK2G0wTO5Cm40A13R_cCT_s7AzGJ-X3Yld8qdyfWT_fo8bp-_jf9SGNri688QY7i0YYqfD_2fH_sHu_gdAAD__4pqj-0)

| |
Dear Pro-Life American,

A disheartening reality is unfolding before us.

America, a nation built on freedom and the right to life, is threatened by disturbing policies that endanger thousands of unborn babies. The Biden Administration's policies are catalyzing the most pro-abortion administration we've ever seen.

Biden supports heart-wrenching late-term abortions, encourages cover-up of infanticide, endorses unrestricted access to abortion drugs, and is determined to establish abortion-on-demand in our Constitution.

In essence, his administration serves death rather than life, leaving thousands of unborn babies and vulnerable women at risk.

We at SBA Pro-Life America envision a world where every life is cherished. Where pain, despair, and death are replaced by compassion, support, and life. But this vision requires your unwavering support right now.

It's not just about standing against policies; it's about standing for lives - your life, my life, our children's lives, and those precious babies who are yet to be born.

We believe in the power of collective action. Join us as we champion the cause for life, rise above partisan politics, and fight against the deadly agenda of Big Abortion. You, as an individual, hold a powerful weapon - your voice. Use it in defense of those who cannot defend themselves before it's too late.

Time is ticking and we need you to take action TODAY!

Tell Joe Biden NO! No to unrestricted access to abortion drugs. No to painful late-term abortions. No to abortion-on-demand.

Help us serve women, save babies, and protect America by turning down the most pro-abortion administration in history! Together, we can leave a legacy of life and love for future generations.

[Click here to join SBA Pro-Life America in signing this crucial petition.](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkb2O1TAQhZ_G6RLZY8e-W6RYEaViEaKhtCb2JOvFf3J8hXh7dGGRKLedT_Np5pzvL_YFQwz5_IKJliM22y6b0V47jp1iHN8KjblY4KBGLkcAKwa_cPHklRpoEUYIweUNxPC6aH2TN-FvwuycgzkAtRGH1mbevUCNQ1geHi4B-JPSME-IBLNU3GvniB-KKY6RWp-ORuRLwuxj2Kn1X41qaX1yJQ1xee29Xkw-M9gYbOh6KHm6dqytxHDQVNrJYPvvfia3e0_WYaoYzszk-oD2rZDNhYF-wKvcmyMm19rKVcn1kM93lMiHe2JypYQhMtBYK2G0wTO5Cm40A13R_cCT_s7AzGJ-X3Yld8qdyfWT_fo8bp-_jf9SGNri688QY7i0YYqfD_2fH_sHu_gdAAD__4pqj-0)

For Life,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America
