## Feds, States Sue Apple as Illegal Monopoly
The Department of Justice and 15 states [sued Apple on Thursday](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7GOtCAUBeCngQ4D9yJiQfE3dvO3WxqU68gEhSg7Zt5-49bbneQk38n5eowPH1Pcn__9Rq4uefRzjW8aUQAI0KPmwS1EQMjJqU4ppXSLyFdn7YyojfeE1iqSwUx9oNZaNGryiDw6kKAlAsi-NbpreoQuAE6d8b0O0jMtKcSaj-aV415XWtInv-lo5rzx5NZay8nwH4OBwXBdVzPv03yXDIabZjBIvLNiMIT8Euc3ncKXkkjcjohlzTuJLe-55PRp1rolfrhQrphSPE3HtHxuPqbfxfrn_58AAAD__9BGWl0), claiming the iPhone maker monopolized the smartphone market, blocked competitors, and drove up prices. The government hasn't ruled out breaking the iconic company up as it pursues one of the largest tech antitrust cases in recent history. Apple shares fell more than 4% in trading Thursday. At the core of the complaint is Apple's "walled-garden" model, where all its parts - iPhone, iWatch, iMac, iMessage, and so on - are built to work seamlessly with each other, but not necessarily with competitors. That makes it difficult for Apple customers, who pay a premium, to switch brands. Experts say the first hurdle for prosecutors is proving [Apple actually has a monopoly.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7Fy6yAQAL8GOjRwhyRTULxGnV-bUnMWZ5sEWxo4WZO_zzh16i129-M8nymX_Lz9pwdHua4zLZJfPKMBMOBnr1O8MgOj5uhG55zzPaK-x9Cf_AAJLVDigETBBdtfFnJLQDyBzhEseIsANvSDH7uAMCbAyzhQ8MmS8pZTlrV2n2t-yp2v5Xt9ce2W9aFLvItsTeE_BZOC6TiOrvIuXNubK5gK36gomPZmhL64Gdq2woaekqXuTUyho-1ZzDvDWDTgFEy6xrQduZTchlF5e3tQLr9G-fP_JwAA__9HsVqz) Further, cases of this size historically have taken up to three years to conclude. Apple is worth trillions of dollars and has indicated it will fight the case to the end.
## Shohei Ohtani Interpreter Fired for Theft
The Los Angeles Dodgers fired interpreter Ippei Mizuhara after allegations surfaced that [he stole $4.5 million](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFv8yAQQH-N2RzBcYHPA8O3ZEvXjtYB5_gqbCxCE7W_vkrnjk9veNJ7v85XkiL77Y02Dn2pM6UuD57tCDACzqhyWJiBreJgvDHG4NlatQbW6LR14MlFjOAnCwulBP8iLQ7iWUkADagtgJ7ODv1psuAz2OgdTZg1Dag5S6_t9FFl7ysv5as-uJ1S3VQJa-_HfbD_B7gMcKFj5-f9pV7QuqTCA1zq2mmXcZPvz5UajbJ3bkfjzm30mMlGIPSO0OGUgBxkA0lHR4mMaiEfTylF7s4PqG8bSfmN9z9X_AQAAP__c81eYg) from the Dodger's $700-million superstar Shohei Ohtani to cover illegal gambling debts. Mizuhara began interpreting for Ohtani in 2018 when Ohtani began his MLB career. The two became friends, and by 2022, Mizuhara [amassed more than $1 million](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2SpCAURp8GMyy8gGhAsAlZb7qhRetV7hY_FtJt7T79VE886VdfcM7581geniLl47dPaNteFr82euMiOQAHtahuszsioOzQDmYYhkFpKbtgZy9g3KcZB4FqHY2c5gmU9_tkwMCqO7IgQAkJIGY9KtPPEswG8mlGP6tNeKYEbtRK7f8Wyi3gHv-VN9Z-LamLNrR2Xkz-YuAYuPu---sstVE-Mt7X58TAvS4GLsUnA_dZGbgrlIDES2g-E6fcsJ4VG1Z--PT8uPJGCSNl5HSeSDzR_1fw1TNwkxabUTsKjVJIDeuAOKHQXbXbeVOMdI2GKXEkT_Gbs_1Y7SsAAP__KYJuOA) in illegal gambling debt. Mizuhara admitted to betting on sports but "never" on baseball. Mizuhara initially claimed Ohtani agreed to pay off his debt but has since [changed his story](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPpTAMhH9N6IISJ5CjoLiG7l17JQrEgE-BoMT3EP9-xWu22cq2PJrRfH9f48tTpGP943fseUmjn5neOBoJIMGOtgr9gghoKuy101pr2xhTbT10yzI77ZpmdtA1buq8douffoVWNY3CinpQYJUBUF3TWld3BlwAM7nWdzYoL6zCQJxy_S_RwRsu8U5vzPWc9ir2G_NZhPktYBAwXNdV_y-eU_D3IxAwFE75fuaZMhcBwx4nAUNIYcX83E--gEGZz_79kgtllGVLG5JMG_uDJB2M-czImGVh9A8UuacDb-ljxNUzpeMxdUZZp7VRygkYqtyH86IYqbROWLXunuKnAP-I8ysAAP__pD91Kg), saying he stole the funds from Ohtani. Ohtani's lawyers said the player was a "victim of massive theft," and they were turning the matter over to police. According to MLB policy, gambling on baseball is punishable with a one-year ban from the sport.
## Planet Fitness Hit by Consumer Backlash
Planet Fitness has [lost $400 million in market value](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnsTcsOAg4A0OXbOna0SJwJNdgY5lTUN6-aufuv_RL39d1uQYqtN0_w4qec11CZHrhogWAALOYMfmMCKhH9MoppZQ5aT0-_KxTQpROWm1CTqekLVobs8nG4U3hSB4kGKkB5PlkjZvOGlwCfXM2nE2SYTASE3E9pu9KGz8wl3d94THFuo7FP5j3NuiPAS4DXHrv04a9dcTnbzDAZS9hQxaZeMPWxK2-Y2UWjWt8NrGG44ksYthFq5FCESsmCkLNs3LzPB4-7Z1KoWbdYOR9DVT-zvyvw08AAAD__5tKYCw) after one of its Alaska gyms canceled the membership of a woman who took a picture of a man shaving in the women's locker room. The company said it canceled the membership because photography is prohibited in the locker rooms. But the woman said she took the picture because the man was shaving, clad in a towel, while a little girl sat in the corner. Her Facebook post can be [seen at the bottom of this article](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPozAUhH8NdA8Z28BSUNwWdJv2SvSMH-CL8UO2Eyv__pTUW81IM9KMvr8_yw8678J-w5OmvPGCa3ZPWhRICVIvurbTRiRJ1TS1Q9u2re6Uqo9JdYS4kpDbKAZtvr702hk0thdmI2tM7SYppBZKSjF2vR6aUcnBSmWGHkdtBVZakHWZY_OPXcgHbf7FT4rNymftpyPnK1XqTyXnSs6llOZM4Z1VcqYAj1TJOVB5y8fzI0fcCTgAeg_JWUqAW6YI--sEgyHBhTlygHIwXJwyWXg6Swy8QY7vQuETA7gAntc7RYj82cMI39_t3b1upY6TvYrz3qV-qLTYT3T-czn_CvB_AAAA__-sAnTY). After the story went viral, a consumer backlash began, with some calling for Planet Fitness to get "the Bud Lite treatment." The stock [so far has fallen](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD-P4yAUxD8N7ojwg4RzQXGNu1x7pfVsHja7_BOQRPn2K6febjQ_aWY0_-_LHX3waf-HkUx3ecGt-yctkgNwUIsarHFEQHIgM-pxHEd1lXI4DApJ6o-ecL1O46RJbcI5K1BschRihcEbEKCEBBDT9ab0ZZKgLchV33BSViBTgqzvuV6-sk_9IBfe-Un1suU4BHP0XhqTfxnMDOb0Lrn1EzGYz2AGs5AfzWBeH80nao3BXAIm6tz5fhq8hEeM1Bu3NZfG0XWq3JKjZH3aecRAvBy5571iOcjyduDzJD7xV46YGg95-6bKa_50D9XY8vIh-HbTTIk9og-fyf3XA38CAAD__8ufczs) from a high earlier this month of $67 to its current $53.50.

On this date in 1765, the British Parliament passed the Stamp Act, the first direct tax on the American colonies and one of the official acts that led to the Revolutionary War. The tax was repealed a year later. () Now, to business: Your editor needed an adapter the other day and wished, not for the first time, that Radio Shack still existed. Do you have a favorite store that's now extinct? Our poll today asks which long-gone business you miss the most, but if yours isn't listed, please click reply and send it to us. We'd like to know! If you haven't subscribed to The Flyover yet, you can do that here . We're always interested in your feedback. Hit reply if you have thoughts for us. is our sponsor today. They offer a great line of pain-relieving products; . | Feds, States Sue Apple as Illegal Monopoly The Department of Justice and 15 states , claiming the iPhone maker monopolized the smartphone market, blocked competitors, and drove up prices. The government hasn't ruled out breaking the iconic company up as it pursues one of the largest tech antitrust cases in recent history. Apple shares fell more than 4% in trading Thursday. At the core of the complaint is Apple's "walled-garden" model, where all its parts - iPhone, iWatch, iMac, iMessage, and so on - are built to work seamlessly with each other, but not necessarily with competitors. That makes it difficult for Apple customers, who pay a premium, to switch brands. Experts say the first hurdle for prosecutors is proving Further, cases of this size historically have taken up to three years to conclude. Apple is worth trillions of dollars and has indicated it will fight the case to the end. Shohei Ohtani Interpreter Fired for Theft The Los Angeles Dodgers fired interpreter Ippei Mizuhara after allegations surfaced that from the Dodger's $700-million superstar Shohei Ohtani to cover illegal gambling debts. Mizuhara began interpreting for Ohtani in 2018 when Ohtani began his MLB career. The two became friends, and by 2022, Mizuhara in illegal gambling debt. Mizuhara admitted to betting on sports but "never" on baseball. Mizuhara initially claimed Ohtani agreed to pay off his debt but has since , saying he stole the funds from Ohtani. Ohtani's lawyers said the player was a "victim of massive theft," and they were turning the matter over to police. According to MLB policy, gambling on baseball is punishable with a one-year ban from the sport. Planet Fitness Hit by Consumer Backlash Planet Fitness has after one of its Alaska gyms canceled the membership of a woman who took a picture of a man shaving in the women's locker room. The company said it canceled the membership because photography is prohibited in the locker rooms. But the woman said she took the picture because the man was shaving, clad in a towel, while a little girl sat in the corner. Her Facebook post can be . After the story went viral, a consumer backlash began, with some calling for Planet Fitness to get "the Bud Lite treatment." The stock from a high earlier this month of $67 to its current $53.50. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=af2c351503ad4b98b95a9f675aaa9054&_e=h-M4snXrdZW4Y4FzAtL_qgp3SL4bH6xXYPjTtoxPkJx6ZpeFOuJibRhW0VPAGehghYXWa6q5Y5AsD9xz0aUFEUuGixbd_qtuZdbk-_hocNT5Y4aZKUxa3opba-kwI6sHeeSKVagQpzFOD5jCevklqwRU7ppntIuuc05zkDf6Mb90EvfC3cEfxztGe9_stb7S2qXHVdhweJdX49A3UE6K3ZEW9XA-nERxYu1g67XklSFrH5FndapjYRHtGNgaFXgm--rc8o1qOiH3a1YtHANAOvTiLiIrmYmE1w8iYZ-C6Y1_NjaVc0-9q61ADtQjbaJLVCdH_d4S2ZHApXdE_SsZnK5_8dMSyPiGqh-D_tp9qXC-zB1XifjFEaWWvB772cP2SulQz8GSu4Kp_o6KuNOj1MEA9Ujo5Qvw9sFwSYGlVyU%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=af2c351503ad4b98b95a9f675aaa9054&_e=h-M4snXrdZW4Y4FzAtL_qgp3SL4bH6xXYPjTtoxPkJx6ZpeFOuJibRhW0VPAGehghYXWa6q5Y5AsD9xz0aUFEUuGixbd_qtuZdbk-_hocNT5Y4aZKUxa3opba-kwI6sHeeSKVagQpzFOD5jCevklqwRU7ppntIuuc05zkDf6Mb90EvfC3cEfxztGe9_stb7S2qXHVdhweJdX49A3UE6K3ZEW9XA-nERxYu1g67XklSFrH5FndapjYRHtGNgaFXgmxa9c0c6_wWuJXXOINbmHcC3ZnXjL-AnwoxbJDJHePHf_j6iiCQO19cy198xapnAIPrAhnblEdZQ8oYvyR0Tun5iI7Oodt8vPbVKrTKH-fyGla8S9S9By5mDAQFZd2PQ4tE7gjuYltZJcFT2oQzObD0xO2wmsVfNBozp1GE4VG3o%3D)
---

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1269dd9bd02b471a86aeb8c277cacbef&_e=B5zT3fb0aELfgLPM0IoskKnqDimlkM23Vg_wXu8YkMKfDHQhnzRwefeeQRyeIlwHC80LSFEFgWMTEMAqaIhVpUkZfn6NTAx5QoES_odKjh8SGhijCvDgY0x3_AeVpPgw5aJi21x_Y7ueA8TdDKqC2LdRHtIG0XbwxUKinbOjkAGw20JSX5z1clXqmcGb7YxXSt_Z_WvrwTc-8rs_KGWjHgW7AVUQt8u1IePWGy7mlAJk6tPhNHacgy6vJYqBBjQAr1EUT_leiscwbbkfODa9OCJNvjB4UjosgooJhWp3vaW_wCInkHeyumF9b_C3sjWWlZYUC8EOaN5T7XIUwxBWrnsVNLv1x-QqasvvW7X9wV-daOp7HhxQhy00JrOOO_wXw8O9J-ddQNRxRsFGIZ1mH5C6yrvKM2yVVs1FXvS9NCg%3D)

| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---

body:

subject: Save Lives: Tell Joe NO!
body:
__
Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda! | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=238e0f34b9e84fe9a621ac55be6fe1eb&_e=gIOQBNwLIIqqk8e3twvm8p0yGQTpWfPDC-_gPrTen88qELJo0YhF_bpmE-2yJDEbDwT2I9jSXp8QVSG-K_ueVfe1lGrhOQZ_RF0LQVgRPo9hMJuJ0TwBDfpqvpU-iORZ1xX8RtdCUmE4dCUnq0n7mTxE19nDvIeCo7W-mSD6_Cs2FHDI_N0XWOjt1JNgf7Bf9rEAzo9XBWyEvG1WTHqYt6iwoRxvCjx2RBMXXFPlOUSUwEV0BNdY9lYosQCfOR6z75TOdiGlz1DdAyNOoEEaDevRJStV1ZOiP1jnt2Z5bWxgWBPnoNJ0jOkTvGcYZ4WRaTPb9Ox8wCVfKbVhlM7Q3Io6NazC6ETFeVNs8F5Jv-sfTh_MMNg56lFmq5h7nW3dA_dA5vLYxp3afPppWlPbbw%3D%3D)
---

---
| |
Fellow American,

Our pro-life values, the lives of thousands of unborn babies, and the hope for a pro-life America are under unprecedented threat.

The Biden administration is advancing the most pro-abortion agenda in our nation's history. It's up to us, the committed defenders of the unborn and their mothers, to say NO to Joe!

From supporting late-term abortions to promoting widespread access to abortion drugs, this administration is sacrificing the precious gift of life for political expedience. In Washington D.C, they've even encouraged the cover-up of infanticide. This is an attack not just on the unborn, but on our core beliefs as pro-life champions.

Each pro-abortion policy backed by the Biden administration deepens the wound in our nation's moral fabric, undermining the dignity and value of life. We must act now and stand together, for the sake of the unborn, for the dignity of women, and for the love of life that unites us all.

As believers in the sanctity of life, the power is in our hands to make a difference.

We, at SBA Pro-Life America, invite you to join us in asserting our unwavering commitment to life and in defiantly declaring NO to Big Abortion's deadly agenda.

**Tell Joe NO by giving a gift _TODAY_ that saves lives and shows your solidarity with the pro-life majority of America.**

By stepping forward and giving today, you enable SBA Pro-Life America to keep striving for a pro-life tomorrow. Our voices, united in defense of life, have the power to enact real change. But we can't do this crucial work without you.

Tell Joe NO!

[Give a gift that saves lives now >>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=238e0f34b9e84fe9a621ac55be6fe1eb&_e=gIOQBNwLIIqqk8e3twvm8p0yGQTpWfPDC-_gPrTen88qELJo0YhF_bpmE-2yJDEbDwT2I9jSXp8QVSG-K_ueVfe1lGrhOQZ_RF0LQVgRPo9hMJuJ0TwBDfpqvpU-iORZ1xX8RtdCUmE4dCUnq0n7mTxE19nDvIeCo7W-mSD6_Cs2FHDI_N0XWOjt1JNgf7Bf9rEAzo9XBWyEvG1WTHqYt6iwoRxvCjx2RBMXXFPlOURRsZuQGXs929W2wtpgvIaH23VOt-QbT9djgrBlGNC2sdsQrj29_VmeXTmC9synd8PFkeCG9SZ_wf15ZBm_N_Z6xBdU-6mPlWoIqCDfaA1MO5PZ2wMeAAin1jaAH3Fm7QhGRaT9QJ4_AX-EGnVdpDEYJIK-Ryr3VMETtxw8lpxywg%3D%3D)

Only by standing together can we say "NO" to this destructive agenda and champion the cause of life in our great nation.

Together, a pro-life America is within our reach!

For Life,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America
---

subject: What I've been working on in Richmond…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
Peter, I just wanted to reach out to briefly give you a post-session update. We ended legislative session on Saturday, March 9th. We will go back in for 'reconvene', when we vote to uphold or overturn the Governor's vetoes and amendments, on Wedne
| | |
---
| | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100018e65b6bd16-9cf6717a-5beb-4ef2-93f4-f836663affe0-000000/O4hY16gN5qG57fnMcdA4cKpV-NQ=366)
---
| Peter, I just wanted to reach out to briefly give you a post-session update. We ended legislative session on Saturday, March 9th. We will go back in for 'reconvene', when we vote to uphold or overturn the Governor's vetoes and amendments, on Wednesday, April 17th 2024. While the Democrats maintain a majority in both chambers and killed numerous Republican legislators' bills this year, I was able to pass 13 bills.
---
| | |
---
| **Headline, EINPresswire**
---
| One of my proudest accomplishments of this session was the passage of [Senate Bill 7](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3Fses=241%26typ=bil%26val=sb7/1/0100018e65b6bd16-9cf6717a-5beb-4ef2-93f4-f836663affe0-000000/ezFPfGf1_i0zcSGjZCBaVbDCFks=366), which would ensure Virginians of Jewish descent are protected under Virginia's hate crimes code. This is a piece of legislation I worked on during the 2023 session, [spurred on by the increase in antisemitic hate crimes](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.pbs.org%2Fnewshour%2Fpolitics%2Fantisemitic-incidents-on-rise-across-the-u-s-report-finds/1/0100018e65b6bd16-9cf6717a-5beb-4ef2-93f4-f836663affe0-000000/5UQeJAUpAkH2TygOX15pPhYxl1Q=366) both nationally and within the Commonwealth. Unfortunately, the bill was killed in conference as we attempted to consolidate the different versions that had passed the House and Senate. This year, I wanted to put a stop to the growing antisemitic rhetoric in our Commonwealth, and am proud to say the legislation awaits the Governor's signature. I also continued my work to support our military and veteran community in the Commonwealth. In 2020, I worked hard to establish [Virginia's Veterans Treatment Docket system](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3F201%2Bsum%2BSB499=/1/0100018e65b6bd16-9cf6717a-5beb-4ef2-93f4-f836663affe0-000000/krv3agJoHQmGF5FGogLjO4pYKKA=366) to ensure that those veterans who come home to a broken healthcare system and end up self-medicating get the help that they need. This year, I carried and passed [Senate Bill 6](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3F241%2Bsum%2BSB6S=/1/0100018e65b6bd16-9cf6717a-5beb-4ef2-93f4-f836663affe0-000000/N_ljGv3K9WKZeDHMtoMm-ukAmDU=366) to improve upon our treatment docket system. I share Governor Glenn Youngkin's goal of making Virginia the most military-friendly state in the nation, and that won't happen until we ensure those who have worn the cloth of our country are truly taken care of.
---
| | |
---
| **Senator Reeves presents Governor Glenn Youngkin with a General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus (GAMVC) Challenge Coin at the Virginia War Memorial**
---
| The work I did this year extends well beyond my legislative docket. As the newly elected representative of Greene County, I sat down with County staff to discuss their needs. I was shocked to learn about the state of their aging water infrastructure system and the [massive impact it's had on my constituents and their families](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.cbs19news.com%2Fstory%2F50182461%2Fgreene-county-still-swimming-in-water-issues/1/0100018e65b6bd16-9cf6717a-5beb-4ef2-93f4-f836663affe0-000000/VXVVAugbPt7Sg2ffy48azUBtdLY=366). I worked hard to secure $3,000,000 in Virginia's budget to support the county's efforts to revamp their vital infrastructure and ensure the residents of Greene have access to clean, safe drinking water. I am proud to report back to you the various successes we've had this session, and am grateful for the trust that you the people of Virginia's 28th Senatorial District have placed in me to represent you. Should you ever need anything at all, my office is only a phone-call away. Yours in service,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce E. ReevesSenator28th Senatorial District of VA(540) 226-1621SenatorReeves@Senate.Virginia.gov
---

clean_body: Peter, I just wanted to reach out to briefly give you a post-session update. We ended legislative session on Saturday, March 9th. We will go back in for 'reconvene', when we vote to uphold or overturn the Governor's vetoes and amendments, on Wedne | | | | | | Peter, I just wanted to reach out to briefly give you a post-session update. We ended legislative session on Saturday, March 9th. We will go back in for 'reconvene', when we vote to uphold or overturn the Governor's vetoes and amendments, on Wednesday, April 17th 2024. While the Democrats maintain a majority in both chambers and killed numerous Republican legislators' bills this year, I was able to pass 13 bills. | | | | Headline, EINPresswire | One of my proudest accomplishments of this session was the passage of , which would ensure Virginians of Jewish descent are protected under Virginia's hate crimes code. This is a piece of legislation I worked on during the 2023 session, both nationally and within the Commonwealth. Unfortunately, the bill was killed in conference as we attempted to consolidate the different versions that had passed the House and Senate. This year, I wanted to put a stop to the growing antisemitic rhetoric in our Commonwealth, and am proud to say the legislation awaits the Governor's signature. I also continued my work to support our military and veteran community in the Commonwealth. In 2020, I worked hard to establish to ensure that those veterans who come home to a broken healthcare system and end up self-medicating get the help that they need. This year, I carried and passed to improve upon our treatment docket system. I share Governor Glenn Youngkin's goal of making Virginia the most military-friendly state in the nation, and that won't happen until we ensure those who have worn the cloth of our country are truly taken care of. | | | | Senator Reeves presents Governor Glenn Youngkin with a General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus (GAMVC) Challenge Coin at the Virginia War Memorial | The work I did this year extends well beyond my legislative docket. As the newly elected representative of Greene County, I sat down with County staff to discuss their needs. I was shocked to learn about the state of their aging water infrastructure system and the . I worked hard to secure $3,000,000 in Virginia's budget to support the county's efforts to revamp their vital infrastructure and ensure the residents of Greene have access to clean, safe drinking water. I am proud to report back to you the various successes we've had this session, and am grateful for the trust that you the people of Virginia's 28th Senatorial District have placed in me to represent you. Should you ever need anything at all, my office is only a phone-call away. Yours in service, | | | | Bryce E. name: Full Mag News
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8797541a0579455faad034824e13ee68&_e=uNydUFItL5ng4XDo53t3NxEIOSgGD5NzH7Zo7E0_V05HXBu8C3RznhPUqGNYQto8wAB3XU22S7IxXwg0J460e6wXGcCY8M6U7yEVwcSQ-6Jc4Ul4K44zId3ynV8ZIgGfNfcHoSiguvpRnVoUtyAAPtGGh_zfKiGozRGWouqhMEUMIkTiBRBgzr0pyqMt3Ncd8w6d2V5nBqeUibbEzsqTSxldBDvLnOYZVQJsfk9aF61zlv-Sq1D0uu3WASo8vCRRC820GtX-c2kSPGVPwxwsivhI7dtw0bXxZXvekOB7pl73pxGq1aB09e6e3VGSesSyi8f8tl8NFOhUs0fO7I6DHFp7oauiRblx-Rch8i-UNN2mtCCsyxQE61nW97DdsqR3XYbq6siC2zIJvwLJM2T9z-ojUCJ528p-8T9JkYoHPtM%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** **
**You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8797541a0579455faad034824e13ee68&_e=uNydUFItL5ng4XDo53t3NxEIOSgGD5NzH7Zo7E0_V05HXBu8C3RznhPUqGNYQto8wAB3XU22S7IxXwg0J460e6wXGcCY8M6U7yEVwcSQ-6Jc4Ul4K44zId3ynV8ZIgGfNfcHoSiguvpRnVoUtyAAPtGGh_zfKiGozRGWouqhMEUMIkTiBRBgzr0pyqMt3Ncd8w6d2V5nBqeUibbEzsqTSxldBDvLnOYZVQJsfk9aF61zlv-Sq1D0uu3WASo8vCRRC820GtX-c2kSPGVPwxwsinKLlPJyOysWRFVR3kG3VNuyfJD3suyv-9bx_cxRAIfrN7hr6SR1IshU2taNJ01AL03oOZwOsNF375daN_VBQHXCnq8JNDrIWvtz6g1i-6TmkXupcgoQmj-XEDLRLXRSHQQZa_lqq0GOGQMwpiJt-Ts%3D)
---

Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8797541a0579455faad034824e13ee68&_e=uNydUFItL5ng4XDo53t3NxEIOSgGD5NzH7Zo7E0_V05HXBu8C3RznhPUqGNYQto8wAB3XU22S7IxXwg0J460e6wXGcCY8M6U7yEVwcSQ-6Jc4Ul4K44zId3ynV8ZIgGfNfcHoSiguvpRnVoUtyAAPtGGh_zfKiGozRGWouqhMEUMIkTiBRBgzr0pyqMt3Ncd8w6d2V5nBqeUibbEzsqTSxldBDvLnOYZVQJsfk9aF61zlv-Sq1D0uu3WASo8vCRRC820GtX-c2kSPGVPwxwsisdKFF0rE5UPgExRGMKka1TKgUMet4PeiY-uDP-BSsaQCsNGafCaSDQrdug2TqfuaTdWPjU4BJcnyYPOLf2ByUjPmQ1dwcPOYQdMLIRwTXu5REG7E8sQaruwfS3-_QXk7m3RMvPCntEdDg6Eu6szp6E%3D)

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: URGENT: Tell Joe NO!
body:
A disheartening reality is unfolding before us.

__
Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda!| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Axl6RMNFVPufQ7LO4jBwYw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn3_4UP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Rpb24uc2JhcHJvbGlmZS5vcmcvdGVsbC1qb2Utbm8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRlbGxfam9lX25vJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZhcHBlYWxfaWQ9MTA3NiZwYWNrYWdlX2lkPTI3NTE1JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNfUEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwMzIyVwNzcGNCCmX8rWH9ZUdBI6xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
---
| |
Dear Pro-Life American,

A disheartening reality is unfolding before us.

America, a nation built on freedom and the right to life, is threatened by disturbing policies that endanger thousands of unborn babies. The Biden Administration's policies are catalyzing the most pro-abortion administration we've ever seen.

Biden supports heart-wrenching late-term abortions, encourages cover-up of infanticide, endorses unrestricted access to abortion drugs, and is determined to establish abortion-on-demand in our Constitution.

In essence, his administration serves death rather than life, leaving thousands of unborn babies and vulnerable women at risk.

We at SBA Pro-Life America envision a world where every life is cherished. Where pain, despair, and death are replaced by compassion, support, and life. But this vision requires your unwavering support right now.

It's not just about standing against policies; it's about standing for lives - your life, my life, our children's lives, and those precious babies who are yet to be born.

We believe in the power of collective action. Join us as we champion the cause for life, rise above partisan politics, and fight against the deadly agenda of Big Abortion. You, as an individual, hold a powerful weapon - your voice. Use it in defense of those who cannot defend themselves before it's too late.

Time is ticking and we need you to take action TODAY!

Tell Joe Biden NO! No to unrestricted access to abortion drugs. No to painful late-term abortions. No to abortion-on-demand.

Help us serve women, save babies, and protect America by turning down the most pro-abortion administration in history! Together, we can leave a legacy of life and love for future generations.

[Click here to join SBA Pro-Life America in signing this crucial petition.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Axl6RMNFVPufQ7LO4jBwYw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn3_4UP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Rpb24uc2JhcHJvbGlmZS5vcmcvdGVsbC1qb2Utbm8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRlbGxfam9lX25vJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZhcHBlYWxfaWQ9MTA3NiZwYWNrYWdlX2lkPTI3NTE1JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNfUEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwMzIyVwNzcGNCCmX8rWH9ZUdBI6xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

For Life,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

clean_body: A disheartening reality is unfolding before us. Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda! | | | | | Dear Pro-Life American, A disheartening reality is unfolding before us. America, a nation built on freedom and the right to life, is threatened by disturbing policies that endanger thousands of unborn babies. The Biden Administration's policies are catalyzing the most pro-abortion administration we've ever seen. Biden supports heart-wrenching late-term abortions, encourages cover-up of infanticide, endorses unrestricted access to abortion drugs, and is determined to establish abortion-on-demand in our Constitution. In essence, his administration serves death rather than life, leaving thousands of unborn babies and vulnerable women at risk. We at SBA Pro-Life America envision a world where every life is cherished. Where pain, despair, and death are replaced by compassion, support, and life. But this vision requires your unwavering support right now. It's not just about standing against policies; it's about standing for lives - your life, my life, our children's lives, and those precious babies who are yet to be born. We believe in the power of collective action. Join us as we champion the cause for life, rise above partisan politics, and fight against the deadly agenda of Big Abortion. You, as an individual, hold a powerful weapon - your voice. Use it in defense of those who cannot defend themselves before it's too late. Time is ticking and we need you to take action TODAY! Tell Joe Biden NO! No to unrestricted access to abortion drugs. No to painful late-term abortions. No to abortion-on-demand. Help us serve women, save babies, and protect America by turning down the most pro-abortion administration in history! Together, we can leave a legacy of life and love for future generations. For Life, Marjorie Dannenfelser President, SBA Pro-Life America | | | | | | | Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America 2776 S. body:
Let me say this in no uncertain terms:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3064c35c14454911a05fc6a27dcd6d89&_e=98NTe0E76sgllyYK329MjWoUPq0T3fRPuUVdUyYiS2dvgkOZ_wM-Oqi6G3T9pl7rZDobChvW24dS2Y6hzOFeXU5BilwuRIa9cofKfIVE5nx8rXl3gmXaXEYH1HOHU11UfKdklZYhP1yAOhmIuW1HOiXls9lHPcy2LTyQmRUb9dgXpBUC2ktSH9GlI1l7nNsKa2b70MxEfo65YyEsu6Jz52KLG1GbtpyFNKfjD5C2cG12TOn-dektVHvR5dxxQURcbQ8BOhGYEr_h-BUcdKIfQ2P_xHWUMHIwVZmI0H92dTKuHGipfu7EJrdKNFG8DJWdFNwEWmKQcO0uEKm9fiksbpMHgAOZ8vr8kVGLfwYQ_gYy_-o6_Y6yI77Qh4KDBdw5xuyY-NwMnFdbwyBXlpxBAH-4j9W6BtIu_piQQvfJBNjp_3yiMxvrDw_x_XBNGUi_jAFYbjj_4vo3H3fLCI0UEw%3D%3D "Kimberly Guilfoyle")
---

I'll tell you what I said on my show:

**MARSHA BLACKBURN - THE FABULOUS SENATOR FROM TENNESSEE - IS THE REAL DEAL, PEOPLE!**

She's a leader of our MAGA movement. She's a tough-as-nails Conservative. And she's a wall standing in the way of Joe Biden's radical agenda.

She's also up for re-election in November. Normally, she would soar through the finish line since she's a top ally of President Trump... but unfortunately, we have a problem.

Chuck Schumer recruited a power-hungry, showboating socialist in a desperate attempt to destroy any opposition to his agenda and defeat Marsha.

In fact, Marsha's opponent just joined forces with Hollywood elite types to turbocharge her negative campaign to flip Tennessee.

Let me say this in no uncertain terms:

_If this radical socialist manages to flip Tennessee, our path to winning back the Senate Majority will COMPLETELY VANISH. _

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=64c541f8a9ac4204bc59b7b41fe7d9d5&_e=VZJnDyJ3EfBFSv9cveJErJTrcAyLjiDRQQn3sb-8zXHDO-FRVpQYANh63XnkjjfUJIfL_ca6Pn2Lkl3TklOrr-0QtNjhjKh_v9OoaA4mxNDyFDgzd_i2vih-Az9CYPI9J9bCjFKhL1PYu7xBDdpFqZum1SrjQns2CrDxbfw-emmNbT2ii2TlM4MXnWCl6NdkTGfIRk25kcpZRZ-p82BkqJYbeoMsUwWz9lwpiRQkILovXOTg-Zd3ifW2-zId44c1nr--v05AAZdtGpXTKX3S-1IGOJbbbun7B1vIg_EA4r2IxHBEUbs1mUgsQSaZhTrllPmIRhfL9EiHuLSDUhZop5FXBsi1S0RHC78PNsPZlLY81Vr5oOKW_mFcVfkmdwjEpRSclzQ5l6WdX14p_CeqXWkqFf033fRZJIEYuGsDEVE%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=64c541f8a9ac4204bc59b7b41fe7d9d5&_e=VZJnDyJ3EfBFSv9cveJErJTrcAyLjiDRQQn3sb-8zXHDO-FRVpQYANh63XnkjjfUJIfL_ca6Pn2Lkl3TklOrr-0QtNjhjKh_v9OoaA4mxNDyFDgzd_i2vih-Az9CYPI9J9bCjFKhL1PYu7xBDdpFqZum1SrjQns2CrDxbfw-emmNbT2ii2TlM4MXnWCl6NdkTGfIRk25kcpZRZ-p82BkqJYbeoMsUwWz9lwpiRQkILovXOTg-Zd3ifW2-zId44c1nr--v05AAZdtGpXTKX3S-yvRpPRky2sIKkacJ3XgngiheOCCDN0BPKW0LCO5JD2tHKISbf0aWdwwEQ2CpfSbiCWcMDMwjtoGl66QaqG8LLFW6g8bJ99TqJ4nBhnjV-Bvkma-QQuTNkvrU7JxVzGGxqlP0LhHAdpiZCs2Wy72qN8%3D)
---

I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=64c541f8a9ac4204bc59b7b41fe7d9d5&_e=VZJnDyJ3EfBFSv9cveJErJTrcAyLjiDRQQn3sb-8zXHDO-FRVpQYANh63XnkjjfUJIfL_ca6Pn2Lkl3TklOrr-0QtNjhjKh_v9OoaA4mxNDyFDgzd_i2vih-Az9CYPI9J9bCjFKhL1PYu7xBDdpFqZum1SrjQns2CrDxbfw-emmNbT2ii2TlM4MXnWCl6NdkTGfIRk25kcpZRZ-p82BkqJYbeoMsUwWz9lwpiRQkILovXOTg-Zd3ifW2-zId44c1nr--v05AAZdtGpXTKX3S-wR7R1BF9bUBUj8-PCc-nRIe_anzGSPgtzfLKljAUvis03ZXgdR5JDHgmEvCaBLlpbEWqpkqNJo-UeQSnuJNrI620EU_8vSPVuPrBuSgdlcWFbgxNcrlX7JX2V_eT8SZGkcaV-gvhwaWbrjKEud2MgI%3D) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. body: 96https://secure.winred.com/reddy-for-kansas-03/grocery-prices-email-fun draising?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024march22hf No matter what Joe Biden, Sharice Davids, and other politicians say, the Kansans I talk to in the 3rd District know that when it comes to our economy, something is wrong. Perhaps nowhere is it felt more than at the grocery store, and for good reason. I saw one report this week showing that grocery prices are up by more than 21% over the last couple of years. That’s unacceptable. “Bidenomics” has left working families behind. And looking at Sharice Davids’ track record of supporting practically everything that this president does, I have no confidence she’ll try to do anything about it. To get prices down, we need to elect new leaders... independent thinkers and problem solvers. It starts here, in this district. https://secure.winred.com/reddy-for-kansas-03/grocery-prices-email-fund raising?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024march22hf I’m ready. name: Christine Drazan
subject: Did you miss this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Christine Drazan
body:
My interview with KOIN
Friend, We can't just keep kicking the can down the road. Oregon needs real solutions to our state's problems, not half-measures. I recently spoke with KOIN News about my campaign for Oregon's 51st District and the top problems facing our communities. **[You can listen to my message to Oregonians here.](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkyuyjy-dihkkhuuli-r/)****⬇ ️ ⬇️ ⬇️** [](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkyuyjy-dihkkhuuli-y/) _The very first time I ran for office, I committed to my community that I would be all in for them,**and then when I ran for governor, I committed that I would be all in for my state.**_ That call inside of me to serve and that commitment to be a part of the process hasn't changed. I am excited to have the opportunity to be a part of ensuring that the challenges our state faces right now-that our community is represented in those conversations. [WATCH MY INTERVIEW WITH KOIN HERE](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkyuyjy-dihkkhuuli-j/) Help me lead Oregon in a new direction - **one that isn 't buried in bureaucracy or mired in mediocrity. We need safer streets and local schools with higher standards--and we need lower taxes for hard working families who are struggling to achieve the American Dream. **

With your help, we will work together for a new direction, and fight for a brighter future.

All in for you, Christine Drazan [](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkyuyjy-dihkkhuuli-t/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkyuyjy-dihkkhuuli-i/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xkyuyjy-dihkkhuuli-d/) Paid for by Friends of Christine Drazan. PAC ID 19050
29993 Maple Drive Rainier, OR 97048
| [Preferences](https://andor.updatemyprofile.com/y-xkyuyjy-172B6299-dihkkhuuli-u) | [Unsubscribe](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-u-xkyuyjy-dihkkhuuli-o/)
---

Dear Peter,
Did you read the alarming news?
According to _NBC News_ , the Democratic National Committee (DNC) and shady Republican-leaning groups are strategizing to sabotage third-party candidates in the 2024 presidential election by any means necessary.
Their number #1 target is Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
_Because of Kennedy's incredible polling numbers_ , these political entities are willing to spend millions of dollars on lawyers and ads to limit your choices for President. They are afraid a strong independent candidate will spoil their chances of winning, so they would rather not give voters a chance to vote for RFK Jr.
RFK Jr. isn't running for President to "spoil" the election. He is running to win the White House and heal America. He scares the establishment parties, because he seeks to hold government agencies responsible for their action and inaction.
These monopolistic and dirty political tactics to keep RFK Jr. off of the ballot deprive “We the People” of a real choice in November. The American people deserve debates on the greatest issues Americans face.
Right now, America is struggling with existential challenges, including $75 billion spent on a proxy war against Russia in the Ukraine–which is hammering the Middle Class economically. Instead of an economy based on industrial production, our economy is based on speculation, and the U.S. dollar, once the envy of the world, is on track to collapse.
Add to that the very troubling statistic that more than half of all Americans can’t access $1,000 if faced with a crisis. And for younger generations, it is all but impossible to afford a home.
Kennedy's strong national poll numbers reflect Americans' dissatisfaction with the corrupt two-party system.
Team Kennedy cannot overstate how severe these attacks from the political establishment are about to become. They have endless resources to conduct a widespread smear and legal assault against RFK Jr.
Help Team Kennedy Fight back against the politics of cynicism and corruption.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: Exclusive: IR's Mark Vargas & Alfie Oakes Host Blagojevich at Seed to Table
body:
Famed "Trumpocrat" Rod Blagojevich discusses his forthcoming book "From Fired to Freed by Donald Trump" at the Famed Naples Venue

view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/0f744e7b8c03/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-10286396?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=47e8951869) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=47e8951869)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=47e8951869-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
This Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=47e8951869-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IR’s Mark Vargas Moderates Discussion Featuring Seed to Table Founder Alfie Oakes and “Trumpocrat” Rod Blagojevich at Famous Naples Grocery Store (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/03/irs-mark-vargas-moderates-discussion-featuring-seed-to-table-founder-alfie-oakes-and-trumpocrat-rod-blagojevich-at-famous-naples-grocery-store.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=47e8951869-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/03/irs-mark-vargas-moderates-discussion-featuring-seed-to-table-founder-alfie-oakes-and-trumpocrat-rod-blagojevich-at-famous-naples-grocery-store.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=47e8951869-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Rod Blagojevich and Alfie Oakes at Seed to Table, Naples, Florida (Courtesy of Alfie Oakes)

By Illinois Review

IR Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas traveled to Naples, Florida to moderate a discussion alongside Alfie Oakes, the founder of Oakes Farm and owner of the patriotic and popular grocery store Seed to Table (https://seedtotablemarket.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=47e8951869-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , that featured former Illinois governor Rod Blagojevich, one of the nation’s highest profile Trumpocrat’s — a Democrat who supports President Donald Trump — as the former governor previewed the book that he’s been working on quietly for the last several months.

The event, which was held at Seed to Table in Naples, was hosted by Oakes and
Matrix Home Solutions (https://www.matrixhomesolutions.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=47e8951869-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) founder and CEO Nick Richmond. The discussion was broadcast live on Rumble, and was heard on speakers throughout the 75,000 square foot grocery store as people shopped and dined. An estimated 200 people sat in the upper level of the store to watch the discussion live on stage.

Seed to Table remains a popular spot for supporters of President Trump and even showcases a MyPillow (https://www.mypillow.com/ir?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=47e8951869-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) section that includes a cardboard cutout of MyPillow founder and CEO Mike Lindell. The patriotic store also sells Trump merchandise and patriotic apparel outside, including hats, shirts, bumper stickers and magnets. And several American flags are proudly displayed throughout the patriotic grocery store and fresh produce market.

Seed to Table also is one of the places where you can find
Kirk's Hot Sauce (https://kirkshotsauce.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=47e8951869-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , the all-American hot sauce brand inspired by Iowa football legend Carroll "Chick" Kirk, and brought to life by his grandson Charlie Kirk, Founder and President of Turning Point USA (https://www.tpusa.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=47e8951869-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) - the largest conservative youth organization in the country.

clean_body: Famed "Trumpocrat" Rod Blagojevich discusses his forthcoming book "From Fired to Freed by Donald Trump" at the Famed Naples Venue view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This Illinois Review eBlast Powered By IR’s Mark Vargas Moderates Discussion Featuring Seed to Table Founder Alfie Oakes and “Trumpocrat” Rod Blagojevich at Famous Naples Grocery Store () Rod Blagojevich and Alfie Oakes at Seed to Table, Naples, Florida (Courtesy of Alfie Oakes) By Illinois Review IR Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas traveled to Naples, Florida to moderate a discussion alongside Alfie Oakes, the founder of Oakes Farm and owner of the patriotic and popular grocery store Seed to Table () , that featured former Illinois governor Rod Blagojevich, one of the nation’s highest profile Trumpocrat’s — a Democrat who supports President Donald Trump — as the former governor previewed the book that he’s been working on quietly for the last several months. The event, which was held at Seed to Table in Naples, was hosted by Oakes and Matrix Home Solutions () founder and CEO Nick Richmond. The discussion was broadcast live on Rumble, and was heard on speakers throughout the 75,000 square foot grocery store as people shopped and dined. An estimated 200 people sat in the upper level of the store to watch the discussion live on stage. Seed to Table remains a popular spot for supporters of President Trump and even showcases a MyPillow () section that includes a cardboard cutout of MyPillow founder and CEO Mike Lindell. The patriotic store also sells Trump merchandise and patriotic apparel outside, including hats, shirts, bumper stickers and magnets. And several American flags are proudly displayed throughout the patriotic grocery store and fresh produce market. Seed to Table also is one of the places where you can find Kirk's Hot Sauce () , the all-American hot sauce brand inspired by Iowa football legend Carroll "Chick" Kirk, and brought to life by his grandson Charlie Kirk, Founder and President of Turning Point USA () - the largest conservative youth organization in the country. CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE () IR's Mark Vargas leading a discussion with former Gov. Rod Blagojevich and Seed to Table founder Alfie Oakes (Illinois Review). You may truly be my only hope. The Biden Regime is sending a top ally of President Trump to PRISON! The Deep State is hellbent on indicting, arresting, bankrupting, and imprisoning President Trump and his top allies for daring to challenge the corrupt forces that have hijacked our once Free Republic. And as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from impeachment, I am at the top of their list. During these dark times in Biden's America, there is nowhere else to turn but you , Friend. We are not just battling for my own freedom and justice. This is about upholding the rights of every citizen who dares to challenge the status quo. If we lose this fight, we lose our Republic. When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment shortly after Joe Biden seized control of the White House, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy. But no one had any idea how much worse it was going to get... The ruling regime is attempting to turn its leading opponent and his allies into political prisoners to remain in power forever. Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what's happened to the greatest and freest nation in history. But just like President Trump, I 'm not giving up on America. I didn't give up when my home was raided or when I was wrongfully arrested and had my MUGSHOT taken in Fulton County - and there 's no way I'm backing down now. But I humbly admit I cannot win this fight all on my own. I'm counting on generous patriots like YOU to defend me at this pivotal moment. Thank you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Peter,

**I just secured the official GOP nomination for U.S. Senate in Ohio!**

Without your support, we wouldn’t have been able to pull off this victory - but our work isn’t done yet. Now we must focus on November and defeating Sherrod Brown. Now is the time for Republicans to become united, [**and together, we will do precisely that.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d9b975c5c4074eadab171298c56b5d55&_e=HdxyWU7DaxfctySZi4EDuPukeYaHWhaQk-fWxMV-_F8I_0uvLAFbP_WJYqXKI62Xw2uwuJlUOJdOmRxIAl4i2spvV0l_ZCajyEyoFoEf5v78rr4mgN8VyB6yqkjWjuwBuzqszWQwnsHf0lue62ol_SQfvo2ho7LyOqeFYX4U6VzCZ4YXeBbRUIF-PO8CY5dJnjz5fpFNjUC5bYcYZtmWgyQPR6HV_VSYLjFgOSb9_QNw8jSHFN8YWHZw_e2D3OPVBux3p1E3E3OCxYqah7WZomnuDy1h9QgcyPSRH4oBnK7HmkjrwJ2agJCfav-aJln-GqUO_x4yRuL76aubFtVRt6UueI_SNx_KzCh_iITOjyco3v-C38taL_CFUb-4JgIgcD4b38tXHRxhvgRGq_2Sbg%3D%3D)

Sherrod Brown is the single biggest enabler of Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda that has wrecked our country. He is:
1. For open borders - and even more illegal immigration.
2. Soft on crime - and more focused on protecting criminals than putting them in jail.
3. For runaway spending - he’s never met a dollar he couldn’t spend.
4. For nonstop taxes on hardworking Ohio families.
5. And a career politician who first ran for office when Richard Nixon was president.

**Sherrod Brown votes with Joe Biden damn near 100% of the time.** He’s sabotaged Ohio, and he’s sabotaged America, _and he’s lied to Ohio workers every step of the way._

But it’s not just me that Democrats and Washington insiders are coming after. They are also coming after President Trump. Chuck Schumer and the national Dems have spent millions tying me to President Trump.

I’ve got a message for them... **I wear my support for President Trump like a badge of honor and am proud to have his support because under him, we were safe, prosperous, and at peace.**

I wonder if Sherrod Brown would wear his blind support of Joe Biden and his policies like a badge of honor?

We know that DC Democrats will stop at nothing and spend whatever it takes to keep the chief enabler of their disastrous agenda in the Senate. [**That’s why I need your help, Peter.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d9b975c5c4074eadab171298c56b5d55&_e=HdxyWU7DaxfctySZi4EDuPukeYaHWhaQk-fWxMV-_F8I_0uvLAFbP_WJYqXKI62Xw2uwuJlUOJdOmRxIAl4i2spvV0l_ZCajyEyoFoEf5v78rr4mgN8VyB6yqkjWjuwBuzqszWQwnsHf0lue62ol_SQfvo2ho7LyOqeFYX4U6VzCZ4YXeBbRUIF-PO8CY5dJnjz5fpFNjUC5bYcYZtmWgyQPR6HV_VSYLjFgOSb9_QNw8jSHFN8YWHZw_e2D3OPVfFd5H-GSXOfrnUHuyw6B5gRLYmCcNET9_S4kqFoG_b5UW_8TB-jOE1aCIxC2-NNfXN7CHIrCB33LtzhYzWCHy3QT5rSwQsAA6SohuMk74YffJgCvy17s9cP2OYlmUmgUyj8S5mh2iJSp6b8TZWEeVw%3D%3D)

I had a target on my back before this victory, and now that I am officially the Republican nominee to take on DC insider Sherrod Brown, they are ready to spend over $100 million in this race.

We don’t need $100 million, but we do need you to put some skin in the game (and chip in again, too).

[**So, I am personally asking for your support. Even just $5 will go a long way to flip this seat, help Republicans win back the Senate majority, and finally retire career politician Sherrod Brown!**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d9b975c5c4074eadab171298c56b5d55&_e=HdxyWU7DaxfctySZi4EDuPukeYaHWhaQk-fWxMV-_F8I_0uvLAFbP_WJYqXKI62Xw2uwuJlUOJdOmRxIAl4i2spvV0l_ZCajyEyoFoEf5v78rr4mgN8VyB6yqkjWjuwBuzqszWQwnsHf0lue62ol_SQfvo2ho7LyOqeFYX4U6VzCZ4YXeBbRUIF-PO8CY5dJnjz5fpFNjUC5bYcYZtmWgyQPR6HV_VSYLjFgOSb9_QNw8jSHFN8YWHZw_e2D3OPV-wjbBzzPQtv9Sf2IPV-aUmvnwC7qhlK3eslL6kqLxQH1BWLeorRNARnmMDg9Ysywq9NL0n8-AnkKJ69Od3-rYrIaOQQIA_-20Cneto3Kjtmi2sWj13gbyAG1AdlxKGHP1uk7IHNN8AJnuIePxZq9zQ%3D%3D)

I hope I can count on you,

Bernie Moreno
Republican for U.S. Senate - Ohio

[ ** Join Team Bernie ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d9b975c5c4074eadab171298c56b5d55&_e=HdxyWU7DaxfctySZi4EDuPukeYaHWhaQk-fWxMV-_F8I_0uvLAFbP_WJYqXKI62Xw2uwuJlUOJdOmRxIAl4i2spvV0l_ZCajyEyoFoEf5v78rr4mgN8VyB6yqkjWjuwBuzqszWQwnsHf0lue62ol_SQfvo2ho7LyOqeFYX4U6VzCZ4YXeBbRUIF-PO8CY5dJnjz5fpFNjUC5bYcYZtmWgyQPR6HV_VSYLjFgOSb9_QNw8jSHFN8YWHZw_e2D3OPVCagkvOBkIZ7ebtr3aDpakw8wji1O1taSxNpksp37U8R93jU0MhG5a9Efc_AatRKy2l-4yHS7ZXd5EQQWGXBRdAi0_npRPfsmd94wu8R1IHJYMGSSYCAHqwX_xtLxG_pD1c5KOx0QCALZPIwWvSlo9g%3D%3D)

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

[ ** Join Bernie ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d9b975c5c4074eadab171298c56b5d55&_e=HdxyWU7DaxfctySZi4EDuPukeYaHWhaQk-fWxMV-_F8I_0uvLAFbP_WJYqXKI62Xw2uwuJlUOJdOmRxIAl4i2spvV0l_ZCajyEyoFoEf5v78rr4mgN8VyB6yqkjWjuwBuzqszWQwnsHf0lue62ol_SQfvo2ho7LyOqeFYX4U6VzCZ4YXeBbRUIF-PO8CY5dJnjz5fpFNjUC5bYcYZtmWgyQPR6HV_VSYLjFgOSb9_QNw8jSHFN8YWHZw_e2D3OPVJO2VMRo-YFMStiSX4WktaieTtTLr_5rZrdLrV1tLHxCMn0d6muok428dzBL0vcsxcTA6nZc0VVp1_UvQkKg7QmrhdTzJVg74M5rZkS1mN06RARlEvyW3tTBodr0fjT1CE0BIbDExarDFuAMnVWcRJg%3D%3D)

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsSlVp9iN8

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osSlVp9iN8

Dear
Friend,

In the
annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors-material resources, manpower,
pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in
determining the victors and the vanquished.

However,
as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that
surpasses conventional wisdom-a truth of extraordinary
significance.

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the
remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated
by the savior generals-visionary leaders displaying unparalleled
expertise.

Today,
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite
your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian
and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson, has authored a
groundbreaking eBook-Victory and the Savior Generals-a
captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional
leaders.

You can
secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Inside
its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the
defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity,
contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into
seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict,
rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment
with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is
your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most
influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate
even in the present day.

Claim
your complimentary copy of Victory and the Savior Generals now
through this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Wishing
you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover
Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA
94305

body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1247%2E135344%2E0lECh0)

$3.
If you knew you could contribute $3 to a campaign and it'd mean Democrats would hold the Senate in 2024, wouldn't you do it lickety-split?
If you knew donating $3 could keep Donald Trump from getting back to the White House, wouldn't it be $3 well-spent?
A $3 donation to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate in Michigan has the power to do both.
Yes, it probably feels a bit unrealistic to think that just $3 can do those things in an election where an extraordinary amount of money will be spent.
But by the time you read this, lots and lots of people have chipped in their $3. And now they're hoping you'll do the same.
Democrats can't hold the Senate if Elissa doesn't win Michigan. And if Elissa loses in Michigan, Biden probably loses in the state as well. So please:
[**Can Elissa -- and Democrats across the country -- count on you to contribute $3 directly to Elissa Slotkin's campaign before the FEC deadline on March 31?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar24.YRUw2h&refcode=em240322-1-700&t=2&akid=1247%2E135344%2E0lECh0)

clean_body: $3. If you knew you could contribute $3 to a campaign and it'd mean Democrats would hold the Senate in 2024, wouldn't you do it lickety-split? If you knew donating $3 could keep Donald Trump from getting back to the White House, wouldn't it be $3 well-spent? A $3 donation to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate in Michigan has the power to do both. Yes, it probably feels a bit unrealistic to think that just $3 can do those things in an election where an extraordinary amount of money will be spent. But by the time you read this, lots and lots of people have chipped in their $3. And now they're hoping you'll do the same. Democrats can't hold the Senate if Elissa doesn't win Michigan. And if Elissa loses in Michigan, Biden probably loses in the state as well. So please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Team Slotkin PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

I know you're busy, friend, but this can’t wait:

Jacky Rosen is the most vulnerable Democratic woman in the Senate this year, and experts predict that Senate control could all come down to Nevada again. And now, the far-right Republican candidate Mitch McConnell personally recruited to defeat her just set a new fundraising record!

**Listen, I know Jacky.** And if anyone has what it takes to protect this Senate seat, it's her. But with polling showing her tied neck and neck with her GOP opponent, she urgently needs your grassroots support to keep up the fight and win.
**Right now, Jacky is still very far behind her must-reach $20,000 daily goal ahead of her midnight deadline. And at this point in the election year, missing a goal like this could spell disaster for her campaign – and our Democratic Senate majority.**
With the stakes of this race so high, we have no time to lose. name: Debbie (personal email)
subject: a love letter to Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
my campaign is deeply personal because of my love for this state
| | |
---
Friend, this message is a bit on the longer side, but I hope you'll take the time to read it. **[You see, in a lot of ways, this campaign is a love letter to Florida.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81433685/462442584/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk966-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmQyMmE4OTctNGZlOC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cilp1Qy3Dqw1sbzS-em_AjpgHdabhYzhoBmtaLKsGRM=)**
I can still remember the first time that I came to Florida. I was working on my Masters degree and had just gotten the news that my beloved father had been killed by a criminal with a gun in Ecuador, where I was born. As I grappled with my grief, I found myself missing Ecuador more than I had in years. I missed its warmth, lush greenery, and close-knit communities that I grew up with. My older sister, Monica, knew our family was struggling, so she convinced me to visit her in Miami, where she had recently moved.
When I stepped outside of the airport, it was like stepping into another world. **It was warm, wonderfully humid, bustling with lively, diverse communities, lush, and all so, so beautifully green.** We spent the next few days visiting all of Monica's favorite places in her new city — the spots with the most beautiful views and the best cafes to get a _cafecito_. The people we met were even warmer than the weather. Everyone was welcoming, friendly, and proud to call this state their home.
I boarded my plane back to my home with a heavy heart but a new resolve. **As soon as I was able, I sold my car and moved across the country to make a new home in Miami.**(My mom, always my closest confidant, wasn't far behind.)
Since moving here all those years ago, I've had the privilege to build a beautiful life in the Sunshine State. **I fell in love here, found the community I had longed for, raised a family of my own, and dedicated my career to serving this state.** I've helped protect the Everglades, expanded access to health care, worked for Florida International University, and became the first South American immigrant elected to Congress, right here in Florida.
I've spent my life serving this state and getting to know the communities who call it home. But my opponent, Rick Scott, has spent his career scamming Floridians, lying to voters, and making himself richer. **He wants you to think that Florida families agree with his extreme, hateful agenda._But I can promise you, friend, that couldn't be further from the truth._**
Listen, my campaign is deeply personal because of my love for this state — and more importantly, because of what it will mean for my fellow Floridians. Rick Scott wants to sow division and undo decades of meaningful progress. He wants to destroy reproductive rights, gun safety laws, and vital public services, like Medicare and Social Security, that support millions of his constituents, including my own mother.

Florida is ready for a change — I hear it from voters every day as I travel around all 67 counties. I know this November, Floridians will choose unity, progress, and kindness over Rick Scott's extremist agenda.

But the truth is, we're up against a mega-millionaire who spent $64 million of his personal fortune to buy this seat last time. If we're going to break through Rick Scott's lies, build unstoppable grassroots momentum, and win this critical race, I'll need your help.

**[Please, will you donate $5 (or whatever you can spare today) to help me defeat Rick Scott and give our home the leadership that we deserve? This _will_ be the year that we flip Florida blue, but only if grassroots activists like _you_ believe in my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81433686/462442585/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk966-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmQyMmE4OTctNGZlOC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cilp1Qy3Dqw1sbzS-em_AjpgHdabhYzhoBmtaLKsGRM=)**

clean_body: my campaign is deeply personal because of my love for this state | | | Friend, this message is a bit on the longer side, but I hope you'll take the time to read it. = I can still remember the first time that I came to Florida. I was working on my Masters degree and had just gotten the news that my beloved father had been killed by a criminal with a gun in Ecuador, where I was born. As I grappled with my grief, I found myself missing Ecuador more than I had in years. I missed its warmth, lush greenery, and close-knit communities that I grew up with. My older sister, Monica, knew our family was struggling, so she convinced me to visit her in Miami, where she had recently moved. When I stepped outside of the airport, it was like stepping into another world. It was warm, wonderfully humid, bustling with lively, diverse communities, lush, and all so, so beautifully green. We spent the next few days visiting all of Monica's favorite places in her new city — the spots with the most beautiful views and the best cafes to get a cafecito. The people we met were even warmer than the weather. Everyone was welcoming, friendly, and proud to call this state their home. I boarded my plane back to my home with a heavy heart but a new resolve. As soon as I was able, I sold my car and moved across the country to make a new home in Miami.(My mom, always my closest confidant, wasn't far behind.) Since moving here all those years ago, I've had the privilege to build a beautiful life in the Sunshine State. I fell in love here, found the community I had longed for, raised a family of my own, and dedicated my career to serving this state. I've helped protect the Everglades, expanded access to health care, worked for Florida International University, and became the first South American immigrant elected to Congress, right here in Florida. I've spent my life serving this state and getting to know the communities who call it home. But my opponent, Rick Scott, has spent his career scamming Floridians, lying to voters, and making himself richer. He wants you to think that Florida families agree with his extreme, hateful agenda.But I can promise you, friend, that couldn't be further from the truth. Listen, my campaign is deeply personal because of my love for this state — and more importantly, because of what it will mean for my fellow Floridians. Rick Scott wants to sow division and undo decades of meaningful progress. He wants to destroy reproductive rights, gun safety laws, and vital public services, like Medicare and Social Security, that support millions of his constituents, including my own mother. Florida is ready for a change — I hear it from voters every day as I travel around all 67 counties. I know this November, Floridians will choose unity, progress, and kindness over Rick Scott's extremist agenda. But the truth is, we're up against a mega-millionaire who spent $64 million of his personal fortune to buy this seat last time. If we're going to break through Rick Scott's lies, build unstoppable grassroots momentum, and win this critical race, I'll need your help. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for taking the time to read this and fight for a better future for Florida. With gratitude, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

body:
It's us against Trump this November | | |
---
Peter -- Is there ANYTHING we could say to convince you to make your first online contribution to President Biden's reelection campaign today? Especially today. What if we told you that Trump sweeping through Republican primaries means it's us against him this November? Either we elect Joe Biden, or it's Trump back in office. What if we told you that as you read this, Trump is likely raising huge sums of money from MAGA Republicans? And what if we told you that while Trump relies on the MAGA right and outside spending organizations, almost all of our donations come from lots and lots of people chipping in, often in response to emails like this? We know... we know. It doesn't feel like one donation itself can do a lot. But this week, President Biden has received lots and lots of donations from people who want to reelect him and keep Trump out of office. Now they're hoping you'll do the same. Especially today. [Can President Biden and everyone else donating today count on you to contribute $25 to help reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House? name: Jon Favreau
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Hi Peter, it’s Jon Favreau.
I wouldn’t exactly say I’m calm about 2024.
Mitch McConnell is trying to take back the Senate, and if he does, Republicans will cut Social Security and Medicare, pack the courts with extreme right-wing judges, and make it harder to vote.
The only way we can stop them is by protecting Democratic incumbents like Bob Casey who aren’t afraid to stand up to Republican extremism.
[**Here’s what I know: the PA Senate race is going to be one of the country’s most expensive and competitive, and we need to do everything we can to make sure Bob Casey wins. Is there anything you can give to Bob’s campaign right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-1?refcode=em20240322-1&recurring=1&refcode2=2413_552475_ostriQ&akid=2413%2E552475%2EostriQ)
Let’s not forget that in 2016, Donald Trump won the state by just over 40,000 votes.
Yes, PA has had some big victories since then, but it’s also seen razor-thin margins in swing counties and a fight to turn out voters in Democratic hubs like Philadelphia.
**Pennsylvania is as competitive as it gets, and with the Senate majority and the White House depending on it, we can’t take anything for granted.**
If we’re going to protect our Democratic Senate majority, our coalition to re-elect Bob Casey in 2024 has to be even bigger and better than PA saw in 2020 and 2022. It won’t be easy, but it’s what we have to do to win, and I know it’s possible.
[**Will you chip in whatever you can to Bob’s campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-1?refcode=em20240322-1&recurring=1&refcode2=2413_552475_ostriQ&akid=2413%2E552475%2EostriQ)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240322-1-el&refcode2=2413_552475_ostriQ&akid=2413%2E552475%2EostriQ) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240322-1-el&refcode2=2413_552475_ostriQ&akid=2413%2E552475%2EostriQ) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240322-1-el&refcode2=2413_552475_ostriQ&akid=2413%2E552475%2EostriQ) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240322-1-el&refcode2=2413_552475_ostriQ&akid=2413%2E552475%2EostriQ) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240322-1-el&refcode2=2413_552475_ostriQ&akid=2413%2E552475%2EostriQ) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240322-1&refcode2=2413_552475_ostriQ&akid=2413%2E552475%2EostriQ)
---
Thanks,
Jon
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-1?refcode=em20240322-1&recurring=1&refcode2=2413_552475_ostriQ&akid=2413%2E552475%2EostriQ)
Jon Favreau
Co-host of Pod Save America
Former Speechwriter to President Obama

name: Team Andy Kim
subject: Tammy Murphy’s campaign is desperately distorting Andy’s record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
This isn’t the first time that Tammy Murphy’s stated inflammatory and flagrantly incorrect information regarding Andy’s record in a failed attempt to mislead voters.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81436412/462451573/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzE4MTYxNS01M2U4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VrVa8HpBeHQSRdiKyw2mBx0796ZMX7WXz27E0u2xOuk=&emci=ad18e3c5-a3e7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=17181615-53e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=26261389)
---

| | **First:** Tammy Murphy's campaign intimidated college students to keep them from endorsing our campaign. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81436413/462451574/-1197072038?refcode=2024-03-22-tammy&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=17181615-53e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzE4MTYxNS01M2U4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VrVa8HpBeHQSRdiKyw2mBx0796ZMX7WXz27E0u2xOuk=) **Then:** Tammy's campaign lied about endorsements, releasing a list with **several of those who supposedly endorsed her campaign almost immediately saying that they did no such thing – with one even saying "I have no idea how I [ended up there]."** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81436414/462451575/-1197072038?refcode=2024-03-22-tammy&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=17181615-53e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzE4MTYxNS01M2U4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VrVa8HpBeHQSRdiKyw2mBx0796ZMX7WXz27E0u2xOuk=) **Now:** Tammy Murphy's campaign is deliberately distorting and lying about Andy's record – and they're disguising it as a survey from an unbiased organization. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81436415/462451576/-1197072038?refcode=2024-03-22-tammy&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=17181615-53e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzE4MTYxNS01M2U4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VrVa8HpBeHQSRdiKyw2mBx0796ZMX7WXz27E0u2xOuk=) The "survey" told responders a string of distortions and lies about Andy's record and then asked how they felt about what they were told. **This isn't the first time that Tammy Murphy's****stated inflammatory and flagrantly incorrect information regarding Andy's record in a failed attempt to mislead voters.** Just a few weeks ago, she posted another incorrect statement to X (formally known as Twitter), which was quickly flagged and corrected by a community note. We need to ensure we have the resources to set the record straight because Tammy Murphy is already raising millions of dollars and could use her incredible personal worth to blanket the airwaves with her misleading ads.
