name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Did you know your tax dollars are funding this organization?
body:
Planned Parenthood cares only about the business. It preys on the vulnerable, thrives on women’s fear, and fuels itself on greed.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=552adf526a2d4847827181b076416bf5&_t=48JqL81oFhEcgZ3GJeygtN4qEmAGYiN3tOwo0bwE1awVMatxnQ4lN2DD8oK3rm6sWh2xKMbVFOBwDU6-H3J6QM4CQ9YLALSbYfHoiG8GZ9E%3D)_
---
[ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=552adf526a2d4847827181b076416bf5&_e=O6E5AP_bktYw-wnFc41shkN961KInY-3fkY2Ff4hBgBcgEInRRSrI-t_2GAi7WraESjMWKezC62IdJSqfJSmmExT_Yf6qEgS-mE2nr5_O7dhZTvup8oSu5MAvwzdQR7E6giptbdBPmLViL_8Cz7wHG1MCMjXGHXwFa4pXn1jpg_8UF9hEDP48f6kkmtt5xjc1TcckUccfd7hGxVo2OTreKvEiwUCEnGjf4iKr1oG2kzG7LMXVLNTUEMhC1jTx2r5uNx_6x8RrN5UFV2oPdkH6HsGV71QqksUHSlyFNHT0NLtwRNVHhu9VUq_YaHJWg1cEMmnln4xcl7J23lqXfbP9RTEABQtAYs26inWWAIgbVLRLWVm29PclFVp13PbZybyPQcwrvM0QWQCrVv5ZfPVxerXpZiaOUitvIZGboJF-SY%3D)
Fellow American,

Care, no matter what.

This is the motto of Planned Parenthood. While it sounds great on the surface, Planned Parenthood is lying to itself, to vulnerable women and young girls, and to the American people through manipulative and dangerously subtle language.

While they claim to provide healthcare services to women no matter who they are or where they live, abortion can never be healthcare. Further, while they claim to provide numerous services to women, 97.2% of Planned Parenthood's pregnancy resolution services are devoted to abortions, the purposeful ending of an unborn baby's life.

**[Does 97.2% of cases brought to Planned Parenthood that end in the death of an innocent child sound like"care" to you?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=552adf526a2d4847827181b076416bf5&_e=O6E5AP_bktYw-wnFc41shkN961KInY-3fkY2Ff4hBgBcgEInRRSrI-t_2GAi7WraESjMWKezC62IdJSqfJSmmExT_Yf6qEgS-mE2nr5_O7dhZTvup8oSu5MAvwzdQR7E6giptbdBPmLViL_8Cz7wHG1MCMjXGHXwFa4pXn1jpg_8UF9hEDP48f6kkmtt5xjc1TcckUccfd7hGxVo2OTreKvEiwUCEnGjf4iKr1oG2kzG7LMXVLNTUEMhC1jTx2r5uNx_6x8RrN5UFV2oPdkH6HJn23q-ROEy3XPaWYADEEVdLA6JxlAWapGjNWqWcOsEoCn7Wwzv_m1kKjmZpSqZga9xqhCDL5GTrkK_1zTVZB9hUNkhNMa83DNCKV9eAGDM9bBOvx_kcY5Vj8KwJIqF4AMnA-4fUtcDcWxQRa0BzIw%3D)**

Planned Parenthood cares only about the business. It preys on the vulnerable, thrives on women's fear, and fuels itself on greed. When a woman arrives seeking answers to an unexpected pregnancy, the clock to gain a profit starts ticking. They will do whatever they can to make a woman agree to an abortion because each abortion completed is more profit in their pockets.

At SBA Pro-Life America, we are committed to stopping the manipulation and the gruesome deaths of innocent babies. In the last 10 years, Planned Parenthood has the lifeblood of 3.4 million babies on their hands.

**[We cannot be the only voice fighting for these precious children and exposing the lies of Planned Parenthood.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=552adf526a2d4847827181b076416bf5&_e=O6E5AP_bktYw-wnFc41shkN961KInY-3fkY2Ff4hBgBcgEInRRSrI-t_2GAi7WraESjMWKezC62IdJSqfJSmmExT_Yf6qEgS-mE2nr5_O7dhZTvup8oSu5MAvwzdQR7E6giptbdBPmLViL_8Cz7wHG1MCMjXGHXwFa4pXn1jpg_8UF9hEDP48f6kkmtt5xjc1TcckUccfd7hGxVo2OTreKvEiwUCEnGjf4iKr1oG2kzG7LMXVLNTUEMhC1jTx2r5uNx_6x8RrN5UFV2oPdkH6FRecIWNhP7j-oV2pvNPgcX9ASXs0nRokjKhJIJHCODVkthcq3obsj9yyMGWHRHn9IvWUIYi4mNJd2urRVc8e86YpyM3_3au5rr5Eur4AuQQjayZT0h5HQvNGibDCwO4P4C2hfwVGwerfReRYROC27Y%3D)** Would you stand with us and commit to protecting women and unborn babies from the dangers of Planned Parenthood? By signing our pledge to stop Planned Parenthood, you are helping SBA Pro-Life America fight this "_David vs Goliath_ " battle.

Whether you know it or not, Planned Parenthood is impacting YOUR community and YOUR family by taking your hard-earned tax dollars to fund abortions and devaluing the unborn in our country.

**The lies, manipulation, and millions of deaths must come to an end now.**

Help us fight for the vulnerable by standing up against Planned Parenthood by signing our pledge at the link below:
[SIGN YOUR NAME](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=552adf526a2d4847827181b076416bf5&_e=O6E5AP_bktYw-wnFc41shkN961KInY-3fkY2Ff4hBgBcgEInRRSrI-t_2GAi7WraESjMWKezC62IdJSqfJSmmExT_Yf6qEgS-mE2nr5_O7dhZTvup8oSu5MAvwzdQR7E6giptbdBPmLViL_8Cz7wHG1MCMjXGHXwFa4pXn1jpg_8UF9hEDP48f6kkmtt5xjc1TcckUccfd7hGxVo2OTreKvEiwUCEnGjf4iKr1oG2kzG7LMXVLNTUEMhC1jTx2r5uNx_6x8RrN5UFV2oPdkH6MYUk5d9aAjVf0NqMOsohGLOsc1KH5zPeOLOEh5MVWMhPjPxsjJBbGZKbBdYH7pG6Z3dEUrPcANW0chRxh7rKxmVqWzxIbZ1z49UEBKaOlvJKWo2aq1wJVo1tpWKCep4k0sQdzQhibXqhPQW6es-Oho%3D)
| I can't tell you how important your commitment is today to the pro-life movement and the generations to come tomorrow.
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=552adf526a2d4847827181b076416bf5&_t=48JqL81oFhEcgZ3GJeygtN4qEmAGYiN3tOwo0bwE1awVMatxnQ4lN2DD8oK3rm6sWh2xKMbVFOBwDU6-H3J6QF6rSjolpaPYH8NbshAPQmS6i4CkyuacHwvr0Y8fakofNf4JlRB-sJXg8iWGZCNG0qB2lT-5D1HmZkaFK-lOGXw%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=552adf526a2d4847827181b076416bf5&_t=48JqL81oFhEcgZ3GJeygtN4qEmAGYiN3tOwo0bwE1awVMatxnQ4lN2DD8oK3rm6sWh2xKMbVFOBwDU6-H3J6QM4CQ9YLALSbYfHoiG8GZ9E%3D).

they must undergo major abdominal surgery with far greater risks for increased hemorrhaging, compromised future fertility, and other complications instead of a safe abortion procedure or medication. **Making a pregnant person endure an unnecessary C-section is the least safe thing that can be done to treat a miscarriage or non-viable pregnancy!** [**Will you chip in to help Cedar Key Progress defend abortion and FIRE anti-choice Republicans who would torture women with unnecessary surgeries and strip them of their human dignity?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuOd8kpyuJ-vdi6QSKQA6hF-9rCO-s8k9Sf1tn62KUdYBhfnoBILjRWG38xyx5fFKompyBb3sgeEkGX2kRUgzWCmzwUqE5vsjPcR_Qv-7jVROsmCb8aLbeIvlETiFpkE3Xot4tnpMXrSCvKuIKKP4x09foByqddal4zuQY-_CmehGVY_ODGRTl4ciSa0c1u4JbNg0qtePg6zg4bzLS80a0Ec-m0m27svqw3zTxsrbIIQuX1fJlBSYqIhW6LSbUoLYCUu4AqlgtndM-WUCm6VSixRzomuai2be-45LFEYVjmA0It8qt2AU7xd7tfstyMVoO1Ejw6wI9CoRwto792718c4R6qHOj_95Kks2TCgFXeX54/44v/vedmkmnHQlGidM9iNbQnPw/h2/h001.PWxFL4hrW78MfmwFe06W3g1FG5UdjiFPzTmHpPjIQ_4) | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuOd8kpyuJ-vdi6QSKQA6hF-9rCO-s8k9Sf1tn62KUdYBhSJz6sd8yPs-P18M468NzaDbLPqPJ-N9BAlzllu2sun-3ssmyNvMLuuOQ7cufrgCWRgJF5DgLyVGM4HdWUmf-J4CKfa9AvSg0FEqoDYIz4gWM-x4a8PIvxbXEpxS6fgrl9gwcQvZ4k7GDv1pwT7CEhQVOgk4h8ZELJ7vNHpEQzazfZ9yBAkb-35AJzHkeK0bISNUInigce96mR2XVJLpj-4KVZ6DSvQs-F_FoTf_Eht5Xz5fP0Xo3CHPjRuyL18qgEaENNMJOzsB07A0TsG77Ra9UJ7CR4o_bTk55ZPFEX804QeuujpCjYv1xO1a9_cks/44v/vedmkmnHQlGidM9iNbQnPw/h3/h001.T9J0nwGVBT2Rv6tkZXwJHEhooMRabxLyZ3jqSzYBK4o)

In addition to denying women miscarriage treatment and care for ectopic pregnancies, Republicans are now forcing women whose lives are already in danger to have major abdominal surgery rather than a safe 10 minute procedure!

An ER doctor in Louisiana said these situations are common, “Everytime I’m on call, I have a patient that is considered to potentially be in a life-or-death situation.”
The Charlotte Lozier Institute, a leading anti-abortion group, advocates for emergency abortions to be performed using labor induction or c-section, because it “shows greater respect for the human dignity of the fetus.” **_Dignity for the mother isn’t mentioned._**
[**Donate to Cedar Key Progress to DEFEAT anti-choice Republicans who have no respect for the lives and dignity of pregnant people!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuOd8kpyuJ-vdi6QSKQA6hF-9rCO-s8k9Sf1tn62KUdYBguLHoUskDXTINeavgqmqt0PcIftyONk0wN0w06gQ0OHtrcBgt9L-qf_Hpb52wb7qsdhierrcwzBh3J8j4m4izYWJWOWeCaDDYiGdII99bmQr4eBhhRx5k6u9RysNoS9xWycYZk9efYb97rChVh2aBkqngfqRFEnqfmV2MfGKY5f7UqK-Pla2YGSV43TPaJDeOSHZBetKKN4drR4z0LHdGUcEEPkC1FqYy6t4oOGNED7-AGctQTqY53Cty_jHYGvJtuws1B_kHlC2EeuEODbMtTElqPcamuwCvLaf8qw-t5t9CxxpEOu-uze35fVKGfe54/44v/vedmkmnHQlGidM9iNbQnPw/h4/h001.1TtGx-iU-pceaAbik0g4ls6jpW82VkvbdP6zyi9vae4)

clean_body: | | | In states with abortion bans, women with non-viable pregnancies are forced to undergo Cesarean section surgeries to empty their uterus! States with abortion bans, like Louisiana, are now FORCING pregnant people with non-viable pregnancies to have dangerous cesarean section surgeries to “preserve the appearance of not doing an abortion.” Some patients with life-threatening pregnancies in red states aren’t given a choice - they must undergo major abdominal surgery with far greater risks for increased hemorrhaging, compromised future fertility, and other complications instead of a safe abortion procedure or medication. Making a pregnant person endure an unnecessary C-section is the least safe thing that can be done to treat a miscarriage or non-viable pregnancy! | In addition to denying women miscarriage treatment and care for ectopic pregnancies, Republicans are now forcing women whose lives are already in danger to have major abdominal surgery rather than a safe 10 minute procedure! An ER doctor in Louisiana said these situations are common, “Everytime I’m on call, I have a patient that is considered to potentially be in a life-or-death situation.” The Charlotte Lozier Institute, a leading anti-abortion group, advocates for emergency abortions to be performed using labor induction or c-section, because it “shows greater respect for the human dignity of the fetus.” Dignity for the mother isn’t mentioned. Abortion bans are endangering the lives of pregnant people. -Cedar Key Progress Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. To donate by check, send to: Cedar Key Progress c/o Left Ledger 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
| | |
**** **** Peter, we need someone with the courage to take climate action! Despite the wildfires, droughts, and floods we are experiencing due to climate change, my opponent Rep. Jay Obernolte is undermining meaningful climate action in allegiance to fossil fuel companies like Koch Industries, one of his big donors. Climate chaos will worsen if we don’t transition to renewable energy. That’s why it is so disappointing that Rep. Obernolte voted to block the transition to more electric vehicles, denying consumer energy flexibility, money saving technologies, and pollution reduction. **[We can’t afford business as usual - it only helps big businesses. clean_body: | | | ** Peter, we need someone with the courage to take climate action! Despite the wildfires, droughts, and floods we are experiencing due to climate change, my opponent Rep. Jay Obernolte is undermining meaningful climate action in allegiance to fossil fuel companies like Koch Industries, one of his big donors. Climate chaos will worsen if we don’t transition to renewable energy. That’s why it is so disappointing that Rep. Obernolte voted to block the transition to more electric vehicles, denying consumer energy flexibility, money saving technologies, and pollution reduction. Unlike Jay’s fossil fueled campaign, our campaign is people-powered, people-funded, and people-centered. We understand that a livable planet, energy security, and public health are worth fighting for. I am giving it everything I’ve got to bring renewable energy, more high paying green energy jobs, and a healthy future to California. ** There’s no planet B. -Derek is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. name: Adam Schiff
subject: My deadline with the FEC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=6036%2E5257348%2E1kchN2 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

Our end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline is just days away.

Now that Trump has effectively clinched the Republican nomination, these
reports will be seen by everyone from major news sources to leadership of
both parties as to who has the momentum to win in November.

And because there is no one short of Joe Biden whom Trump enjoys attacking
more than yours truly, our report is especially important — not just for
our chances of winning in California, but to show that Democrats
nationwide are ready to defeat Trump for good.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240322_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1004&akid=6036%2E5257348%2E1kchN2 ]I’m ready to fight for Democrats and our democracy up and down the
ballot so that we can hold the Senate, flip the House, and defeat Trump.
Can you chip in
$10,
Derek, to
help me reach my FEC goal?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=mar2024_abs_em.4fd6uj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240322_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=6036%2E5257348%2E1kchN2 ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=mar2024_abs_em.4fd6uj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240322_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1009&akid=6036%2E5257348%2E1kchN2 ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240322_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=6036%2E5257348%2E1kchN2 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

You can imagine the headlines if we miss our mark and fall short on March
31st:

“Cash-strapped Senate Democrats struggle to defend Senate map.”

“In the face of Trump’s relentless attacks, Democrats’ grassroots energy
falters.”

“Embattled House Republicans grow more confident in defending narrow majority.”

Derek, we
must make sure to flip the House, hold the Senate, and return Joe Biden to
office.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240322_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1011&akid=6036%2E5257348%2E1kchN2 ]Help my campaign hit our FEC fundraising goal and support Democrats
across the map so we can defeat Trump with a
$10
donation today.

It’s times like this when I really count on this grassroots team to come
through — thanks for pitching in what you can.

— Adam

name: Tony Evers
subject: Republicans are abusing their power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

This is serious, so I’ll get right to the
point. The Republicans in the Senate will stop at nothing to with their
petty partisan politics – even if it means attacking hard working public
servants.

I take my job seriously, which is why I’ve always taken great care in
appointing hard working Wisconsinites focused on results, not partisan
games, to serve on the boards, commissions and councils of state
government.

Instead of putting our state first, Senate Republicans abused their power
by baselessly firing another 8 of these highly qualified appointees. We’re
witnessing attacks on our democracy right here in Wisconsin, and it’s time
to fight back.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2236?amount=&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.1&t=1001&akid=6661%2E1827488%2Eir4tCP ]That’s why I’m asking you to click here and pitch in to help us close
our $24,219 budget gap before our final deadline before end-of-quarter on
Sunday at midnight.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2243?refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.1&t=1002&akid=6661%2E1827488%2Eir4tCP ]Donate $5 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2238?refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.1&t=1003&akid=6661%2E1827488%2Eir4tCP ]Donate $10 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2239?refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.1&t=1004&akid=6661%2E1827488%2Eir4tCP ]Donate $25 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2244?refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.1&t=1005&akid=6661%2E1827488%2Eir4tCP ]Donate $100 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2245?refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.1&t=1006&akid=6661%2E1827488%2Eir4tCP ]Donate $250 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2236?amount=&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.1&t=1007&akid=6661%2E1827488%2Eir4tCP ]Another Amount

These are unprecedented attacks on capable Wisconsinites who are offering
their time to serve our state and are indispensable to our government.
When asked for answers, all the Republicans can provide are ridiculous
excuses that hide the truth — these appointees were wrongly fired because
they don’t serve their extreme political agendas.

While I am glad to be able to make new exceptional appointments of public
servants who I know will do good work on behalf of the people of our
state, there is no excuse for Republicans firing good folks for no reason.

Politics isn’t about agendas or strict partisanship,
Derek, it's
about serving the people. The honorable public servants who I appoint are
dedicated to doing just that, and these attacks on their hard work are
both petty, and egregious.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2236?amount=&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.1&t=1008&akid=6661%2E1827488%2Eir4tCP ]Stand up against these attacks against democracy in Wisconsin and in
the Presidential race by pitching in what you can here.

Onward,

Tony

Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://go.tonyevers.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=6661%2E1827488%2Eir4tCP

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The cross stands at the center of our Faith
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWjrFr9iN_

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWjrFr9iN_

Hello
Friend,

As a
follower of Pathway to Victory, you might know that our mission
is to declare the truth of the gospel and empower believers to
share it with others.

That's
why I am excited to present our new book, The Power of the
Cross.This beautiful full-color 96-page large print "coffee-table
style" book explores the profound significance of Christ's
sacrifice by following His final week before the resurrection.
The Power of the Cross offers insights and reflections that will
deepen your appreciation for the foundational truths of your
faith and help you to share it with others.

What
better time than Easter to share your faith by encouraging others
and bringing up the next generation in Christ? You can get a copy
of this beautiful book while you celebrate Easter if you make a
generous donation to the ministry of Pathway to Victory.

Make your
secure donation today here:
https://secure.ptv.org/the_power_of_the_cross.

Our time
for sharing the message of Jesus and the power of the cross grows
shorter every day.

Let's
make the most of it by partnering together!

Sincerely,

Dr.
Robert Jeffress
Senior
Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

name: Bob Ferguson
subject: The stakes are high in Washington state
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
This campaign won’t be easy, friend.
| | |
---
Friend, it’s Attorney General Bob Ferguson, candidate for Washington Governor.

For the last three months, my campaign was prohibited from fundraising due to Washington’s legislative session fundraising freeze – _we literally could not accept a penny!_

This freeze did not apply to my opponent, anti-choice Republican Dave Reichert. While I was working to strengthen laws that protect our rights and keep us safe, he raised half a million dollars. _Doesn’t seem fair, does it? _
**[Here’s the good news: My fundraising freeze is finally over and I can once again accept donations! With so much at stake in this election, I need your help to rebuild our momentum and prepare for a close campaign. Will you make a $5 contribution to my campaign and Patty Murray right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81442376/462469081/143022106?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk259-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQwMDQ1Yi01OWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gy9k4aNormbPE-fnI3Rb__Do8Ki8Y5nUJxnus1hVILk=)**
With Donald Trump on the ballot, this Governor’s race is more important than ever. While I fight for Washingtonians, Reichert votes with Donald Trump. In fact, he aligned with Trump on 92.5% of the critical votes he cast in Congress. Dave Reichert lacked the political courage to stand up to Donald Trump.

In contrast, I challenged Trump and defeated him more than 50 times in court. I won critical victories to defend our environment, protect access to health care, prevent discrimination, and preserve voting rights.
This campaign won’t be easy, especially with the millions of dollars we expect the Republican Governors Association to spend on attack ads. They will stop at nothing to make anti-choice Republican and Trump-ally Dave Reichert our next Governor.
**[So please, make a donation to my campaign and Patty Murray now: $5 or anything you can give makes a difference and helps us work toward a victory this November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81442377/462469082/143022106?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk259-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQwMDQ1Yi01OWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gy9k4aNormbPE-fnI3Rb__Do8Ki8Y5nUJxnus1hVILk=)**
Thank you,

Bob Ferguson
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=FfaGai9oH4sw543B7IcpaWYZ7nOAYpUbOYUm%2F%2BhlGtBYEVq%2Fn1q4%2FkI8q%2BYiE10eNvxxxvKIjFQPxmJ20eaWA60GConC2DfDp0pRl0R6ab8%2BC6kykKLLs07rbLXmNc6tq6r1QVUXt5T4%2Ba1cGjqAYnS5qYmoXimKymvQn4BCl0tZSTbYapbtAyarj7eePyZskUw8XMaTdxW0PusxrjF2SMbYHn4CQTWhn4HHx6rvxQIyLKeahVEIVt0tvmISQnYDIfowLyPmltVN8p7jaBePhwdZTF6qEkNvUn8e5NpY6yCBgCuMMXs1d9zjLWI4xUUmW3M24%2F60XngwtNA8I1xYECNIqSy5fCIzXqSEv2NKjs4gQRWRYte9crR9WKB3Vc2vgx5s8gRoDiXkLJBoVy9bKM2fZajWgzP6Xpv9i%2Bs%2BuPfHDuOHLs8tzL2O7zx09F1I) People for Patty Murray

Friend -

Earlier this month, Kyrsten Sinema declared she was NOT going to run for re-election.
That means it's Ruben vs. Kari Lake.

And that's why we're asking you to donate $5 to our campaign today.

$5 to keep Kari Lake out of the Senate.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: BREAKING: Congressional spending bill lets children starve, I will vote NO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

The latest Congressional spending bill makes a critical stipulation regarding foreign aid, barring funding for the United Nations Relief and Works Agency for a year until March of 2025. The UNRWA is the main humanitarian aid agency operating in Gaza, providing food, healthcare, and other essential services to refugees, particularly children.

I will vote NO. With over one million Gazans on the brink of famine [https://www.cbsnews.com/video/world-food-programme-said-famine-is-imminent-in-gaza-if-aid-is-not-increased-exponentially/?ftag=CNM-16-10abd6g] , I will not support any bill that would ban aid to children dying of hunger.

Tell Congress: Support Funding for the UNRWA. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/unrwa-funding-petition?contactdata=K9DV1Zwe3yyTzD4mteCb72QFakQc2iaDGY8EC7tm+Ubf0JF1KWBUwClN7Nw8KR5wdZ4jYH059WnA51KTYNosZ/yvhJC6ahlxFBKt3/5+S0R5AuA8YYMrV2Y+XSzRfYeMP1E7jKf1t9djhNg0ejRXHA==]

https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1770865034433847368 [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1770865034433847368]

This isn’t about politics. It isn’t about taking sides. It’s about standing up for what’s right. The America I believe in must never be indifferent to the man-made starvation of children.

Sign if you agree: We must provide funding for the UNRWA and prevent a growing humanitarian crisis in Gaza. In solidarity,
Ro

name: Jason Miyares
subject: WATCH: Why I’m taking on the NCAA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
Peter, here’s how I’m fighting back—and winning. | | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this [link.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=e00846f3a3444482b9a14b9086b18be7&_t=KvRELViJijNd3hmwjBjEYYXbPbwPEGDyiFtRHzJigC_mwXOCXg1wzTBOmxY5v4RzN0QB_xkPXSt3do1JM6dQh1LkrdWWjRdBvkVpROz5DN4%3D)
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e00846f3a3444482b9a14b9086b18be7&_e=knu3aKc7Wb1ct6wlLn6gy9N6poDbEbL7a1X6cyRXGDR42mOtWc58TvjMYg2vNDknlpGGT3RDIU6jPIO2XDLju16L1SDcomPyStLdxdVMbYkAqUqoN0tA6mcwRKr7F8D0EJcCC60jyslh0KbucwNJFBnbN2wOnF0Q6FzVWFWWOq-jYTJyR4nAopSuP7RY_IwYRR1eOtYnK6F16CzfoxGfpdsvq15yRSkiGf6XIqgPPyLat-KHrDOzgRzR6fSUEz7Eh7wPDzyAgm-ESAqFarLatIMiKNm_D_734fSsoQGdG5t7h-oiGy-1IDCqFUF97etclzkf3YQOwIYvkWo9NBoaECBWhpTzU7OSFM9zFsKEXtwC5fPRcgB_E30ecw15UM18l78sCIQT7FNW1XgI7N4UILlRNnU51wk4xbExVzD39h0%3D)
---
Peter, There’s a cartel operating in America, and it’s operating in plain sight. You know it by its initials: NCAA. **I’m fighting back against the NCAA — and Peter, I’m building a case that’s going to win.** Here’s what’s happening:
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e00846f3a3444482b9a14b9086b18be7&_e=knu3aKc7Wb1ct6wlLn6gy9N6poDbEbL7a1X6cyRXGDR42mOtWc58TvjMYg2vNDknlpGGT3RDIU6jPIO2XDLju16L1SDcomPyStLdxdVMbYkAqUqoN0tA6mcwRKr7F8D0EJcCC60jyslh0KbucwNJFBnbN2wOnF0Q6FzVWFWWOq-jYTJyR4nAopSuP7RY_IwYRR1eOtYnK6F16CzfoxGfpdsvq15yRSkiGf6XIqgPPyLat-KHrDOzgRzR6fSUEz7Eh7wPDzyAgm-ESAqFarLatMh1xnKstYmVP2D_UQUqhoRjz2yP_Wq2z3LGNv1FJXMo3UyPQd3MwpPBq1IsHXir0fvPI20_EIdtLvZ4BEggDnennjfYg16g3luqzPisopzqb_qOCFS5s7GcnsPkVaFxFVC_WR3HnLQeIQGXwKKC02o%3D)
---
[**WATCH NOW**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e00846f3a3444482b9a14b9086b18be7&_e=knu3aKc7Wb1ct6wlLn6gy9N6poDbEbL7a1X6cyRXGDR42mOtWc58TvjMYg2vNDknlpGGT3RDIU6jPIO2XDLju16L1SDcomPyStLdxdVMbYkAqUqoN0tA6mcwRKr7F8D0EJcCC60jyslh0KbucwNJFBnbN2wOnF0Q6FzVWFWWOq-jYTJyR4nAopSuP7RY_IwYRR1eOtYnK6F16CzfoxGfpdsvq15yRSkiGf6XIqgPPyLat-KHrDOzgRzR6fSUEz7Eh7wPDzyAgm-ESAqFarLatFUFAhSx9Yi2HakQiqUFrm6CeG-r8oeNU6ETKuKwOoSjd6wWkYVjRVPqQOsigIh796zzl-MpYEi9UMx_8rV_Sad4fQfj4PIj25KAaC-fIwLEPvmI96r0p7ZwikaZ9SmrrMI29f5I0O9ZJJLyyEfiYPM%3D)
---
| | Student athletes put in countless hours of hard work, sacrifice and determination and generate millions of dollars for the NCAA, its members, and corporations within the college sports industry. It's only fair that these athletes should have the freedom and capability to negotiate and benefit from their talents. **The NCAA has taken advantage of talented young athletes for too long. subject: I wanted to share this Bible verse with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d956b3e52b21428885d204ab8ed51bd9&_e=39tLsFJ9DOYwehGW_ZB_jPEdiWGU7fkDBs0k3q0JIvkautwldupYDwbIqejf90LEtElnN1i7oeFxoxH1-BJ50kyTj1YdplJ_3ue1qCON8ylNB-LRIJgv21bTgC80bpM_3vG4xq8a8ZOvcLqQCqJs2sGqWN8zdZ3s0FuZYJTi7LsEwfjdGaJlOF3P3QGw06rOilTueNJoTwiK6aSmQht0gL6BzEPoNXftnJ3ux2WN__CeGFw1OinJTMiSSrXo1wCi5i8KjR_R6TGd7r1bp5c3bzPnK3vRnsrLMGAmxY1rd5299Ho_EpN6u9AurmQ8ce0N)

Fellow American,

I've been thinking about this Bible verse a lot lately:

_" Then Peter and the other apostles answered and said, We ought to obey God rather than men" \- Acts 5:29_

I think it's a lesson a lot of politicians could take to heart.

Too many members of Congress have completely lost sight of what we were put here to do, Fellow American. Instead of defending our God-given freedoms, they want to take them away for power and riches.

Corrupt leaders like Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer have completely abandoned our American values and taken God out of the equation.

**It 's time to bring Faith back to America.**

[**Do you stand with me?**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d956b3e52b21428885d204ab8ed51bd9&_e=39tLsFJ9DOYwehGW_ZB_jPEdiWGU7fkDBs0k3q0JIvkautwldupYDwbIqejf90LEtElnN1i7oeFxoxH1-BJ50kyTj1YdplJ_3ue1qCON8ylNB-LRIJgv21bTgC80bpM_3vG4xq8a8ZOvcLqQCqJs2ja1f-n3qfNLUemMBgSn_5OFuiBZWJjfRRQzaAqWsEKF9k5LIV0snfQ7ZjvP5jE3xcXmQQd0xCqETc6g-Yzrkl1XiCP1GUxjpk5fhe6Yoq_ZWMRuGEslT1s9KOiRtj32ebgmodrgl3TqHuWgbnIAzxAhCLwyKqy3gA_yZyQlSKMS)

---

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley wants to decide if and how you build a family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
It’s weird. It’s creepy. And it sure as hell isn’t his job.
#
Peter,
**Josh Hawley is obsessed with controlling every aspect of our lives.**
He wants to control what happens in your bedroom, in your doctor’s office, and your body. He even wants to decide if and how you build a family.
**It’s weird. It’s creepy. And it sure as hell isn’t his job.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44700?refcode=em20240322-5103&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5103%2E614464%2Ej0X_xN)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44700?refcode=em20240322-5103&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5103%2E614464%2Ej0X_xN)**
**I’m running to defeat Josh Hawley because I believe a senator’s job is to represent people — not to rule over them or tell them how to live.**
Everyday Missourians should be empowered to make decisions about their own bodies, families, and lives without corrupt politicians like Hawley getting in the way. **That’s why, when I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight to codify Roe v. Wade, restore abortion access, and protect reproductive rights in our country FOREVER.**
**[Will you help me get it done by rushing a donation of any amount to my grassroots campaign today? The national insiders backing Hawley are doing everything they can to tear me down, but I know this grassroots team is ready to fight back, defeat Josh Hawley, and flip this U.S. Senate seat on November 5.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44700?refcode=em20240322-5103&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5103%2E614464%2Ej0X_xN)**

Election day is right around the corner, and we’ll only see success if we all work together. \- Team Reichert Dave Reichert is Running to Change what's wrong, Fix what's broken, and Do what's right. | Paid for by We Stand With Dave Reichert (R) P.O. Box 1994 Tacoma, WA 98401 Copyright (C) 2024 We Stand With Dave Reichert (R), All rights reserved.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: If you knew
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It may sound like an exaggeration, but your $5 has the power to save someone’s life
#

If you knew that your $5 could help get the next major gun safety law passed, [**wouldn’t you donate it right away?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240322-1-30&t=1&akid=7810%2E3935704%2E2O84o-)
If you knew that your $5 went directly towards organizing, lobbying, education, advertising, research, and supporting gun safety candidates—all with a mission to end our nation’s gun violence epidemic—[**wouldn’t you chip in $5 right away?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240322-1-30&t=2&akid=7810%2E3935704%2E2O84o-)
If you knew that your $5 had the power to save someone’s life, [**wouldn’t it be the best $5 you could ever spend?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240322-1-30&t=3&akid=7810%2E3935704%2E2O84o-)
We know that may sound like an exaggeration, but it’s the truth. People are alive today because of the lifesaving laws that GIFFORDS has helped pass at the federal level and in states across the country.
But there’s still far more to be done. People die from preventable sgun violence each and every day in America. We must keep fighting until every single person in our nation can live freely without the threat of gun violence in their communities.
[**So please, contribute $5 today. Your support directly fuels our work toward a future free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240322-1-30&t=4&akid=7810%2E3935704%2E2O84o-)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action

In what has already proven to be a tough year for women, we are happy to report some good news from a few of our races across America! | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81449366/462489146/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240322wins_N_HT_90DO_9_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyNWE4YTViLTYwZTgtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WWN9EZ0zGUYDRbAyaa88VY6NSkBpHJ2ltHlYEXpXu9U=)

Hi Peter,

Primary elections are in full swing across the nation, and we are thrilled to announce that some of our phenomenal candidates have already won their elections! Here are just a few of our latest victories:

[**We are thrilled to share these victories with you. As you know, they would not be possible without supporters like you. We fund almost all of our support programs from the grassroots contributions that come in from emails like this one. Help us support our candidates as they head into their general elections by donating $20.24 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81449368/462489147/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240322wins_N_HT_90DO_9_NG_N_L1&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyNWE4YTViLTYwZTgtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WWN9EZ0zGUYDRbAyaa88VY6NSkBpHJ2ltHlYEXpXu9U=)

✅ **Molly Cook (Texas Senate District 15) progressed to the Democratic primary runoff, which will be taking place on May 28, 2024:** Molly is an ER nurse, community organizer, and advocate for sustainability. She recognizes that Texas needs a bold leader who is willing to stand up for the women in her state – now more than ever, given Texas’s brutal abortion ban. If elected, she has plans to support statewide grassroots organizing within the Texas Senate to move the needle on abortion access. She is determined to reduce interpersonal violence, gun violence, and maternal mortality rates (especially in Black communities and communities of color), and more.

✅ **Allie Phillips (TN House of Representatives, District 75) will officially be on the ballot against her extremist, anti-abortion opponent this November** – In a state with a brutal abortion ban, Allie’s top issue is reproductive healthcare. After Allie was forced to leave the state for a medically necessary life-saving abortion, her representative, Rep. Jeff Burkhart (R), responded to her by saying that If his own daughter had been in Phillips’s position, he’d have wanted her to continue the pregnancy. He also said he didn’t realize miscarriages could occur after a first-time pregnancy... Allie is running for HIS SEAT in the TN House of Representatives, in a district that Democrats have identified as **_flippable._**

✅ **Nadia Farjood was elected to the San Diego County Democratic Party Central Committee:** Nadia believes that every person should have access to the full range of reproductive health care services, including access to safe and legal abortion services, and that public funding is critical to achieving that access. In addition to her new role in her community, she will also be up against a 71-year-old Republican male incumbent for a seat on the Grossmont Healthcare District Board. Her fight continues, but we’re very excited about her victory earlier this month.

✅ **April Van Dyke (Superior Court Judge for the County of Humboldt) won her election!** As of last year, there were only 2 female judges on the bench in Humboldt County. April ran against an incumbent male judge who recently had a case settled with the county for harassment. She endured far too much harassment throughout her campaign and told us that her thick skin served her well. (But, of course, at Her Bold Move, we believe that women candidates shouldn’t have to deal with harassment while running for office.) She won her election and is now the first openly queer judge in Humboldt County!

**We are preparing to endorse 25 NEW candidates before primary season ends. We’ve been having conversations with terrific candidates across the country – and in almost all 50 states! We are looking forward to announcing the latest additions to our roster in the coming weeks.**

[**Would you like to get a head start on supporting our upcoming endorsements as well as the candidates listed above as they head into their general elections? If so, please chip in $20.24 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81449369/462489148/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240322wins_N_HT_90DO_9_NG_N_L2&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyNWE4YTViLTYwZTgtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WWN9EZ0zGUYDRbAyaa88VY6NSkBpHJ2ltHlYEXpXu9U=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.24 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81449370/462489149/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240322wins_N_HT_90DO_9_NG_N_EB20.24&express_lane=true&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyNWE4YTViLTYwZTgtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WWN9EZ0zGUYDRbAyaa88VY6NSkBpHJ2ltHlYEXpXu9U=)

name: Elect Women HQ
subject: Trump just endorsed our opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
Split a donation between Elissa's campaign and EMILYs List |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81450559/462492858/2053923391?sourceid=1053229&refcode=WTEFHO49_20240322_SlotkinSplit_ND_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzU1ZjUwZS02MWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rTN6UrIHbISvOUFPN9bpstpIAROljwBXL2mSS3MmLe0=) Peter,

$5, one time.

That is the donation we are asking you to make to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for U.S. Senate in Michigan and EMILYs List today.

Last week, Donald Trump endorsed Republican candidate Mike Rogers in this U.S. Senate race. We'll look back at this moment as a major inflection point in this race, and one where Elissa needs your help if we're going to win.

**If that's all you need to hear, use this link to donate directly to Elissa Slotkin's campaign and EMILYs List today:**

**[https://go.emilyslist.org/stop-trump](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81450560/462492859/2053923391?sourceid=1053229&refcode=WTEFHO49_20240322_SlotkinSplit_ND_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzU1ZjUwZS02MWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rTN6UrIHbISvOUFPN9bpstpIAROljwBXL2mSS3MmLe0=)** Here's why this moment is so important and why we're asking for that $5 donation today.

$5 because Trump's endorsement was a big open question in this crowded primary. Now that he's weighed in, it means a good chunk of the Republican Party is sure to unify around Mike Rogers, opening doors to fundraising and volunteers that didn't exist before.

$5 because Trump's endorsement is an acknowledgement of how important Michigan is to his success — something we've always known about the importance of the state to Democrats' chances of holding the U.S. Senate and White House.

$5 because now that Trump is paying attention to this race, the attacks against Elissa are sure to ramp up and we'll need your help to fight back.

It's ironic, because Mike Rogers criticized Donald Trump for a long time. He criticized him on _CNN_ for years and called him "more gangster than presidential." Today, without shame, he eagerly accepted his endorsement. He did it because he'll do anything to get elected and he won't stop there.

Mike Rogers has Trump. Elissa has you. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: "pre-existing condition"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2275%2E35263%2E9hU9x-)
Tomorrow is the 14th Anniversary of the _Affordable Care Act_ , one of the most transformative pieces of legislation for people with pre-existing conditions. For people like me. When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents, who raised me, began looking for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future. But they couldn’t find such a policy because of my previous illness. Not from any insurer. Not at any price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child labeled with those words: **"pre-existing condition."** I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and that they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that. Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed, many of us could be denied coverage. Now, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plan up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need. **But if Eric Hovde flips this seat and secures the Senate majority for Republicans, the _Affordable Care Act_ will be on the chopping block and countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules.** The people of Wisconsin did not send me to Washington to take people’s health care away, which is why I've fought against Republican repeal efforts and why I will never back down. But I can’t defend the hard-fought progress we’ve made without your help. **[So before the ACA’s 14th anniversary, I’m humbly asking: Will you make a donation to my reelection campaign to defend our Senate majority? That’s the only way we’ll prevent Republicans from rolling back the progress we’ve made expanding access to affordable health care.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-mar24.lt590f&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240322_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2275%2E35263%2E9hU9x-)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-mar24.gV3I8k&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240322_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2275%2E35263%2E9hU9x-)

| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3667?c0=tbe-em-mar24.XGqY3W&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240322_AM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=2275%2E35263%2E9hU9x-)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2591?c0=tbe-em-mar24.QeEeLz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240322_AM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=2275%2E35263%2E9hU9x-)
---
I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place. My experience has always inspired my work to do everything I can to make sure that every American has quality, affordable health care coverage and stand up against those who want to take it away.
As long as you're with me, I know we can overcome any challenge we may face on the road ahead and stop Republicans from taking away health insurance from millions of Americans once and for all.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=2275%2E35263%2E9hU9x-) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=2275%2E35263%2E9hU9x-)**

| | **Budzinski announces $9.4 million for six Metro East projects**
_— Illinois Business Journal, March 18, 2024 _
* * *
_“Last week, I was proud to join colleagues on both sides of the aisle to pass a government funding deal that will provide critical federal resources to six projects in the Metro East,” said Congresswoman Budzinski. “With more than $9.4 million headed to the region, I’m excited to see progress on efforts to support local youth, improve housing options and rebuild critical infrastructure across our communities.”_ | [PITCH IN TO DEFEND IL-13](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81451000/462494302/888116784?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240322_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmFkMmFmNi02MmU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-OLQ8r5mKoCQF0lF4fTPVfXerk0jsD3WAgsv3qS4yDA=)

At a time when petty, partisan politics can often be the roadblock to progress for our communities, Nikki is hard at work and actually **_delivering_** on an agenda that works for all of us.
Thanks to Nikki’s bipartisan work in the House, over $130 million in project funding is on its way to IL-13, investing in infrastructure needs across the district as well as investing in programs for our veterans and youth and affordable housing for everyday families.
This is an agenda that works for the everyday families of Central and Southern Illinois. But out-of-state, extreme conservative groups will spend MILLIONS of dollars to try and flip this seat.
[**In order to secure the House majority that continues to deliver for everyday Americans, we HAVE to defend Nikki’s seat this November. clean_body: | = | | Budzinski announces $9.4 million for six Metro East projects — Illinois Business Journal, March 18, 2024 “Last week, I was proud to join colleagues on both sides of the aisle to pass a government funding deal that will provide critical federal resources to six projects in the Metro East,” said Congresswoman Budzinski. “With more than $9.4 million headed to the region, I’m excited to see progress on efforts to support local youth, improve housing options and rebuild critical infrastructure across our communities.” | = At a time when petty, partisan politics can often be the roadblock to progress for our communities, Nikki is hard at work and actually delivering on an agenda that works for all of us. Thanks to Nikki’s bipartisan work in the House, over $130 million in project funding is on its way to IL-13, investing in infrastructure needs across the district as well as investing in programs for our veterans and youth and affordable housing for everyday families. This is an agenda that works for the everyday families of Central and Southern Illinois. But out-of-state, extreme conservative groups will spend MILLIONS of dollars to try and flip this seat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = The thing is — we’re only four seats away from a House majority that can actually deliver an agenda for working people. With your support we can defend this frontline seat and get back to work. — Team Nikki | = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

subject: Sign: Tell Republicans to grow a backbone and stand up to Trump!
body:
| | | | |

| | |
# [Sign: Tell Republicans to stop being cowards, and stand up to Trump NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T208be593-367d-470f-938a-120609677f94/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40155ac7-3119-4494-bcce-1ceb09d873f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | America is slow-walking into a dictatorship, because Republican leaders in Congress and elsewhere don't have the guts to stand up to Trump. No doubt, many support him and his horrible rhetoric and actions. But many know better, disagree with him, but are too chicken to stand up to him and his followers. NOW is the time to break with Trump, and help prevent him from getting near the White House again. And NOW is the time for Republicans to finally show some courage, and help prevent this disaster. [**Add your name: Tell Republicans to stop being cowards, and stand up to Trump NOW >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd1a2824-dbcc-4aa9-977f-2065041d6a34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
We are just 9 days away from the most critical quarterly deadline of 2024, and here’s why it matters so much to our success in winning this campaign. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81451635/462496262/41388607?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240322_AM1_T2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTYyYjZhZDctNjNlOC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WSzK8_6kPf0-NubaT1WuZvMQdg8j9KFcQ-yemRppsI4=)
---
Peter, thanks to the continued support of so many thousands of you, we’ve had historic momentum by our side this entire race. But now we are just nine days away from the most important fundraising deadline of all of 2024 and need your help more than ever. **[Read on as to why, but please chip in...](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81451638/462496265/1533630535?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240322_AM1_T2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTYyYjZhZDctNjNlOC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WSzK8_6kPf0-NubaT1WuZvMQdg8j9KFcQ-yemRppsI4=)** Together, we’ve outraised David Schweikert in every quarter since launch – the only challenger in America to do that. We have broken the Arizona fundraising record for the year before the election. And we’ve done that without taking a penny from corporate PACs and with most of our contributions coming from people giving $100 or less. Why does this matter? We’re not raising money for its own sake. We’re doing it because we need to get our message out to voters – at their doors, in their mailboxes, and on their television screens. If we are able to tell people about the real contrast between me and David Schweikert, _we will win._ For nearly a year, we’ve been building up our war chest. And now, in the coming weeks, we are going to start putting those dollars to use. Nine days from now, at the end of the first quarter filing period, my campaign manager, Emma Gore, will be making decisions on how many ads we can buy, how many pieces of mail we can print, and how many pieces of literature we can print. **This isn’t about raising money to fund our campaign down the road. This is about right now. Crunch time is here.** **[That’s why I need your help, Peter: We’re still short of where we should be, and our FEC deadline is just nine days away. Can I count on you to make a grassroots contribution today to help me get back on track before the reporting period ends?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81451640/462496267/1533630535?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240322_AM1_T2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTYyYjZhZDctNjNlOC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WSzK8_6kPf0-NubaT1WuZvMQdg8j9KFcQ-yemRppsI4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81451642/462496273/1533630535?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240322_AM1_T2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTYyYjZhZDctNjNlOC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WSzK8_6kPf0-NubaT1WuZvMQdg8j9KFcQ-yemRppsI4=)

clean_body: We are just 9 days away from the most critical quarterly deadline of 2024, and here’s why it matters so much to our success in winning this campaign. | = Peter, thanks to the continued support of so many thousands of you, we’ve had historic momentum by our side this entire race. But now we are just nine days away from the most important fundraising deadline of all of 2024 and need your help more than ever. = Together, we’ve outraised David Schweikert in every quarter since launch – the only challenger in America to do that. We have broken the Arizona fundraising record for the year before the election. And we’ve done that without taking a penny from corporate PACs and with most of our contributions coming from people giving $100 or less. Why does this matter? We’re not raising money for its own sake. We’re doing it because we need to get our message out to voters – at their doors, in their mailboxes, and on their television screens. If we are able to tell people about the real contrast between me and David Schweikert, we will win. For nearly a year, we’ve been building up our war chest. And now, in the coming weeks, we are going to start putting those dollars to use. Nine days from now, at the end of the first quarter filing period, my campaign manager, Emma Gore, will be making decisions on how many ads we can buy, how many pieces of mail we can print, and how many pieces of literature we can print. This isn’t about raising money to fund our campaign down the road. This is about right now. Crunch time is here. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Our March 31st deadline is the one that our campaign and others will be looking to in order to make critical decisions. = In your service, Andrei Andrei for Arizona PO Box 26058 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States ** | mailto:info@andreiforarizona.com | Paid for by Andrei for Arizona | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U.S. Navy Reserves. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Navy Reserves, the Department of the Navy, or the Department of Defense. ---|---

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: It's a battle.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Senator Jacky Rosen. I'll get right to it: **_CNN_ says Nevada is one of the most likely Senate seats in the _entire country_ to flip red.

[To prevent that, I need you with me: Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between my campaign and the DSCC – to help win my battleground race and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/12711?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240322-JackyRosen-RosenBattleForBattlegroundsTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240322-JackyRosen-RosenBattleForBattlegroundsTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=14013%2E9716520%2ERzQvhj)**

Republican megadonors are coming for our Senate majority across the country. They're gearing up to spend _millions_ to elevate their preferred candidates and defeat Democrats _all over_.**From Pennsylvania to Wisconsin to right here in Nevada,_it's a battle for the battlegrounds._**

And Senate control isn’t the only thing on the line. A Republican-led Senate would _immediately_ get to work rolling back the progress we've made for working families. They’ll enact their own far-right agenda if they win, so failure isn’t an option.

We MUST defend our progress, and that starts by keeping Nevada and our Senate majority blue. We’ve got to work together – and I'm counting on you.

**What we do now could very well determine if we hold the Senate this year, so I'm personally asking:[Will you split $5 between my campaign and the DSCC today? With the GOP coming after Democrats in Senate races across the map, we need to band together in this critical moment.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12711?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240322-JackyRosen-RosenBattleForBattlegroundsTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240322-JackyRosen-RosenBattleForBattlegroundsTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=14013%2E9716520%2ERzQvhj)**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: The team that will win in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
I believe that we can. But I can’t do it alone. So today, I’m asking you, very humbly, to make a donation to my campaign.
Peter, when I was first thinking about launching this campaign last year I had no idea what to expect.
I knew I had some supporters from my congressional campaigns that I could count on, but beyond that it was a shot in the dark.
One thing I knew for sure was that whether this was a 2-way race, a 3-way race, a 27-way race, whatever — I was going to need the support of a huge grassroots team behind me. Over the last year we’ve built that team, with close to 150,000 individual donors.
And now we know: Sinema’s out. **This race is a head-to-head between me and Kari Lake. And we've got to expand out that grassroots team and build a coalition here in Arizona that can defeat her. **
I believe that we can. But I can’t do it alone. So today, I’m asking you, very humbly, to make a donation to my campaign.
[_**Please, split a $5 or $10 donation between Upset the Setup and my campaign. Whatever you can afford can help us build the team that’s going to win in Arizona. clean_body: I believe that we can. But I can’t do it alone. So today, I’m asking you, very humbly, to make a donation to my campaign. Peter, when I was first thinking about launching this campaign last year I had no idea what to expect. I knew I had some supporters from my congressional campaigns that I could count on, but beyond that it was a shot in the dark. One thing I knew for sure was that whether this was a 2-way race, a 3-way race, a 27-way race, whatever — I was going to need the support of a huge grassroots team behind me. Over the last year we’ve built that team, with close to 150,000 individual donors. And now we know: Sinema’s out. This race is a head-to-head between me and Kari Lake. And we've got to expand out that grassroots team and build a coalition here in Arizona that can defeat her. I believe that we can. But I can’t do it alone. So today, I’m asking you, very humbly, to make a donation to my campaign. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thanks a lot for this. I really appreciate it. Fellow Conservative,

[**ADD YOUR NAME** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5d82da35dbdc463c8321999443d36e01&_e=RsSPdQmSK5-Q5jlG9PltlEElIdNSGNOCJjub8zmhqCcK9HU4-SJaR3643jXVeynPMuwrJ6L3Nq18CLV-pyFL_D1yOPJ9eIysXvYs3oN0fo5b-mG2VzckRIjuDW5gqSgLbS7da3n0IDWTqBR6HYbIy_6Oo0mybblZ-cVt_g6UVdxTKGxwVex-S2VpmUIn627Fr7GJ3EOtwwyQEANR1hyZ-JOq3_sidkHUNXCz1f-SQ1BTjiupOBPltUmv16RDY8Ag1Rwiro55K6AHHKEvIsFmbcJITq6pJHFdzQ7Tliik2Zf2M6itGBVSUR3SmEMkNLeBC0DfDp6bV1DIwBiwu-SIFWAsDKPTSNvnqzXH4uIdzT3w0APfOsyDQ10Qdl00oMt2L0tSNGvN-SA5VqMuq7HIdg%3D%3D)
Despite Tim’s best efforts, he’s struggling to keep pace with what his opponent, lying Jon Tester, and his left-wing lunatic friends are collecting.

**_Tim Sheehy has fought and bled for our country in Afghanistan, Iraq, and many places in between. He’s the recipient of a Purple Heart. Tim is a job creator who cares about his state, making it a point to hire veterans at his company whenever the opportunity presents itself._**

On the other hand, Jon Tester has spent most of his days on an organic “dirt farm,” figuring out how best to make his lobbyist friends fat and happy.

**[I need you to know that I’m sending you this note today because Tim needs serious assistance.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5d82da35dbdc463c8321999443d36e01&_e=RsSPdQmSK5-Q5jlG9PltlEElIdNSGNOCJjub8zmhqCcK9HU4-SJaR3643jXVeynPMuwrJ6L3Nq18CLV-pyFL_D1yOPJ9eIysXvYs3oN0fo5b-mG2VzckRIjuDW5gqSgLbS7da3n0IDWTqBR6HYbIy_6Oo0mybblZ-cVt_g6UVdxTKGxwVex-S2VpmUIn627Fr7GJ3EOtwwyQEANR1hyZ-JOq3_sidkHUNXCz1f-SQ1BTjiupOBPltUmv16RDY8AgIHIH_s7iia8GZgcHvdFxTjy-puwKAXCZhb1SWptD89Fvf2nx6Km5rEoUlfjJXsqLKy1RUF96Pnp_9M6PFoPISws_KxLTfGIl3Sb169V6YrPItuyo1KROX_i-C-2iphjqofzGhmegW_xQ27hQAgRRMA%3D%3D)** Despite Jon Tester’s highly partisan voting record in a state my father won in 2020 by more than 16 points, he’s raising more than one million dollars per month, every month, online.

I’m lending my name to Tim’s fundraising efforts because his need is REAL and sustained. **[There is no better “flip” opportunity than in the Montana Senate race.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5d82da35dbdc463c8321999443d36e01&_e=RsSPdQmSK5-Q5jlG9PltlEElIdNSGNOCJjub8zmhqCcK9HU4-SJaR3643jXVeynPMuwrJ6L3Nq18CLV-pyFL_D1yOPJ9eIysXvYs3oN0fo5b-mG2VzckRIjuDW5gqSgLbS7da3n0IDWTqBR6HYbIy_6Oo0mybblZ-cVt_g6UVdxTKGxwVex-S2VpmUIn627Fr7GJ3EOtwwyQEANR1hyZ-JOq3_sidkHUNXCz1f-SQ1BTjiupOBPltUmv16RDY8AgzMBMTwr19Q21yy_gRBGXTIkelpW1XsA9NJma9_bY3aU7xdrmbjFV_l-9IT7Q3ss2LdIu-35Jf-Xve8v_UFm-oecTZCW-BuRlz2618OUZ03n8XepdqO5EExERfLF6yQ7QxS4FiyDgCHmpWGCblp_bVw%3D%3D) **

clean_body: As the mainstream media is no friend to my father, you may not have heard that he just endorsed Tim Sheehy in his campaign to become a United States Senator. | | If you're short on time and don't want to read this email in full, then the only thing I need from you today is for you to . If you need to hear more, my email continues below. Fellow Conservative, It’s Donald Trump Jr. You probably know me best as the son of President Donald Trump. I’m proud to be his namesake and carry on the tradition of such a great man. However, I am contacting you today on behalf of Tim Sheehy, who is running to become Montana's next great conservative senator. As the mainstream media is no friend to my father, you may not have heard that he just endorsed Tim Sheehy in his campaign to become a United States Senator. Knowing that fact, he has tasked me with getting the word out to grassroots conservatives nationwide, including you! If you don’t live in Montana, you might ask yourself: It’s an honest question. I’m writing about United States Senate candidateTim Sheehy because my father firmly believes he is a CRUCIAL part of the solution to saving our nation and getting this country back on track. Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL (VERY RARE), an extremely successful businessman, and a husband and father to four beautiful children. You might say that Tim Sheehy embodies everything great about America, everything that Democrats, like his opponent, Jon Tester, want to destroy. If you’re short on time and prefer not to read to the end, As you know, the balance of power in the United States Senate hangs by the thinnest of margins. A Democrat majority means MORE TAXES, MORE IRS MEDDLING INTO OUR PERSONAL FINANCES, MORE GOVERNMENT, MORE BUREAUCRACY, MORE OPEN BORDERS, MORE NATIONAL DEBT, MORE “WOKE” PROGRESSIVE NONSENSE INFILTRATING EVERY ASPECT OF OUR LIVES and MORE WITCH HUNTS AGAINST MY FATHER FOR THE CRIME OF DRAINING THE WASHINGTON D.C. SWAMP! Despite Tim’s best efforts, he’s struggling to keep pace with what his opponent, lying Jon Tester, and his left-wing lunatic friends are collecting. Tim Sheehy has fought and bled for our country in Afghanistan, Iraq, and many places in between. He’s the recipient of a Purple Heart. Tim is a job creator who cares about his state, making it a point to hire veterans at his company whenever the opportunity presents itself. On the other hand, Jon Tester has spent most of his days on an organic “dirt farm,” figuring out how best to make his lobbyist friends fat and happy. Despite Jon Tester’s highly partisan voting record in a state my father won in 2020 by more than 16 points, he’s raising more than one million dollars per month, every month, online. I’m lending my name to Tim’s fundraising efforts because his need is REAL and sustained. I’m very proud to join my father in supporting genuine American heroes called to serve in government - heroes like Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy. I hope you’ll do me the favor and donate to his campaign today. name: Ben Wikler, Chair of WisDems
subject: I’m worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
We can’t let Trump win this November
#
We saw some pretty scary poll numbers come out this month showing that Donald Trump could very well win this November.
And I’ll be honest with you, that scares me.
After Donald Trump incited an insurrection, attacked our democracy, destroyed our credibility on the world stage, and pushed an extreme agenda that hurt working families, it seems almost unbelievable that he could win again.
I want to be clear here – polls in March don’t mean all that much come November. And a lot can happen in the next 8 months.
But the reality is this: **_Donald Trump could win in 2024. But he can’t win without Wisconsin.**_
That’s why we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us make key investments in organization, mobilization, and voter outreach heading into November.
**[Will you chip in a $5 split donation between the WisDems and The Long Run right now to keep Donald Trump out of the White House?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em240322-1-tt&t=1&akid=5248%2E196590%2EqYMSi5)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically evenly split between The Democratic Party of Wisconsin and The Long Run PAC_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.swMvtB&refcode=em240322-1-tt&t=20&akid=5248%2E196590%2EqYMSi5)
[Express Donate: $23](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3439?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.RM9Xj7&refcode=em240322-1-tt&t=21&akid=5248%2E196590%2EqYMSi5)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.zkrtZA&refcode=em240322-1-tt&t=22&akid=5248%2E196590%2EqYMSi5)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.B1zxC_&refcode=em240322-1-tt&t=23&akid=5248%2E196590%2EqYMSi5)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.jgEQ-M&refcode=em240322-1-tt&t=24&akid=5248%2E196590%2EqYMSi5)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em240322-1-tt&t=25&akid=5248%2E196590%2EqYMSi5)
Thank you for being a part of our team,
Ben Wikler, WisDems Chair

name: Stop Funding Netanyahu's War via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: While the GOP listens to Netanyahu, Bernie is pushing for Peace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

The GOP just held a closed door meeting with Benjamin Netanyahu as his
right-wing government continues bombing Gaza and restricting humanitarian
aid to Palestinians.

While Republicans are meeting with the man leading this horrific war,
Bernie Sanders is on the Senate floor advocating for an end to all
military support and funding for the war on Gaza. We demand no more U.S.
bombs and no more taxpayer dollars to support Netanyahu’s atrocities in
Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16296?source=email-20240322&t=1011&akid=5608%2E5885482%2Eb-9QiZ ]As Republicans cozy up with Netanyahu, it’s a critical time that we
stand with Bernie. Add your name to support Bernie’s relentless advocacy
for an end to U.S. support for the war on Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16296?source=email-20240322&t=1012&akid=5608%2E5885482%2Eb-9QiZ ]ADD YOUR NAME

Netanyahu is creating an unconscionable humanitarian situation in Gaza, as
CNN reports:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16297?t=1013&akid=5608%2E5885482%2Eb-9QiZ ][IMG]

Netanyahu’s regime is blocking food, water, and medical aid to Gaza, which
has led to over 1 million people facing starvation.

The last thing any Member of Congress — Republican or Democrat — should be
doing right now is embracing Netanyahu.

Congress and President Biden must wholesale stop considering $14 billion
more in funding for Israel and sending any more weapons to Netanyahu
(Biden has sent over $250 million in weapons to Israel since the start of
this war).

Bernie said this week, “We are witnessing unspeakable suffering in Gaza as
we speak. It’s time for the U.S. to stop asking Netanyahu to do the right
thing, and start telling him what must happen.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16296?source=email-20240322&t=1014&akid=5608%2E5885482%2Eb-9QiZ ]Stand with Bernie: Biden and Congress must end the humanitarian
disaster in Gaza and stop supporting this horrific war.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

[ ]ADD YOUR NAME Netanyahu is creating an unconscionable humanitarian situation in Gaza, as CNN reports: [ ][IMG] Netanyahu’s regime is blocking food, water, and medical aid to Gaza, which has led to over 1 million people facing starvation. The last thing any Member of Congress — Republican or Democrat — should be doing right now is embracing Netanyahu. Congress and President Biden must wholesale stop considering $14 billion more in funding for Israel and sending any more weapons to Netanyahu (Biden has sent over $250 million in weapons to Israel since the start of this war). Bernie said this week, “We are witnessing unspeakable suffering in Gaza as we speak. It’s time for the U.S. to stop asking Netanyahu to do the right thing, and start telling him what must happen.” [ ]Stand with Bernie: Biden and Congress must end the humanitarian disaster in Gaza and stop supporting this horrific war. When we organize, we win. Peter, we had a bit of a campaign setback last night and I’m
hoping I can count on your support to get us back on track.

A huge part of our grassroots outreach efforts is running digital ads,
because this competitive primary will be determined by how many
persuadable Democratic voters we’re able to reach over the next few weeks.

Digital ads lets us find and communicate with folks who might not have
heard our message yet — maybe all they’ve seen is a thousand TV ads for my
multi-millionaire opponent.

Those are voters we need to reach,
Peter, and that becomes even more
challenging when we miss fundraising benchmarks like last night’s Digital
Ads goal. I’d hate to have to cut back on our voter outreach plans this
week if we can’t turn things around.

name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: State Department rule violates religious beliefs
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Friend,

Christian relief organizations are in the
crosshairs of the U.S. State Department ... BECAUSE of their
Christian faith!

Will you stand with Christian Legal Society in
support of faith-based relief organizations today? Add your name
to our urgent open letter to the U.S. State Department.

Say NO to the State Department targeting Christian

The U.S. State Department has just proposed new
regulations that will cut off grants and contracts to
Christian-and all faith-based-relief organizations that require
their employees to share their faith and their religious values.

That means that relief organizations like
Samaritan's Purse, a Christian ministry that has helped millions
worldwide since its founding in 1970 ...

Humanitarian organizations like World Vision, which
has supported children in need and empowered millions of people
out of poverty for more than 70 years ...

And many thousands more faith-based ministry,
relief, and aid organizations of all sizes that do immeasurable
good work in God's name across the globe ...

May be forced to SCALE DOWN-or SHUT DOWN-their
operations, as they are unconstitutionally targeted for
de-funding because of their Christian faith.

Friend, Christian Legal Society is standing
alongside religious groups and ministries to oppose this
unconstitutional and immoral regulatory change from the U.S.
State Department. Will you add your name to our open letter to
join in this fight?

Say NO to the State Department targeting
Christians

Friend, no faith-based organization in America
today should be forced to reject biblical principles ... and
embrace the government's currently preferred social ideology ...
or risk scaling down or shutting down their operations.

Yet under the regulatory change that the U.S. State
Department has proposed, funding and contracts could be denied to
ANY group that has a statement of faith or policies that are true
to biblical values but counter to today's predominantly "woke"
social climate.

That means organizations that protect life instead
of promoting abortion, advocate for traditional marriage and
family, or follow biblical teaching on biological sex rather than
"gender ideology" are at risk of being targeted-and punished!-by
the U.S. government.

Please stand with Christian Legal Society to
express your strong opposition to the U.S. State Department
targeting Christian and all faith-based relief organizations on
the basis of their religious beliefs! Add your name to our urgent
open letter now.

Say NO to the State Department targeting
Christians

Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been
dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study
of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the
provision of legal aid to the needy.

And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's
Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the
response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced
all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life
in the public square.

This is one of the most urgent-and important-fights
that we face for religious freedom this year, and I am grateful
for concerned Americans like you coming alongside us to defend
Christian and all faith-based relief organizations in the battle
today.

Thank you for your prayers and for your
consideration.

David Nammo

Executive Director & CEO

Christian Legal Society

Christian Legal Society

P.O. Box 7712

McLean, VA 22106-7712

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

today@thefederalistwire.com
