| Hi friend,
I had a hunch that a lot more unites us than divides us. And your responses to the [Texas Survey I sent around on Monday](https://ckzq96gbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001USBN3bGH_zUqF7-x_RBJjWePJz6AtoGH-9rR5CUAlticblPY6gn3Pf7dfNNI-j8ChXcr9xIsssGJPLgTi8dtEw_R1KCyWIfwcqXEQK4svBIvsQQqwH3JrcBS0qr_0pSKWAo3tA1oXrLslc588JZnjf8HNzMvMmKdj42Kx0DbKSI=&c=MeUX3DXu5vfEbOQPoKlODQa_FL3qGuqwndPwktbFQrpTALgMEDjxsg==&ch=0Cm54WFnu0pKvkriZ6S5Rvf2aEtINQlySZs8prxCgeRd8Dv_MFLZ3Q==) make clear that's true.
There were a few exaggerations, of course. I've been a UT fan for decades, but I'm not sure that Longhorns football brings Texans together as universally as some responses suggested.
College sports aside, I was struck by how many of the responses were echoed time and again.
I was also struck by how, on the issues that bring most of us together, John Carter is reading from a different script. It just confirms what we already knew: John Carter is out of touch with what most people -- and certainly most people in District 31 -- want.
Here are a few examples from your responses:
---
| |
### "All Texans deserve healthcare."

Healthcare came up again and again in your responses, and for good reason: Texas has the most uninsured residents, and the highest percentage of uninsured residents, of any state in the country.
Five million Texans -- almost a million Texas children -- don't have health insurance. And Texans agree that we need to do something to fix this.
Not just that, Texans also agree on the something we need to do: More than 70% of us support expanding Medicaid to provide health insurance to low-income individuals.
Even beyond Medicaid, Texas has one of the highest enrollment rates in Affordable Care Act plans over the last few years. One in every nine Texans is now covered by a government-subsidized health plan.
Like most Texans, I support Medicaid expansion. I support the Affordable Care Act. And I believe that every Texan deserves quality medical care and the health insurance to pay for it.
Not so for John Carter.
Carter has repeatedly supported bills that would jeopardize Medicaid coverage for tens of millions of Americans. He voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Not just once or twice -- more than 60 times. And when that didn't work, he tried to replace the Affordable Care Act with a bill that would eliminate healthcare coverage for 2.5 million Texans and increase premiums by more than 10% for those fortunate enough to keep their coverage.
John Carter claims to represent the people of District 31, but he missed the memo on this one.
---
---
| |
### "The right to vote without obstacles or suppression."

A lot of people used a shorthand for this: democracy.
I don't have hard statistics on this, but I'm confident that most Americans support the right to vote -- and to have that vote counted in a free and fair election.
Until a few years ago, I wouldn't have thought this was a controversial position. But that was before Donald Trump lost the 2020 election and thought the only possible explanation was fraud. (Trump rejected, of course, the explanation that most voters just didn't want him to serve another term.)
My opponent John Carter bet all his chips on Trump's election-fraud theory, and he's been doubling down ever since.
Carter voted against certifying the 2020 election results. He voted against impeachment both times that Trump was impeached. And he opposed creating an independent committee to investigate Trump's incitement of the January 6 insurrection. In short, John Carter is an unapologetic election-denier.
Whatever else you might think about John Carter, at least he's consistent ... in his support for Donald Trump. But Trump doesn't unite us; he purposely divides us.
What John Carter dangerously refuses to recognize is a fundamental and universal truth about being American: It is our support for democracy and the rule of law that bind us together as citizens -- as one response put it, no one is above the law.
John Carter and Donald Trump might not be happy with that fact, but the rest of us are. It's one of the reasons we don't have a king any more.
---
---
| |
### "I hope Texan leaders work for the people, not only for their own party."

This was a theme that lots of folks echoed: We need leaders in Congress who honor the representative part of House of Representatives. John Carter doesn't do that.
John Carter is out of touch with what the residents of District 31 want and need. Even worse, he doesn't seem to care.
He has traded his responsibility to all of us to curry favor with someone who lives in Palm Beach, Florida. Trump isn't even Texan (thankfully). And unsurprisingly, many of our survey responders have just about had it with Carter's failed leadership.
Dozens of you wrote in to communicate your frustrations and to emphasize that it's past time TX-31 had real representation in Congress from leaders who can be trusted with the job at hand: governing.
I'm running for Congress to deliver the results that the people of District 31 -- and all across America, for that matter -- want, on the issues that matter most to them.
I believe that effective governing has little to do with one's party affiliation, and a lot to do with We the People. My promise to you: When elected to Congress, I'll never allow my party affiliation to prevent me from working to solve our nation's most pressing problems.
---
| It's going to be a hard fight between now and November 5.
The usual mix of D.C. insiders and defense contractors keep funneling money to Carter's campaign. (Looking at his top donors, you would never guess that -- in his words -- he's the top Republican on the Military Construction and Veterans Affairs Subcommittee on Appropriations and sits on the Defense Subcommittee...)
[I need your help to fight back.](https://ckzq96gbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001USBN3bGH_zUqF7-x_RBJjWePJz6AtoGH-9rR5CUAlticblPY6gn3Pf7dfNNI-j8C_9T2qe8Mp9l9zIFuoSNV96Le8qJhfRQwnyt6HFPzeyxfNEnY1FkjJ0kRcQKiml1xHnyXv0oa5YLe4sR0V9hv2QgAvrjxRaQhNxWCHkf0nDpQOio0XyOczGWkbxUo-TEC6U1gSppaZHwN8vR7SjMmGg==&c=MeUX3DXu5vfEbOQPoKlODQa_FL3qGuqwndPwktbFQrpTALgMEDjxsg==&ch=0Cm54WFnu0pKvkriZ6S5Rvf2aEtINQlySZs8prxCgeRd8Dv_MFLZ3Q==) And while I will never treat defense contracts like party favors to hand out to supporters, I can offer something that should be more important: honesty and integrity, and a voice that actually represents the people.
[Can you contribute today to help me beat John Carter in November?](https://ckzq96gbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001USBN3bGH_zUqF7-x_RBJjWePJz6AtoGH-9rR5CUAlticblPY6gn3Pf7dfNNI-j8C_9T2qe8Mp9l9zIFuoSNV96Le8qJhfRQwnyt6HFPzeyxfNEnY1FkjJ0kRcQKiml1xHnyXv0oa5YLe4sR0V9hv2QgAvrjxRaQhNxWCHkf0nDpQOio0XyOczGWkbxUo-TEC6U1gSppaZHwN8vR7SjMmGg==&c=MeUX3DXu5vfEbOQPoKlODQa_FL3qGuqwndPwktbFQrpTALgMEDjxsg==&ch=0Cm54WFnu0pKvkriZ6S5Rvf2aEtINQlySZs8prxCgeRd8Dv_MFLZ3Q==)

| With your help, we can bring representation back to the House of the Representatives.
---
| [](https://ckzq96gbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001USBN3bGH_zUqF7-x_RBJjWePJz6AtoGH-9rR5CUAlticblPY6gn3Pf7dfNNI-j8ChFG6Zm_e_tp3F9BTh55S-Ni1dzQ9B0OrjpSHaNiFAlnzh77aRoinJwr7qwMt00iOQ-PnFSb4jSocEeQI2hbYJzG25PqFAKKV05dfPHaseJiAUM0j3aGyVXscSkXi2nQiX0YTEVctlpzk72nWwvuOj2EjwuZjaOmH&c=MeUX3DXu5vfEbOQPoKlODQa_FL3qGuqwndPwktbFQrpTALgMEDjxsg==&ch=0Cm54WFnu0pKvkriZ6S5Rvf2aEtINQlySZs8prxCgeRd8Dv_MFLZ3Q==)

Democrat Stuart Whitlow is running to unseat Trump's ally in Congress, MAGA Republican John Carter. But the fight for TX-31 is going to take all of us.
That's why we need everyone in this movement. Our democracy is on the line, and we can't risk another two years of a MAGA majority in the U.S. House.

John Carter is out of touch with what the residents of District 31 want and need. Even worse, he doesn't seem to care. He has traded his responsibility to all of us to curry favor with someone who lives in Palm Beach, Florida. Trump isn't even Texan (thankfully). And unsurprisingly, many of our survey responders have just about had it with Carter's failed leadership. Dozens of you wrote in to communicate your frustrations and to emphasize that it's past time TX-31 had real representation in Congress from leaders who can be trusted with the job at hand: governing. I'm running for Congress to deliver the results that the people of District 31 -- and all across America, for that matter -- want, on the issues that matter most to them. I believe that effective governing has little to do with one's party affiliation, and a lot to do with We the People. My promise to you: When elected to Congress, I'll never allow my party affiliation to prevent me from working to solve our nation's most pressing problems. | It's going to be a hard fight between now and November 5. The usual mix of D.C. insiders and defense contractors keep funneling money to Carter's campaign. (Looking at his top donors, you would never guess that -- in his words -- he's the top Republican on the Military Construction and Veterans Affairs Subcommittee on Appropriations and sits on the Defense Subcommittee...) == And while I will never treat defense contracts like party favors to hand out to supporters, I can offer something that should be more important: honesty and integrity, and a voice that actually represents the people. == | | == | With your help, we can bring representation back to the House of the Representatives. | == | Stuart Whitlow Democrat for Congress, TX-31 | | | == Democrat Stuart Whitlow is running to unseat Trump's ally in Congress, MAGA Republican John Carter. But the fight for TX-31 is going to take all of us. That's why we need everyone in this movement. Our democracy is on the line, and we can't risk another two years of a MAGA majority in the U.S. House. | | == | | | | == == == | | | PAID FOR BY WHITLOW FOR CONGRESS | | | | | | | Whitlow for Congress | 910 Quest Parkway, Suite 6113, Cedar Park, TX 78613 | | Sent by mailto:victory@news.whitlowforcongress.com

Friend, On the first day of Ramadan, I got the news that my Sity (grandmother) Muftieh passed away. I feel like a part of me died too. She said she would wait for me a few years ago. She wanted me to come to Beit Ur El Foka and pick figs from the fig trees surrounding her modest home. She loved her farm (especially her chickens) with olive trees everywhere you looked. Sity loved helping other people who would stop by for water, tea, or a bite to eat. **She was Palestine for me.** Everything I love about Palestinians and being Palestinian myself she contained in her. She was tiny but had the biggest and kindest heart. Unfortunately the Israeli government blocked me from going to see her in the West Bank and I was unable to visit my Sity before she passed. But her spirit lives on in our work for a safer, more peaceful world. **In her memory, I hope you’ll join me in supporting an inspiring nonprofit organization that is providing young Palestinians in Gaza a chance to live and be cared for after enduring horrific violence.** HEAL Palestine is providing Health, Education, Aid, and Leadership opportunities in a collective effort to help heal Gaza’s youth―including the 17,000 children who have been orphaned over the past 5 months of genocide. I will keep pushing for the freedom and dignity of the Palestinian people and all people. I spoke up in Congress this week about how the Israeli government is intentionally starving children and families in Gaza, who are dying from extreme malnutrition. As more than 1 million people in Gaza are facing famine, Congress is preparing to vote to cut funding for UNRWA, the major organization providing desperately needed aid in Gaza.
Your donation to HEAL Palestine will help**** shelter, feed, and treat injured and sick Palestinians who have fled military violence, and who are in dire need of basic necessities including food, clean water, and medical supplies because of Israel’s cruel blockade.
**Right now, HEAL is working to open a neonatal intensive care unit (NICU) and a new maternity department in Rafah, plus sponsoring medical teams to go to Gaza.**
In addition to funding urgent needs, your donation will support long-term solutions and projects in Palestine as well, such as mental health and mentorship for children who’ve been living with trauma their entire lives, and programs to rebuild Gaza’s education and health systems.

I would not have been able to buy my own birth control 52 years ago. That's less time than Sen. John Fetterman has been alive! You see, today is the anniversary of Eisenstadt v. Baird – the Supreme Court case that overturned a Massachusetts law that said only _married_ couples could get birth control. And married couples only gained the freedom to get birth control in 1965, thanks to the Supreme Court's ruling in Griswold v. Connecticut. **That ruling? That's one that far-right Justice Clarence Thomas said should be “reconsidered” just like he "reconsidered" our freedom to abortion care.** We all know what that means. MAGA Republicans are sending a clear message: It's not just abortion. Birth control, IVF, LGBTQ+ equality – it's ALL in danger. I wouldn't be in this race if I had ANY hope that Brian Fitzpatrick would do the right thing and protect these basic freedoms. But Fitzpatrick's proven over and over again that he's a fake moderate who will do whatever MAGA tells him. I'm not afraid to stand up to MAGA. And I'm sure as hell not afraid to defend our freedom to choose if, when, how, and with whom we make our families – because that's exactly what I did on the battlefield in my Apache helicopter. [Whether or not I can do the same in the halls of Congress depends on if we have the money we need to compete with Fitzpatrick's war chest. So I'm asking if you'll pitch in $10 or more to my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81458635/462513858/1655983737?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240322_fr_Eisenstadt_cand_mf_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDIxYTA1MC02YmU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cicGxJFC-RUp_fIigD3foHY_d-xrNxg7nVLvui6WXJg=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = I would not have been able to buy my own birth control 52 years ago. That's less time than Sen. John Fetterman has been alive! You see, today is the anniversary of Eisenstadt v. Baird – the Supreme Court case that overturned a Massachusetts law that said only married couples could get birth control. And married couples only gained the freedom to get birth control in 1965, thanks to the Supreme Court's ruling in Griswold v. Connecticut. That ruling? That's one that far-right Justice Clarence Thomas said should be “reconsidered” just like he "reconsidered" our freedom to abortion care. We all know what that means. MAGA Republicans are sending a clear message: It's not just abortion. Birth control, IVF, LGBTQ+ equality – it's ALL in danger. I wouldn't be in this race if I had ANY hope that Brian Fitzpatrick would do the right thing and protect these basic freedoms. But Fitzpatrick's proven over and over again that he's a fake moderate who will do whatever MAGA tells him. I'm not afraid to stand up to MAGA. And I'm sure as hell not afraid to defend our freedom to choose if, when, how, and with whom we make our families – because that's exactly what I did on the battlefield in my Apache helicopter. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for being in this fight with me as my co-pilot, Ashley 🚁 | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. clean_body: | | | Peter, RINOs, the swamp, and the DC establishment all want me to lose this election. They know that I’ll never be swayed by their fancy parties or lavish dinners, and it makes them absolutely FURIOUS. But I’m worried that if we don’t up the pace on our grassroots fundraising, DC is going to get their way. This is Josh Hawley. I’m one of the most conservative, MAGA Senators, and I need your urgent help in my re-election fight. | | | | | | | | | Peter, every single swamp creature is betting against us. They want us to lose because they know that NOTHING will stop me from defending President Trump and putting America FIRST. But it’s not just me they want to silence. They want to put EVERY MAGA grassroots conservative on the chopping block, and that means YOU, Peter. | | | | | | | | | Thank you,Senator Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: It doesn't have to be this way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Nobody should be making a profit off of people’s sickness and pain.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240322-3663-footer&t=1&akid=3663%2E420207%2Ei-1plr)
Peter,
With every visit to the ER, an American is at risk of being pushed into severe medical debt.
Corporate greed has taken over our health care system. Multi-billion dollar pharmaceutical corporations are jacking up the prices of prescriptions and making it harder for everyday Americans to stay healthy.
_It doesn’t have to be this way._ Nobody should be making a profit off of people’s sickness and pain. **We need Medicare for All.**

[**Add your name to call on Congress and urge them to prioritize passing Medicare for All.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pass-m4a-em20240322/?source=em3663&t=2&akid=3663%2E420207%2Ei-1plr)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pass-m4a-em20240322/?source=em3663&t=3&akid=3663%2E420207%2Ei-1plr)**
Together,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240322-3663-footer&t=4&refcode2=3663_420207_i-1plr&akid=3663%2E420207%2Ei-1plr)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Steve Garvey #6
subject: Be careful what you wish for Mr. Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
I can’t help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. | | | [](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ba7956a389ee4b0f9f6e7be9f11049dd&_e=3j8L7LwXS2HQ6UMxl5SVyRuMg1F7esg57wPWL7uOrSjEha1mrSkhei5bw2ZVdQiVl8M17IaMPoexfMHxfW3DYPW--DvNI3l4f7A87pZ3hTGBLLD_UAqooSRpUDf7Fblw5P2ighHRQ1FGyNXepi8KNzupAWi3zcqyXiaurWfrxpUXaaCLM8ADDveONrKcnYANA99emtJm80OIrX9OOFrYTlsa_p7P5-5m0rd58aj_TCeUkF3ujlaPAHjDQWV3XSBBOnih9_4Zt144tUqaq7j0AdlmvnC2qUSBjTfMn7XYT8Pqyn_MnVK2gsTZa67zM2A9BxK_MBQibq0quhN79nmnXFmvUo2146FGud11EJt67m5Cjmp1aWGGBQF_JdpBuLsuZwD0brGA-gehYLIGYGqo0A%3D%3D)
---
[](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ba7956a389ee4b0f9f6e7be9f11049dd&_e=3j8L7LwXS2HQ6UMxl5SVyRuMg1F7esg57wPWL7uOrSjEha1mrSkhei5bw2ZVdQiVl8M17IaMPoexfMHxfW3DYPW--DvNI3l4f7A87pZ3hTGBLLD_UAqooSRpUDf7Fblw5P2ighHRQ1FGyNXepi8KNzupAWi3zcqyXiaurWfrxpUXaaCLM8ADDveONrKcnYANA99emtJm80OIrX9OOFrYTlsa_p7P5-5m0rd58aj_TCcZf9DOaWbYWplxNa525klFV1LG_dpfRrV9mbD-OYbPmp04DValWjXQM86ir7jpjDoU1jh7qL7R_rd-K1vPlFBrvIDMFtTGAIRmN0cjMcA04WTSrHZlW2ImfCAbRBxKr3By-HC5K2V5wnUh2siyvcWUyupBi2vAorzWst_zc7mwVQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow American, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ba7956a389ee4b0f9f6e7be9f11049dd&_e=3j8L7LwXS2HQ6UMxl5SVyRuMg1F7esg57wPWL7uOrSjEha1mrSkhei5bw2ZVdQiVl8M17IaMPoexfMHxfW3DYPW--DvNI3l4f7A87pZ3hTGBLLD_UAqooSRpUDf7Fblw5P2ighHRQ1FGyNXepi8KNzupAWi3zcqyXiaurWfrxpUXaaCLM8ADDveONrKcnYANA99emtJm80OIrX9OOFrYTlsa_p7P5-5m0rd58aj_TCehXymyCPsq4WAaRRnSUTqN5f3jQtPaURjxD-sDM6BxAwIQQrgDnlPpil2CgVBnmuKXZvkAsvMTm7aLPV8fV8UnLwvGZTy3RtDweZhBb4vu1RsyodFY9hEnalGEe4j6AoKDI7UD3unCK2Rbk1grnl3VSnk7-iIIsyIgBucYLrvSQg%3D%3D)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they'd rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ba7956a389ee4b0f9f6e7be9f11049dd&_e=3j8L7LwXS2HQ6UMxl5SVyRuMg1F7esg57wPWL7uOrSjEha1mrSkhei5bw2ZVdQiVl8M17IaMPoexfMHxfW3DYPW--DvNI3l4f7A87pZ3hTGBLLD_UAqooSRpUDf7Fblw5P2ighHRQ1FGyNXepi8KNzupAWi3zcqyXiaurWfrxpUXaaCLM8ADDveONrKcnYANA99emtJm80OIrX9OOFrYTlsa_p7P5-5m0rd58aj_TCfCUbEiKHJf5IAKrnKwYqwfvOxPbUD0W8zZC2CZlmU5QsODN6lqqvnfApWGX1da_W4NHwL9wSL_5-MQ2GmZOcVLECm9kvACarNrTwdCts6j6d0EuUGh3PHdLBS8EHzcQS0CSq9yCwYJ_nf6RWHh2cQ-e7-M9qy7BeLuC3JWn1XBJg%3D%3D) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!
---
| |
---
| | [](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ba7956a389ee4b0f9f6e7be9f11049dd&_e=3j8L7LwXS2HQ6UMxl5SVyRuMg1F7esg57wPWL7uOrSjEha1mrSkhei5bw2ZVdQiVl8M17IaMPoexfMHxfW3DYPW--DvNI3l4f7A87pZ3hTGBLLD_UAqooSRpUDf7Fblw5P2ighHRQ1FGyNXepi8KNzupAWi3zcqyXiaurWfrxpUXaaCLM8ADDveONrKcnYANA99emtJm80OIrX9OOFrYTlsa_p7P5-5m0rd58aj_TCfTkrWq49VUVaRmg5cBfMWPXUnXA6H_6ytGAMVJFCA_kZcX3DW6qFFuxNtff_6Po8ftv4dvUBKqnG2F2sNQD5grw1hs_IbCHt4T_zvFer-UfW_V_kRYhE2SzHwgX6Ds-jiMfFSWQa8aCEDThZXUAXkxI8czqnF9-0PuYCBGjK3l9A%3D%3D)
---
Steve Garvey #6

| [](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ba7956a389ee4b0f9f6e7be9f11049dd&_e=3j8L7LwXS2HQ6UMxl5SVyRuMg1F7esg57wPWL7uOrSjEha1mrSkhei5bw2ZVdQiVl8M17IaMPoexfMHxfW3DYPW--DvNI3l4f7A87pZ3hTGBLLD_UAqooSRpUDf7Fblw5P2ighHRQ1FGyNXepi8KNzupAWi3zcqyXiaurWfrxpUXaaCLM8ADDveONrKcnYANA99emtJm80OIrX9OOFrYTlsa_p7P5-5m0rd58aj_TCfyz142DOUudGDeP8zKSUHhme_htol0meY_IIKHAk2X8rj01tdVawIBLxIbv8yy9zdF1qXC2lHDtUbb7PD1ivCwbSAZflTPg8xUrQJ9mdw02MvQt8B7kq91GxzjzMc5XxopuIZYEeI9pmrnciKZZeS-o0C_Ek1iU-Be9CuJZUJCXA%3D%3D)
---
| | [**Donate**](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ba7956a389ee4b0f9f6e7be9f11049dd&_e=3j8L7LwXS2HQ6UMxl5SVyRuMg1F7esg57wPWL7uOrSjEha1mrSkhei5bw2ZVdQiVl8M17IaMPoexfMHxfW3DYPW--DvNI3l4f7A87pZ3hTGBLLD_UAqooSRpUDf7Fblw5P2ighHRQ1FGyNXepi8KNzupAWi3zcqyXiaurWfrxpUXaaCLM8ADDveONrKcnYANA99emtJm80OIrX9OOFrYTlsa_p7P5-5m0rd58aj_TCdrSoDBxRk6J9bOiip4F4YdiGKFtrZPGkn9qCgVFZo-bosOuETvuS-EfThh5qlokLjsQ8opQapO6HI026ba44P9klSXvERKiGkRAyxUKdJOss75husH_oHj5l8_pVidzL-mi0ZYmQRjwMZjb_iwW9GTEoi9L0Ron27qPTuKvPkY6A%3D%3D)
---
P.S. Adam Schiff had $35 million in the bank. Well, reports are now coming out that he spent upwards of _**$25 million**_ in the primary and is down to $10 million in the bank. Make no mistake, while his cash advantage is greatly diminished, as I write these words, Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are quickly reloading. The ActBlue political machine has the capacity to pump millions into his race in the blink of an eye. You and I cannot give them any daylight. **[**Your prompt support is critical.**](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ba7956a389ee4b0f9f6e7be9f11049dd&_e=3j8L7LwXS2HQ6UMxl5SVyRuMg1F7esg57wPWL7uOrSjEha1mrSkhei5bw2ZVdQiVl8M17IaMPoexfMHxfW3DYPW--DvNI3l4f7A87pZ3hTGBLLD_UAqooSRpUDf7Fblw5P2ighHRQ1FGyNXepi8KNzupAWi3zcqyXiaurWfrxpUXaaCLM8ADDveONrKcnYANA99emtJm80OIrX9OOFrYTlsa_p7P5-5m0rd58aj_TCdAm5mMMsSt8dg00IeiAp7rX76RIRpwWbywQNDGVdu0ULRmbd1BvNqlTTweW2Dxhk3FgOHKA1p5iVQh2FgsgBlblmw4AGOQB98Ys3phA7tM1czKqVrDx8fHRyhKyakUbvhZ5zms_pE8WQ-nMONIY4jWUOFFXl0kmhqkvyaz6kSsvQ%3D%3D)** Please don't delay.

name: National Alerts

Have you heard about the expanding influence of BRICS and its potential to overtake the US and the dollar? Led by powerful nations like Russia and China, BRICS envisions a new global order, and the implications are not just on a geopolitical scale but could directly impact you. Originally composed of Brazil, Russia, India, China, and South Africa, BRICS has doubled in size with new members: Egypt, Ethiopia, Iran, Saudi Arabia, and the United Arab Emirates, comprising nearly half of the world's population and 30% of the global economy. Thirty more countries are lining up to join. The threat isn't merely strategic; it's personal. After the health crisis instigated by China's alleged biowarfare tactics, BRICS is now targeting our wealth. Russia claims noble goals like sovereign equality and a fair global financial system, but their actions, such as invading Ukraine and proposing a unified currency to challenge the US dollar and influencing oil producers like the United Arab Emirates to shift away from the dollar, reveal a different agenda. Imagine a world where half of global transactions occur in the BRICS currency. The consequences could be dire for the US: a weakened dollar, soaring costs of imports, stock market crashes, and a fragile economy. Everyday items we import could become unaffordable, severely impacting your purchasing power. [**Request your FREE Wealth Protection Kit and learn how to BRICS-proof your savings.**](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJxkkb1y1TAQhZ9G7uSRVrbsFC4Ax2mAgv8uI0t7fXXR30hyMubpGYcMBbTfOXtm96zyydnLMZHhLQG4WlMIABFvCMD27em2f4JfHyoVD-pG72_-PTtVeEcA6pHwr_U1pUWvrDvpMDdmWvtRy7sGJz5wzkGOo2yuUz9o0IoZrsaRrxdzJ4QaDXa9wVWwHhs7AYOOCQA-MNZ3rZIrGgTojJFcdhfSMX8oj9lqFZKq2cbaxrw1brrWmsrLTguBxaVWOYebVUHjFp1pdfQEljVbXWiKtqChNdL4hLmqn0j3Qk10TmVaLmeEWPbqH0vcs0Yi5i959-nznlLMFXMhIE_Zo7G7J2KedTWvTCuflN3C_0OCng3-McVQMVQi5qAdXZ4PH4bj4-07AfkYnDVEzP_Al_-IOYb79av48ZCbPJn0bJ2zRQ6kY9vZ_3nk7wAAAP__PnCY2A)

clean_body: I’ve wanted to write to you about one of the rising stars in the Republican Party for some time. Today seems as good a time as ever to tell you how important this guy is to my father, me, and the Republican Party. | | If you're short on time and don't want to read this email in full, then the only thing I need from you today is for you to . If you need to hear more, my email continues below. Fellow Conservative, It’s Donald Trump Jr. You probably know me best as the son of President Donald Trump. I’m proud to be his namesake and carry on the tradition of such a great man. However, I am contacting you today on behalf of Tim Sheehy, who is running to become Montana's next great conservative senator. As the mainstream media is no friend to my father, you may not have heard that he just endorsed Tim Sheehy in his campaign to become a United States Senator. Knowing that fact, he has tasked me with getting the word out to grassroots conservatives nationwide, including you! If you don’t live in Montana, you might ask yourself: It’s an honest question. I’m writing about United States Senate candidateTim Sheehy because my father firmly believes he is a CRUCIAL part of the solution to saving our nation and getting this country back on track. Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL (VERY RARE), an extremely successful businessman, and a husband and father to four beautiful children. You might say that Tim Sheehy embodies everything great about America, everything that Democrats, like his opponent, Jon Tester, want to destroy. If you’re short on time and prefer not to read to the end, As you know, the balance of power in the United States Senate hangs by the thinnest of margins. A Democrat majority means MORE TAXES, MORE IRS MEDDLING INTO OUR PERSONAL FINANCES, MORE GOVERNMENT, MORE BUREAUCRACY, MORE OPEN BORDERS, MORE NATIONAL DEBT, MORE “WOKE” PROGRESSIVE NONSENSE INFILTRATING EVERY ASPECT OF OUR LIVES and MORE WITCH HUNTS AGAINST MY FATHER FOR THE CRIME OF DRAINING THE WASHINGTON D.C. SWAMP! Despite Tim’s best efforts, he’s struggling to keep pace with what his opponent, lying Jon Tester, and his left-wing lunatic friends are collecting. Tim Sheehy has fought and bled for our country in Afghanistan, Iraq, and many places in between. He’s the recipient of a Purple Heart. Tim is a job creator who cares about his state, making it a point to hire veterans at his company whenever the opportunity presents itself. On the other hand, Jon Tester has spent most of his days on an organic “dirt farm,” figuring out how best to make his lobbyist friends fat and happy. Despite Jon Tester’s highly partisan voting record in a state my father won in 2020 by more than 16 points, he’s raising more than one million dollars per month, every month, online. I’m lending my name to Tim’s fundraising efforts because his need is REAL and sustained. I’m very proud to join my father in supporting genuine American heroes called to serve in government - heroes like Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy. I hope you’ll do me the favor and donate to his campaign today. For America's Future, Donald Trump Jr. | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m on the road and need your help
body:
You’ve probably noticed that children today aren’t getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were growing up. |
---
| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=219028da67ec430a94afec964ab872e9&_t=PEWLNjjYUFITJl-jW7-xYsRqDEeENtfjJ9Ku28AQAEmhRdO6z9B4cAFsRbBGOmDdpibHaj6iQBdw4veVi9zzp3tLLosWNXQLsSYN7iW4bkc%3D)_
---

| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=219028da67ec430a94afec964ab872e9&_e=OSgcBh8jdQJnnGfHZC9dpQEeu018KmtuxZSCxPZrPFBKs1b6dwglhP9rozaWxK19SC0ybQ35XPBhqBFM0N__pcv3Cp0zS3bbyrEsJNAlZ6gC7mQWlh76_JPgLxUAJKP_WymRpkmT5lYALotqNjYOhx_WdIEmZuF54hZeo2yOG9Pz0l5i9k-2i7d6AUZSJX2-EZtKr1Zchkor6fk7xcuqOHUIXPQdUEVqarb5clGfEGOJe2yrhEztKUD3MQ76oOTnKb37nY51fj3FFsOAfsV1wgAWrnPxy0XWB-L_qi41GQfYuIcMo3jgSktQ1iOhJ2CYt9ZqktfqTFlCHY30jdl2eX1L4ptYabUyYw_l-pod3zsp7W1NMB5MBo4dB-o8-VxhnGRAS9N18Ti63byep1nC8Q%3D%3D)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

You've probably noticed that children today aren't getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were growing up.

We used to be taught to love our nation, cherish our history, and respect our fellow Americans. But all of that has changed.

In today's classroom, children are taught that America is fundamentally racist, that our history is one of oppression, and that we should focus on our differences instead of what unites us.

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=219028da67ec430a94afec964ab872e9&_e=OSgcBh8jdQJnnGfHZC9dpQEeu018KmtuxZSCxPZrPFBKs1b6dwglhP9rozaWxK19SC0ybQ35XPBhqBFM0N__pcv3Cp0zS3bbyrEsJNAlZ6gC7mQWlh76_JPgLxUAJKP_WymRpkmT5lYALotqNjYOhx_WdIEmZuF54hZeo2yOG9Pz0l5i9k-2i7d6AUZSJX2-EZtKr1Zchkor6fk7xcuqOHUIXPQdUEVqarb5clGfEGOJe2yrhEztKUD3MQ76oOTn9fnn0rmv-5ipl78scTbN7oiXWdalMEa9YTIkmJeuXWFBOa5GvAfKPGqkMxyF8tXmj-4PR5vI3pJQ7Xt6A33ISpFIkouF23nEy98M9Vg7y16EDozAPRg64_D0uP9HHsLD7-v_G5DjxnYHyoRcBtzNpQ%3D%3D)
__To make matters worse: the right of parents to choose how and where their kids receive their education remains out of reach for most American families.

And this is exactly why we created our Little Patriots program--to give parents, grandparents, teachers, and caregivers a free online resource they can use to teach children unbiased civics lessons, history, and American values, anywhere and anytime--[completely free of charge.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=219028da67ec430a94afec964ab872e9&_e=OSgcBh8jdQJnnGfHZC9dpQEeu018KmtuxZSCxPZrPFBKs1b6dwglhP9rozaWxK19SC0ybQ35XPBhqBFM0N__pcv3Cp0zS3bbyrEsJNAlZ6gC7mQWlh76_JPgLxUAJKP_WymRpkmT5lYALotqNjYOhx_WdIEmZuF54hZeo2yOG9Pz0l5i9k-2i7d6AUZSJX2-EZtKr1Zchkor6fk7xcuqOHUIXPQdUEVqarb5clGfEGOJe2yrhEztKUD3MQ76oOTnWayvQHhFkdbz8KBpHjRN83uY_agjCdn7BJh4q7MHkIcJKL8vTSppEXyeNQ-jTGqv_RzJvQURvKLJoaOs9vWoALRuaJKrIU_7AkYjTY1EToMYCGhvQN6N6lMbMAV6f7QbA63WKpdRc4nzTWfUTMtzPA%3D%3D)

**And now we plan to do even more.**

To meet the growing demand for educational resources that teach children to love their country and its history, we're taking Little Patriots on the road to bring these educational resources to schools, churches, and community organizations!

But to help us fund this coast-to-coast effort, I need your help today.

We depend on the generous support of patriots like you to help us fund this program and share it with children and families across our great nation.

If you believe that American children deserve to receive the best education possible, [can I personally ask you to help me accomplish my goal of getting this first-of-its-kind curriculum to anyone who needs it?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=219028da67ec430a94afec964ab872e9&_e=OSgcBh8jdQJnnGfHZC9dpQEeu018KmtuxZSCxPZrPFBKs1b6dwglhP9rozaWxK19SC0ybQ35XPBhqBFM0N__pcv3Cp0zS3bbyrEsJNAlZ6gC7mQWlh76_JPgLxUAJKP_WymRpkmT5lYALotqNjYOhx_WdIEmZuF54hZeo2yOG9Pz0l5i9k-2i7d6AUZSJX2-EZtKr1Zchkor6fk7xcuqOHUIXPQdUEVqarb5clGfEGOJe2yrhEztKUD3MQ76oOTnOAecFQQPpgYyxXAtu7T7Eb2fckiyurvoHLRhKCR-7q_dPYyhmBX8OtAalrwBOoS540cxV4i1AcE_fn53Ab_4GvpyrVSMouR_yu_fu93BvDGQY7ghMzW_E6LW1aRaulCGHdMpnkZTe-PZip63oeg-fw%3D%3D)

If you'd like to help me get Little Patriots to more American children, please click the link below to make your generous tax-deductible gift today:

[**https://secure.americancornerstone.org/little-patriots-tour-donate**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=219028da67ec430a94afec964ab872e9&_e=OSgcBh8jdQJnnGfHZC9dpQEeu018KmtuxZSCxPZrPFBKs1b6dwglhP9rozaWxK19SC0ybQ35XPBhqBFM0N__pcv3Cp0zS3bbyrEsJNAlZ6gC7mQWlh76_JPgLxUAJKP_WymRpkmT5lYALotqNjYOhx_WdIEmZuF54hZeo2yOG9Pz0l5i9k-2i7d6AUZSJX2-EZtKr1Zchkor6fk7xcuqOHUIXPQdUEVqarb5clGfEGOJe2yrhEztKUD3MQ76oOTna5xGnf_lkn1SUx2JArPjFxskcTHmsrmh5EkKb9yNGKSHPT-Rew6qEsGDcfGvo9HmXZfjxbsFqCpWGIyjH_yGMfpqspKhfz0XwhEJZ84eOPDkXyEFgeEJrhkeq9XcgpWtbEYfnmyfdqRchT5pJiEYpg%3D%3D)

Thank you so much for supporting these efforts--[together we can help kids across the U.S. get the education they deserve.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=219028da67ec430a94afec964ab872e9&_e=OSgcBh8jdQJnnGfHZC9dpQEeu018KmtuxZSCxPZrPFBKs1b6dwglhP9rozaWxK19SC0ybQ35XPBhqBFM0N__pcv3Cp0zS3bbyrEsJNAlZ6gC7mQWlh76_JPgLxUAJKP_WymRpkmT5lYALotqNjYOhx_WdIEmZuF54hZeo2yOG9Pz0l5i9k-2i7d6AUZSJX2-EZtKr1Zchkor6fk7xcuqOHUIXPQdUEVqarb5clGfEGOJe2yrhEztKUD3MQ76oOTnTPrgj920Khdbknht_WeX372TJ9KOY0Zj30Cikb7CGYTE068IyXBSgiDV_ISC3LxXCUI2hVrYXaX2rQy-Bw0Lr23y5wj9iIH0Pl_AInp_g6da_rzDd07mDpMw6_Qd9AWUutPkSE5yt4yQvyHNAOYJCw%3D%3D)

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: I’m so grateful to each and every one of you 🧡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
A thank you — and a personal request.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81460906/462519432/-849459103?refcode=ea.aed572a0-6de8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.aed572a0-6de8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWQ1NzJhMC02ZGU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wIwsditowu4hbSm08K5vC0TS2gPDawDMZn8BSJ7ZtZs=&emci=05c5cf54-d4e6-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=aed572a0-6de8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=46764483)
---
Y’all, I can never say it enough: _Thank you_ for being part of this campaign for U.S. Senate. We wouldn’t have come this far without you — and while there’s still a long way to go, we’re growing our movement every day with grassroots supporters who choose to invest their hard-earned money here. _Because Marsha Blackburn is a danger to our most fundamental rights, and I will fight to defend them._ _Because the Democratic Senate majority is thinner-than-thin, and our race could determine whether or not we lose it to the GOP._ _Because Tennesseans deserve a leader who is loyal to _them,_ not to powerful special interests like the gun lobby._ I know that you have competing priorities and other campaigns vying for your support too. **It means the world to me when a single person chooses to pitch in here.** **_[We’re just days away from my end-of-quarter deadline, so I do have to ask: Can you contribute ANY amount to help me keep up the fight against Marsha Blackburn? clean_body: A thank you — and a personal request. | Y’all, I can never say it enough: Thank you for being part of this campaign for U.S. Senate. We wouldn’t have come this far without you — and while there’s still a long way to go, we’re growing our movement every day with grassroots supporters who choose to invest their hard-earned money here. Because Marsha Blackburn is a danger to our most fundamental rights, and I will fight to defend them. Because the Democratic Senate majority is thinner-than-thin, and our race could determine whether or not we lose it to the GOP. Because Tennesseans deserve a leader who is loyal to them, not to powerful special interests like the gun lobby. I know that you have competing priorities and other campaigns vying for your support too. It means the world to me when a single person chooses to pitch in here. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks so much, Gloria = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. body:
With just 10 days left until our very first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year, I wanted to touch base with you and share a glimpse of what lies ahead in our battle to secure victory in PA-08.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81462116/462521876/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGRiZDc5Ny02ZWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TdNAy2hDbl-DfSJU4VPijc-geaQeN6QAFo8pkAcWD1Y=&emci=554a62cd-ade7-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=04dbd797-6ee8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

With just 10 days left until our very first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year, I wanted to touch base with you and share a glimpse of what lies ahead in our battle to secure victory in PA-08 (but if you’re already fired up to help us reach our goal before the deadline, you can [**donate here!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81462118/462521878/-235138156?refcode=em24_240322_10deoq_fnd_gq_act___mc_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240322_10deoq_fnd_gq_act___mc_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode2=04dbd797-6ee8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGRiZDc5Ny02ZWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TdNAy2hDbl-DfSJU4VPijc-geaQeN6QAFo8pkAcWD1Y=)).

**For years, PA-08 has been a prime target for national Republicans.** They’ve poured millions into attack ads, dispatched on-the-ground volunteers, and tirelessly promoted their chosen candidate in every way imaginable.

And guess what? **This year will be no different.** We’re gearing up to face an onslaught of attacks, smear campaigns, and well-funded opposition. But here’s the thing: We’re ready to fight back with everything we’ve got.

That’s where you come in. **Grassroots support from folks like you has been absolutely critical in helping us stay ahead of the curve and ensuring we have the resources to tackle whatever challenges come our way before Election Day.**

[**Can I count on you to chip in $10 today towards our end-of-quarter fundraising goal? Every dollar we raise goes directly towards funding our efforts to hold PA-08 and reclaim the House majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81462120/462521880/-235138156?refcode=em24_240322_10deoq_fnd_gq_act___mc_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240322_10deoq_fnd_gq_act___mc_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode2=04dbd797-6ee8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGRiZDc5Ny02ZWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TdNAy2hDbl-DfSJU4VPijc-geaQeN6QAFo8pkAcWD1Y=) Thanks a bunch,

Matt Cartwright

For years, PA-08 has been a prime target for national Republicans. They’ve poured millions into attack ads, dispatched on-the-ground volunteers, and tirelessly promoted their chosen candidate in every way imaginable. And guess what? This year will be no different. We’re gearing up to face an onslaught of attacks, smear campaigns, and well-funded opposition. But here’s the thing: We’re ready to fight back with everything we’ve got. That’s where you come in. name: Sen. Jacky Rosen
subject: What else can I say, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
With Nevada's battleground race already locked in a dead heat, I need your support now to win.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81462526/462522985/1553268835?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3638-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmM2MWUwNi02ZmU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TkSi0Zz_ege9dRa4cZtHOYMig8_MtpyybihZdZHesY4=)
Friend, is there _anything_ I can say to convince you to donate $5 or more **today** to help me win my battleground Senate race in Nevada?
What if I told you that political experts predict this race will likely decide Senate control?
Or that polling shows me locked in a _dead heat_ with Mitch McConnell's handpicked GOP candidate, Sam Brown?
Or that the Koch network's super PAC recently announced it was spending another $600,000 to blanket Nevada airwaves with new ads to support my opponent?

We want to hear from you!

name: Tina Smith
subject: Did you see my original message?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Women will never stop needing abortions — conservative judges and Republican officials are just making it harder to access and putting women in danger. That’s why we need your help. |
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81464945/462528365/1310394452?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240322_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdiMTAzNi03MmU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XiaVJ_edUBVaua-Q_o3vwY4RMmal8clVQTfSLFRirtg=&emci=837b1036-72e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=8c7b1036-72e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=6227932) Team, I emailed you a few weeks ago about an upcoming Supreme Court case that could determine the fate of abortion access for millions of women across the country. We can’t count on this Supreme Court to protect reproductive freedoms, which is why I’m fighting to pass federal legislation to protect abortion access. **[Please add your name in support of my work to pass the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_ and other pro-choice legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81464951/462528372/1310394452?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240322_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdiMTAzNi03MmU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XiaVJ_edUBVaua-Q_o3vwY4RMmal8clVQTfSLFRirtg=&emci=837b1036-72e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=8c7b1036-72e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81464964/462528379/1310394452?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240322_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdiMTAzNi03MmU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XiaVJ_edUBVaua-Q_o3vwY4RMmal8clVQTfSLFRirtg=&emci=837b1036-72e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=8c7b1036-72e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=6227932)
---
Women will never stop needing abortions — conservative judges and Republican officials are just making it harder to access and putting women in danger. That’s why we need your help.
You can read my original message below. Thanks for stepping up,
Tina
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Tina Smith
Date: March 10, 2024
Subject: The Supreme Court is taking up a case about medication abortion. Sign this petition to protect reproductive healthcare:_
Team,
In just a few weeks, the Supreme Court will hear arguments about access to mifepristone, a commonly used abortion pill.
**This is the same Supreme Court that overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , and we can’t count on them to protect reproductive rights.**
Since the _Dobbs_ decision in 2022, states across the country have severely limited abortion access.
Thankfully other states will now begin selling abortion medications at pharmacies, and the first over-the-counter contraceptive pill is now offered at some stores.
But we can’t count on SCOTUS to protect abortion access.
**That’s why I’m fighting for the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_ and other pro-choice policies in the Senate.**
**[Will you show your support for my work in the Senate to protect access to medication abortion and other reproductive health care?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81464979/462528397/1310394452?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240322_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdiMTAzNi03MmU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XiaVJ_edUBVaua-Q_o3vwY4RMmal8clVQTfSLFRirtg=&emci=837b1036-72e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=8c7b1036-72e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=6227932)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81464984/462528416/1310394452?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240322_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdiMTAzNi03MmU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XiaVJ_edUBVaua-Q_o3vwY4RMmal8clVQTfSLFRirtg=&emci=837b1036-72e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=8c7b1036-72e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=6227932)
---
Abortion access is the focus of GOP attacks for now, but the far-right is also targeting access to contraception and fertility treatments like IVF. We have to fight back now.
As the only Senator to have worked at Planned Parenthood, I know how important it is to have access to reproductive health care. That is why I am working so hard in the Senate to protect women’s health care and bodily autonomy from far-right politicians and conservative judges.
I will continue to work tirelessly to pass crucial legislation like the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ and the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_.
But with the issue of access to mifepristone heading to the Supreme Court, we need all the support we can get to prove that people want abortion rights protected.
**[I’m personally asking you to help me to protect access to medication abortion by signing on in support of pro-choice policies.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81464990/462528441/1310394452?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240322_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdiMTAzNi03MmU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XiaVJ_edUBVaua-Q_o3vwY4RMmal8clVQTfSLFRirtg=&emci=837b1036-72e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=8c7b1036-72e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=6227932)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81464996/462528472/1310394452?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240322_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzdiMTAzNi03MmU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XiaVJ_edUBVaua-Q_o3vwY4RMmal8clVQTfSLFRirtg=&emci=837b1036-72e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=8c7b1036-72e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=6227932)

Thank you for making your voice heard today and supporting us in our mission to protect reproductive rights from far-right politicians.
— Tina

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: We're officially running against Trump's handpicked candidate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
Friend, Ohio's primary is over, and now, it's official: We're going up against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate Bernie Moreno in the race experts say could decide Senate control.
And it's not just Moreno we're up against. National Republicans are going ALL IN to flip this seat red – they're already spending record amounts to defeat me. We need to fight back ASAP, or we could risk entering the general election at a disadvantage.
So I'm personally asking: Please, will you split $10 or more now between my campaign and Michael Bennet to help me defend Ohio's critical seat and keep the Senate blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-brown?refcode=X_032224_BennetSherrod_actrs]
DONATE → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-brown?refcode=X_032224_BennetSherrod_actrs]
In case you need a reminder, my opponent and I couldn't be more different:
*
He
wants
a
national
abortion
ban,
I
want
to
restore
Roe
v.
Wade.

*
He
protects
the
wealthiest
1%,
I
defend
American
workers.

*
He'll
do
Trump's
and
McConnell's
bidding
in
the
Senate,
I'm
a
champion
for
democracy.
Unfortunately, that's not all. Moreno is also writing his campaign million-dollar checks, and now that he's through the primary, the GOP will be funneling even more money into this race. They're trying to buy this Senate seat because they know they don't have a grassroots movement behind them like we do.
But that also means I'm relying on folks like you to power us to victory, one $10 donation at a time. So please, will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Michael Bennet to help us defeat our GOP opponent, win in Ohio, and keep the Senate blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-brown?refcode=X_032224_BennetSherrod_actrs]
DONATE → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-brown?refcode=X_032224_BennetSherrod_actrs]
Your support means the world – especially now. Thank you,
Sherrod Brown

Bennet for Colorado
PO Box 3078
Denver, CO 80201
United States
WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [https://michaelbennet.com/?emci=db8b2fe5-53fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1295540] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [https://michaelbennet.com/privacy-policy/?emci=db8b2fe5-53fb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1295540]

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: I’m going to do everything in my power to keep Michigan blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Hi team, Before I say anything else I just want to thank you for your continued support of Fight Like Hell PAC. Whether you’ve donated to our emails before or simply just took time out of your day to read our messages, please know that I appreciate you. **In a moment I’m going to ask you to[contribute to our movement](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81466253/462531603/1253923692?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240322_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM4MGZjOWUtNzNlOC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7PEEFFIZaXBW_1TLGj-Yem0maefy2F3VUbtnepztfY=), and I hope you’ll give me a few moments to explain why.** I launched Fight Like Hell PAC with one clear goal in mind — to elect Democrats nationwide who’ll fight for our fundamental freedoms and defend working people. I’m very proud of the work we did in 2023. From protecting reproductive rights in Ohio to electing Democrats in traditionally Republican states like Kansas and Kentucky, we played a significant role in supporting Democrats and progressive causes that are aligned with our values. **In 2024, we have even more work to do.** Donald Trump and his extremist allies are marching full steam ahead to recapture the presidency and impose their radical, far-right agenda. And they know that Michigan is one of the only states standing in their way. That’s why they’re planning to pour an _enormous_ amount of resources into our state to win Michigan’s 15 electoral votes and win the White House. **I’m going to do everything in my power to keep Michigan in President Biden and Vice President Harris’ column.** And I know that Team Biden-Harris is working overtime to do the same. Not only are they investing resources to strengthen their ground game, but both President Biden and Vice President Harris have taken time out of their busy schedules to visit Michigan multiple times within the past month because they understand just how important Michigan is. But we’ll also need to lean on your grassroots contributions to help fund our voter outreach and mobilization efforts so we can continue reaching voters in the weeks and months ahead. **Your support of Fight Like Hell PAC is critical in ensuring that we deliver Michigan for Team Biden-Harris and put them on track to win reelection.[Will you consider making a donation today in support of our campaign to win Michigan?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81466254/462531604/1253923692?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240322_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM4MGZjOWUtNzNlOC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7PEEFFIZaXBW_1TLGj-Yem0maefy2F3VUbtnepztfY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81466255/462531605/1253923692?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240322_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM4MGZjOWUtNzNlOC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7PEEFFIZaXBW_1TLGj-Yem0maefy2F3VUbtnepztfY=)

name: Bob Casey HQ
subject: With you on the map
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2418%2E552475%2EtzJ9YR)
Hi Peter,
The map is looking great! With names from Crawford County to Chester County, Beaver County to Bucks County, folks are stepping up and proving supporters from all across the Commonwealth are ready to re-elect Bob Casey.
[**If you want to be a part of this team of supporters, chip in $5 or whatever you can to get your name on the map!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-2?refcode=em20240322-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2418_552475_tzJ9YR&akid=2418%2E552475%2EtzJ9YR)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-2?refcode=em20240322-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2418_552475_tzJ9YR&akid=2418%2E552475%2EtzJ9YR)
We have a lot of maps here at Bob Casey HQ, but this one might be our favorite.
In 2020, Bob spent a week in front of his map of Pennsylvania breaking down the election. The stakes were high, and Bob used his expertise to help shed some light on what was happening.
Then in 2022, Bob got out his map again to help keep track of the vote count in our Senate and Gubernatorial races until they were called for Senator Fetterman and Governor Shapiro.
In 2024, we’re using our map to show just how many people are with us as we work day in and day out to re-elect Bob to fight for us in the Senate.
[**Every name that’s on the map proves that we have what it takes to win in November — and it’s not too late to get yours up there. Donate now to join our team of supporters on the map!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-2?refcode=em20240322-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2418_552475_tzJ9YR&akid=2418%2E552475%2EtzJ9YR)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240322-2-el&refcode2=2418_552475_tzJ9YR&akid=2418%2E552475%2EtzJ9YR) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240322-2-el&refcode2=2418_552475_tzJ9YR&akid=2418%2E552475%2EtzJ9YR) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240322-2-el&refcode2=2418_552475_tzJ9YR&akid=2418%2E552475%2EtzJ9YR) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240322-2-el&refcode2=2418_552475_tzJ9YR&akid=2418%2E552475%2EtzJ9YR) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240322-2-el&refcode2=2418_552475_tzJ9YR&akid=2418%2E552475%2EtzJ9YR) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240322-2&refcode2=2418_552475_tzJ9YR&akid=2418%2E552475%2EtzJ9YR)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Leftist agitators, many clad in black masks...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
I will never waver or give into the mob– Read more >>>

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,

I’ve written to you about this twice before. It’s been going on for six weeks now.

Leftist agitators, many clad in black masks to conceal their identities, have been gathering outside my home early in the morning – ringing loud bells, blocking the sidewalk, chanting hateful slogans, and yelling all sorts of other nonsense.

Their intent is clear. **They want to harass my family and intimidate me.**

In a video posted to social media recently, one of them declares that I “will know no peace” and they will “always raise hell” unless I break from my principles and give into the mob.
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz._ImoJPCIV3GzI1In1sHg)
---
Here’s my message to these malcontents: _It will NEVER happen_. _Hamas is an anti-American terrorist organization, and it should be destroyed!_

I will ALWAYS stand strong for Israel, for Texas, and for the United States of America!

**[If you’re with me, pitch in now to fuel our fight at Team Cruz>>>](http://trk.tedcruz.)**
---
[**RUSH CRITICAL SUPPORT**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
As I’ve written to you before, it is a sad situation that this is now common in our country. Leftist radicals, mobilized by groups funded by wealthy liberals, believe that nothing is off limits – they block traffic, interrupt campus speeches, vandalize artwork in museums, scream, and even threaten and commit extreme violence. And believe me, I’m working to find out exactly who is funding these anti-American organizations. We need every Republican to understand how seriously these people are working to destroy our country- and how urgent it is that we stop them. **Remember:** _This isn’t about protesting; this is about lawless leftwing mobs working to harm America. _
**Coming to my home, to intimidate me, my wife, and my children, is wrong. ** These tactics are disgraceful and the left’s inability to tolerate dissent from their party line is the definition of intellectual weakness.

I expect that the screaming mob will only intensify its “protests” as this race heats up. They’re desperate to defeat me this fall, and in their world, NOTHING is off limits.

**[**Take a stand to help us KEEP TEXAS RED and SAVE AMERICA from these extremists.**](http://trk.tedcruz.)**

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz
---

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: On the Road
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
|
---
# **A Message from the Chairwoman**
---
| | ** _On the Road_**
---
Friends, Engaging with our grassroots has been a highlight of my journey as Chairwoman, offering me the chance to connect with our county parties and campaigns, and show them our support. Witnessing the dedication of fellow Republicans as we work tirelessly to grow our party has been inspiring. We look forward to continuing working with our grassroots to build our party from the ground-up in all 92 counties! As we look ahead to the upcoming Lincoln Day Dinners and other gatherings across the state, we are filled with anticipation and excitement. These occasions not only provide us with a chance to come together in fellowship and celebration, but also serve as opportunities for meaningful dialogue and collaboration. If our team has yet to attend your organization's events, trainings, or initiatives, please don't hesitate to reach out. We will make every effort to engage with as many of our county party organizations as possible as we prepare for election day 2024. In my 204 days as Chairwoman, our team has worked tirelessly to crisscross the state for party events, training sessions, caucuses, and more. In the coming days, weeks, and months ahead, we are looking forward to connecting with you in your corner of this great state! We are here for you, so please reach out. We are happy to help. Thank you for all that you do.
---
---
Chairwoman Anne F. Hathaway
---
---
| |
# **Governor Eric Holcomb's Week in Review**
---
| |
# _Gov. Holcomb Announced Additional State Resources for Areas That Suffered Tornado Damage_
---
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/24b00985a22a37013947229f28c3afba/e39d14823aaee9cac3d6b838967d376c/40313)**Governor Eric Holcomb** [announced](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/24b00985a22a37013947229f28c3afba/4c507f3056b96a2ac3d6b838967d376c/40313) additional state resources will be available to residents of Randolph and Delaware counties who suffered tornado damage on March 15. This follows a visit from **Gov. Holcomb** to the afflicted area in Winchester. **What he’s saying** : “The one constant when it comes to devastation such as the destruction caused by the tornado last night in Winchester, is the response of [#Hoosiers](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/24b00985a22a37013947229f28c3afba/738ec452ff2c8d9fc3d6b838967d376c/40313) helping to pick up and rebuild. We are with you now and until the job is done.” \- **Gov. Holcomb** said in a [post on X](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/24b00985a22a37013947229f28c3afba/35c8c0822a03e41dc3d6b838967d376c/40313). **What else happened this week? Gov. Holcomb**[congratulated](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/24b00985a22a37013947229f28c3afba/e81f1b35f3a59323c3d6b838967d376c/40313) the Sagamore Institute on 20 years!
* To stay up-to-date, follow **Gov. Holcomb** on [Facebook](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/24b00985a22a37013947229f28c3afba/65e10474e155171cc3d6b838967d376c/40313) or [Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/24b00985a22a37013947229f28c3afba/2a76c0e6361e867ac3d6b838967d376c/40313).

# 2024 Republican National Convention Internship and Volunteer Programs
---
---
Applications are open for the 2024 Republican National Convention Internship Program! The Committee on Arrangements (“COA”) plans for and manages the Republican National Convention. See the one pager with more information above. To apply for the COA Internship Program, please submit the following:
1. [RNC Internship Application](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/24b00985a22a37013947229f28c3afba/af354281ae237d3bc3d6b838967d376c/40313). Please include your Resume and Personal Statement with your submission on the application portal
2. Two Letters of Recommendation emailed to coainterns@gopconvention2024.com

To ensure a timely review of your application all materials are due by March 31, 2024. The COA Internship Program is a structured, full-time, unpaid internship, and positions are limited. The COA Internship Program begins Thursday, June 6, 2024 and concludes Sunday, July 21, 2024\. Hours of business are Monday – Friday, 8:30 a.m. – 5:30 p.m. (days and hours subject to change at the discretion of COA or intern supervisors). There are also exciting volunteer opportunities available at the national convention.The MKE 2024 Host Committee is looking for volunteers to help guests at the 2024 Republican National Convention. Click [HERE](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/24b00985a22a37013947229f28c3afba/0dafc6a87e2ef58ec3d6b838967d376c/40313) to access volunteer information!
---
|

clean_body: | | | | A Message from the Chairwoman | | On the Road Friends, Engaging with our grassroots has been a highlight of my journey as Chairwoman, offering me the chance to connect with our county parties and campaigns, and show them our support. Witnessing the dedication of fellow Republicans as we work tirelessly to grow our party has been inspiring. We look forward to continuing working with our grassroots to build our party from the ground-up in all 92 counties! As we look ahead to the upcoming Lincoln Day Dinners and other gatherings across the state, we are filled with anticipation and excitement. These occasions not only provide us with a chance to come together in fellowship and celebration, but also serve as opportunities for meaningful dialogue and collaboration. If our team has yet to attend your organization's events, trainings, or initiatives, please don't hesitate to reach out. We will make every effort to engage with as many of our county party organizations as possible as we prepare for election day 2024. In my 204 days as Chairwoman, our team has worked tirelessly to crisscross the state for party events, training sessions, caucuses, and more. In the coming days, weeks, and months ahead, we are looking forward to connecting with you in your corner of this great state! We are here for you, so please reach out. We are happy to help. Thank you for all that you do. Chairwoman Anne F. Hathaway | | Governor Eric Holcomb's Week in Review | | Gov. Holcomb Announced Additional State Resources for Areas That Suffered Tornado Damage | | Eric Holcomb additional state resources will be available to residents of Randolph and Delaware counties who suffered tornado damage on March 15. This follows a visit from Gov. Holcomb to the afflicted area in Winchester. What he’s saying : “The one constant when it comes to devastation such as the destruction caused by the tornado last night in Winchester, is the response of helping to pick up and rebuild. We are with you now and until the job is done.” \- Gov. Holcomb said in a . What else happened this week? Gov. Holcomb the Sagamore Institute on 20 years! To stay up-to-date, follow Gov. Holcomb on or . | | | 2024 Republican National Convention Internship and Volunteer Programs Applications are open for the 2024 Republican National Convention Internship Program! The Committee on Arrangements (“COA”) plans for and manages the Republican National Convention. See the one pager with more information above. To apply for the COA Internship Program, please submit the following: 1. . Please include your Resume and Personal Statement with your submission on the application portal 2. Two Letters of Recommendation emailed to coainterns@gopconvention2024.com To ensure a timely review of your application all materials are due by March 31, 2024. The COA Internship Program is a structured, full-time, unpaid internship, and positions are limited. The COA Internship Program begins Thursday, June 6, 2024 and concludes Sunday, July 21, 2024\. Hours of business are Monday – Friday, 8:30 a.m. – 5:30 p.m. (days and hours subject to change at the discretion of COA or intern supervisors). There are also exciting volunteer opportunities available at the national convention.The MKE 2024 Host Committee is looking for volunteers to help guests at the 2024 Republican National Convention. Hey there team: I just got some really important news!!
A new poll shows this race is in a dead heat – this is HUGE!
But there's about 50% of folks that are undecided on how they will vote. And I intend to prove to them why I'm the best candidate for the job. But I need your help to do it.
Will you rush $10 (honestly, $20 would be amazing!) to split between my campaign and Seth Moulton? I've got to raise $50,000 so I can keep knocking on doors, placing yard signs, and hopefully launch some TV ads, and I've got to do it by midnight! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
I'm not a tenured politician – but I am a tenured public servant.
I don't have some long history of being bought by this lobby or that lobby, but I do have a long history of protecting our democracy.
On January 6, I protected our democracy, our Capitol, and everyone inside of it with my own two hands.
And every day since then, I've been ringing the alarm bells. Our democracy will not survive if we don't put people who intend to protect it in power.
I'm ready to make my return to the Capitol and polls show that a lot of Marylanders agree. We can't slow down right now, not with an end-of-quarter deadline looming. Please, will you rush $10 right now to be split between my campaign and Seth Moulton? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
💙,
Harry

name: Hill Harper
subject: Black voters are the key to victory in Michigan. Period.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
And we need to mobilize every single one ahead of Election Day.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1106%2E62735%2E9SJkwC)
Peter, there's something crucial we need to discuss: the pivotal role of Black voters in Michigan in this year’s elections.
Let's cut to the chase: **Black voters will be the deciding factor in this Senate race _and_ the presidential race. Period. Just take a look at the numbers:**
👉🏾 **In 2020,** our community showed up in force, helping to flip Michigan by a margin of **154,000 votes.** That's incredible, but it's also just the beginning of what we can achieve.
👉🏾 **In 2016,** when turnout was lower, we missed out on having our voices heard by a staggering **227,000 votes.** We cannot afford to let that happen again -- not with so much at stake.
As you can see, the fate of this election hinges on _our_ collective action. And don’t get me wrong -- I’m well aware that establishment politicians have a track record of taking Black voters’ support for granted. They come around during election season, promising the world, but where are they when we need them most? **It’s time for a fundamental change in leadership in Washington, and that change starts with _us_ , Peter.**
**[Will you chip in $5 today to fuel our people-powered campaign to victory? We have a critical end-of-quarter deadline coming up, and since I’m not taking a cent of corporate PAC money,_every dollar counts!_](https://act.hillharper.com/go/805?t=3&akid=1106%2E62735%2E9SJkwC)**
I'm not just asking for your vote; I'm asking for your partnership in this fight. **That’s why I'm running a different kind of campaign -- one that puts the needs and concerns of Black communities front and center, not just during election years, but every single day.**
But here's the reality: Running a campaign that truly represents the people takes vast resources. We need grassroots support from folks like you to amplify our message, reach every corner of the state, and mobilize Black voters -- and _every_ possible voter -- like never before.
That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is fast approaching, and I need your help to make a strong showing when our numbers go public. **[Will you chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to ensure that our campaign has the resources we need to win?](https://act.hillharper.com/go/805?t=5&akid=1106%2E62735%2E9SJkwC)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/806?t=6&akid=1106%2E62735%2E9SJkwC) [DONATE $25 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/807?t=7&akid=1106%2E62735%2E9SJkwC) [DONATE $50 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/808?t=8&akid=1106%2E62735%2E9SJkwC) [DONATE $100 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/809?t=9&akid=1106%2E62735%2E9SJkwC) [DONATE $250 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/810?t=10&akid=1106%2E62735%2E9SJkwC) [OTHER AMOUNT »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/811?t=11&akid=1106%2E62735%2E9SJkwC)
---
Together, we have the power to make history and elect Michigan’s first Black senator. Let's rise to the occasion and show everyone what we're made of.
Thank you for your support,
Hill Harper
Democrat for U.S. Senate
[](https://act.hillharper.com/go/811?t=12&akid=1106%2E62735%2E9SJkwC)
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_email?refcode=bax_hh_emailfooter&t=13&refcode2=1106_62735_9SJkwC&akid=1106%2E62735%2E9SJkwC)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=14&akid=1106%2E62735%2E9SJkwC)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=1106%2E62735%2E9SJkwC)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
