IL GOP chair Don Tracy addresses a crowd at the Illinois State Fair in 2022 (IL GOP).

By Illinois Review

The Illinois Republican Party routinely claims that they do not have enough money to support individual candidates – especially the conservative grassroots candidates, but disclosures reveal that during the 2022 election cycle, the state party spent over $954,000 on three political consulting firms as Democrats dominated the election and expanded their super majority control throughout the state.

Disclosures also reveal that during that same period, the state party spent over $731,000 on salaries. Records show the IL GOP sent $437,500 to Axiom Strategies, $285,196 to COR Strategies and $231,347 to Validus.

But the money spent did not advance Republican causes, but rather it advanced Republican losses – as the party spent nearly one million dollars to hire the state’s best and brightest political minds and consultants. And what was the result of their efforts? As the Chicago Tribune Editorial Board pointed out in a Nov. 11, 2022 editorial,

“Republicans lost every state constitutional office – governor, attorney general, secretary of state, comptroller and treasurer – and 14 of 17 congressional seats. In the General Assembly, not only did the GOP fail to gain any ground on Democrats’ supermajority, Democrats notched a record number of seats in the Illinois House. And in the Illinois Supreme Court, where Republicans had an opportunity to gain two seats...they came up short. Democrats now have a comfortable 5-2 edge in the state’s high court.”

Validus partner and co-founder Nick Klitzing is the former Executive Director of the IL GOP and he served as the Deputy Campaign Manager and Special Counsel for the Bruce Rauner re-election campaign in 2017. A review of Klitzing’s personal X account reveals anti-Trump posts. The Republican political consultant also bashes former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani, writing in 2020 that the mayor caused “extraordinary damage to our democracy by lying and pushing wild conspiracies on conservative media.”

In other posts, Klitzing praises Never Trumper former U.S. Rep. Adam Kinzinger, writing, “So proud that @RepKinzinger represents Illinois!”

Klitzing even endorses an anti-Trump, pro-choice Chicago Democrat in 2019, writing,

“As a Republican in Chicago, I don’t always love my choices in city elections. But I enthusiastically voted for @AnnaValenciaIL for City Clerk. I’ve known Anna for 15+ years. She is a great leader and true public servant. She deserves your support. #VoteValencia #TeamValencia”

In 2018, Valencia endorsed Democrat JB Pritzker for governor, writing, “I am proud to support JB for governor and to fight alongside him for the future of Illinois.” And in response, Pritzker noted,

“I’m honored to receive the endorsement of Clerk Valencia. Anna is a strong voice for women’s rights and economic opportunity here in Chicago and across the state. As governor, I will work with leaders like Anna to protect a woman’s right to choose, support women and minority-owned small businesses, and work to close the gender pay gap. We will also fight the hateful attacks we’re seeing from the Trump and Rauner administrations.”

And in 2022, Gov. JB Pritzker endorsed Valencia in her bid to become Illinois’ Secretary of State, stating that she “represents the bright future of the Democratic Party.”

But Republican political consulting is a lucrative business in Illinois, regardless of one’s winning record. Last April,
this publication revealed (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/uihlein-funded-pac-pays-political-consultants-142000-while-spending-just-3700-to-support-conservative-school-board-candidates-disclosures-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ebb51baf8b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D#:~:text=The%20Richard%20Uihlein%2Dfunded%20People,candidates%20over%20the%20last%20several) that the Richard Uihlein-funded People Who Play By The Rules PAC, in quarterly disclosures, paid three political consultants $142,000 while spending just $3,700 to support conservative school board candidates during the April elections. Sadly, the candidates lost, but the real winners were the consultants who paid themselves generously.

The founder, president and treasurer of the PAC Dan Proft, a Florida resident and host of the Naples-based radio show Chicago’s Morning Answer, received the majority of the consulting fees, totaling $75,000 to Starfish Consulting LLC, while the rest went to a consulting firm owned by Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau, who was paid $26,000 through Fahrenheit Consulting Group, while $41,000 went to a consulting firm owned by Michael Koolidge (TMKS, LLC), who also serves as the PAC’s communications director and chief spokesperson.

During the 2022 Illinois gubernatorial campaign, Uihlein donated $42 million to Proft’s PAC. And just weeks before the election, the Illinois political consulting class, including the PAC, were out promoting a single poll that showed Republican nominee Darren Bailey within “striking” distance and only two points behind Pritzker during the final stretch of the campaign. But on election night, the governor’s race was called at the exact moment the polls closed, with the Associated Press declaring Gov. Pritzker the winner at 7:00 pm CDT. Pritzker would defeat Bailey by 12 points – a far cry from the 2-point margin that the Republican consultants were out promoting just days before.

The Illinois Republican political consulting class is busy getting ready for the 2024 election, and promising major Republican victories in a state dominated by the Democrats. But if history is any indication, the real winners will not be the local candidates – but rather, the well-paid political consultants.

The next election is November 5, 2024.

Earlier this week I became the OFFICIAL Democratic nominee against Jim Jordan, and I couldn’t be more excited to take him on and flip this seat blue!

**But here’s the deal:** There’s no doubt in my mind that Jim Jordan and his MAGA Extremist allies are getting ready to ramp up their lies and mudslinging in an effort to hold onto this seat.

**_We can’t let that happen.
_**
As a candidate funded entirely by grassroots donors like you, I’m hoping that I can count on your support to get my message out to voters.

[](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b0339a937cce4a5cae88d7dc30d26776&_e=TShxIO05T3_tZD8d5KL7VeX-xAmRL10gl5hc0Mid3hG-IvWppJWrcERpSfyONp-_F3z3xOtUpNb1hQropBv-le4qV9e3NHKNKcy1Ao3gbsoayK4oc7512ajsdV7_sgf2WY4MenWuvMm4WNvUCd_1bzFU0YSzgq1Z4pMgd4MeJqV4P-T1S3O-81wHUHJFARavUIzr5OFDTh6vF9y2Z2X1ib9fkHkTDotOHx6KR17mapdkrO_wXfvXwQL7BEpjtNp4n9mooHFko0wKfhL1Eoy2oDJjPlMQy3CQJXihrSeEqqQ%3D)
Friend,

It’s Wesley Hunt.

As we head into another election year, I want to ensure that the generous people supporting my reelection know why I’m running.

I was born and raised in Houston, Texas.

After graduating from high school, I felt the call to serve our nation in the military, like my father and sister before me, and I accepted an appointment to the United States Military Academy at West Point.

[](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b0339a937cce4a5cae88d7dc30d26776&_e=TShxIO05T3_tZD8d5KL7VeX-xAmRL10gl5hc0Mid3hG-IvWppJWrcERpSfyONp-_F3z3xOtUpNb1hQropBv-le4qV9e3NHKNKcy1Ao3gbsoayK4oc7512ajsdV7_sgf2WY4MenWuvMm4WNvUCd_1b-CIdfaR5OJ-m1Mm7yb4k9ydEjbGPFsP3IZGDvSZ4G-FXTxBZcxZNjtOqA9BqvCVedKDbcHlaM7wUUjlSB97DyfHtXGoBBWVzjObkABNh4cko5vh2Sgb9nKgpH-thQNF_vBcW7Mx3R4cQKWsSd6nQNg%3D) _(Me with my brother and sister, who also attended West Point)_
My service included one combat deployment to Iraq and two to Saudi Arabia, where I served as a Diplomatic Liaison Officer. While in Saudi Arabia, I represented the U.S. government in missions involving the Royal Saudi Land Forces Aviation Corps.

After completing my military service, I attended Cornell University, where I earned a Master of Business Administration (M.B.A.), a Master of Public Administration (M.P.A.), and a Master of Industrial and Labor Relations (M.I.L.R.).

I never thought I would get involved in politics, but after seeing the dysfunction and destruction wrought by liberal elites in the Democrat party, I was once again called to serve our great nation, by running for the United States Congress.

I knew that challenging the DC Washington elite wouldn’t be easy, but after flying Apache helicopters over Iraq, I knew I was prepared to take on the tough fights.

**Join me in the fight to save the future of America.**

[](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b0339a937cce4a5cae88d7dc30d26776&_e=TShxIO05T3_tZD8d5KL7VeX-xAmRL10gl5hc0Mid3hG-IvWppJWrcERpSfyONp-_F3z3xOtUpNb1hQropBv-le4qV9e3NHKNKcy1Ao3gbsoayK4oc7512ajsdV7_sgf2WY4MenWuvMm4WNvUCd_1bxaLLMVgIEhagBbze77S9ztvwFVUK1l3Xf0vjSRUjNs43swh1bHL_qBhRjmGogEpDVKkhh25vPo0BzQbrAw__P4rFFpnKlSwm8lW_92n_Hrit_6kh7IsON8NyV4mgBxCZuZemqWW_rfpIUDY_zhPoWM%3D)

**This picture** is my number one reason for serving Texans in Congress. Being a husband and a father has taught me selflessness and dedication and has instilled in me a desire to better our country for the next generation.

Now, here we are in one of the most consequential election years of our lifetime. The majority we fought so hard for in 2022 hangs in the balance, and conservative ideals are under fire every day.

**Nothing is more worth fighting for than our great country and community here at home.

| [**JOIN TEAM HUNT - DONATE TODAY**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b0339a937cce4a5cae88d7dc30d26776&_e=TShxIO05T3_tZD8d5KL7VeX-xAmRL10gl5hc0Mid3hG-IvWppJWrcERpSfyONp-_F3z3xOtUpNb1hQropBv-le4qV9e3NHKNKcy1Ao3gbsoayK4oc7512ajsdV7_sgf2WY4MenWuvMm4WNvUCd_1b6qISRuDDl2JiMPcTq-rUdVN1ZeSSfszJZDc8mMB4G3fKEIcs8LPeyF-HzgluJ4KsHOT-MCn-MJGFL453dk1asBFqTb3d593UM2xTbY1jfpGkkvPUXD8BGfAl8U9qp77oG3VJOHF2XlmNSNiFQDkkr4%3D)
---

I hope you’ll join me as we fight to put an end to all the damage the Left has done over the past three years.**

Thank you,

Wesley Hunt

* * *

name: Wes Moore
subject: Let’s play ball!
body:
Friend,

We’re less than a week out from opening day for the Orioles, and you already know that I am anxiously counting down the days. Spring is in the air and I can feel the energy ramping up. Baseball is here and I can’t wait to head over to Camden Yards to cheer on the O’s this season, and thanks to our work, the Orioles are locked in to stay here in Baltimore for the long haul.

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90457/images/unnamed%20%281%29.png]

Whether it’s hitting Pickles with all of Baltimore before the first pitch, meeting fans in the crowd, or simply cheering on our team with the family — I’m amped up and ready to go. Last season was a huge one for the O’s, this year let’s send them to the World Series!

Going to games also gives me the best chance to meet with you all as we all collectively cheer for the home team. If you see me out, don’t hesitate to say hello.

Now let’s play some ball!

Elevate,

Wes

---

Today, we're doing things a bit differently. We want to recognize and celebrate the unsung heroes in our communities — the local candidates and elected officials who are tackling the climate crisis head-on. We’re calling it the **_Nominate a Climate Champion Challenge,_** and we want you to be a part of it! Do you know a local leader or elected official who is standing up to the greedy fossil fuel industry and fighting for a sustainable future? Someone who's implementing renewable energy initiatives, advocating for environmental justice, or pushing for bold climate policies? It can be any leader, from city councilors and county supervisors to school board candidates and state legislative candidates — or anything in between. We want to hear about them! **[Click here to nominate your favorite climate champion. Let's shine a spotlight on those who are making a difference in our communities and inspiring others to join the fight against climate change.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81473839/462552464/-1608768556?refcode=ea.a27c8cbe-7fe8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.a27c8cbe-7fe8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyN2M4Y2JlLTdmZTgtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0vegSFiaznD0AEew9rxsE2aLv8lzlpl4HpNOM1Z9sHk=&emci=9c7c8cbe-7fe8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=a27c8cbe-7fe8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4823105)** **Every nomination you submit helps amplify the voices of these climate champions and supports their crucial work.** | [**Submit Your Nomination**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81473840/462552465/-1608768556?refcode=ea.a27c8cbe-7fe8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.a27c8cbe-7fe8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyN2M4Y2JlLTdmZTgtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0vegSFiaznD0AEew9rxsE2aLv8lzlpl4HpNOM1Z9sHk=&emci=9c7c8cbe-7fe8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=a27c8cbe-7fe8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4823105)

| | Ours is a game plan that can win – and it's so important that we do everything in our power today to build the resources to turn out every single one of these critical 53,000 voters and tip the balance toward Democrats from the city council up to Joe Biden. [**We are so close to setting a course for a stronger democracy, expanded voting rights, and economic justice – will you take the next step towards that future by contributing to support our 53,000 voter turnout goal?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81474216/462553813/-327605227?refcode=2024-03-22-win-fwd&recurring=&amount=11&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8e53209f-80e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTUzMjA5Zi04MGU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ppE9TN9zF_lHAqpDJvEkzVjWRZ_iPSUzzDb53uqB-dc=) We're genuinely grateful for your support, _Sarah_ Forwarded Message | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81474217/462553814/855222454?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTUzMjA5Zi04MGU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ppE9TN9zF_lHAqpDJvEkzVjWRZ_iPSUzzDb53uqB-dc=&emci=81bf7e10-72e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=8e53209f-80e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=5534179)

53,000 votes can make the difference between tipping the balance for the White House across nine states this November – or not.
[Donate Now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81474218/462553815/-327605227?refcode=2024-03-22-win-fwd&recurring=&amount=11&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8e53209f-80e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTUzMjA5Zi04MGU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ppE9TN9zF_lHAqpDJvEkzVjWRZ_iPSUzzDb53uqB-dc=)
**So, here's the game plan.**
We're going to win 53,000 votes in 9 states by running 1,000 local Democratic candidates in targeted battleground districts. Candidates, county committees, and volunteers will have thousands of neighbor-to-neighbor conversations, generating enthusiasm and expanding the electorate.
Leveraging the "reverse coattails" effect means we can reliably persuade, mobilize, and turn out a new crop of voters for Democrats up and down the ballot.
[**We're pledging a big investment, but we can't hit every district, precinct, and voter without you stepping up, too. Can we count on you to chip in $11 to put this plan to win the White House in motion?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81474219/462553816/-327605227?refcode=2024-03-22-win-fwd&recurring=&amount=11&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8e53209f-80e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTUzMjA5Zi04MGU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ppE9TN9zF_lHAqpDJvEkzVjWRZ_iPSUzzDb53uqB-dc=)
Local candidates and volunteers on the ground are the megaphone educating rural voters about what's gotten done under President Biden – critically important issues like expanded broadband internet, clean energy jobs, American manufacturing, and more.
[**This plan requires deep and targeted investments on the local level to win these 53,000 votes and ensure Democratic victories from top to bottom. But, we must hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal by March 31st to make this happen. Toss $11 in the hat, and let's get to work!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/81474220/462553817/-327605227?refcode=2024-03-22-win-fwd&recurring=&amount=11&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8e53209f-80e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTUzMjA5Zi04MGU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ppE9TN9zF_lHAqpDJvEkzVjWRZ_iPSUzzDb53uqB-dc=)
We'll see you on the ground in Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, North Carolina, Nevada, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Ohio, and Montana!

clean_body: 53,000 votes is all it takes. | | | Ours is a game plan that can win – and it's so important that we do everything in our power today to build the resources to turn out every single one of these critical 53,000 voters and tip the balance toward Democrats from the city council up to Joe Biden. = We're genuinely grateful for your support, Sarah Forwarded Message | 53,000 votes can make the difference between tipping the balance for the White House across nine states this November – or not. = So, here's the game plan. We're going to win 53,000 votes in 9 states by running 1,000 local Democratic candidates in targeted battleground districts. Candidates, county committees, and volunteers will have thousands of neighbor-to-neighbor conversations, generating enthusiasm and expanding the electorate. Leveraging the "reverse coattails" effect means we can reliably persuade, mobilize, and turn out a new crop of voters for Democrats up and down the ballot. = Local candidates and volunteers on the ground are the megaphone educating rural voters about what's gotten done under President Biden – critically important issues like expanded broadband internet, clean energy jobs, American manufacturing, and more. = We'll see you on the ground in Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, North Carolina, Nevada, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Ohio, and Montana! name: Debbie
subject: what could YOU do with $64 million?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
For my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott, $64 million is next to nothing.
| | |
---
| | **Listen, friend:**
---
**Just imagine how much you could do if $64 million appeared in your bank account right now.**
---
It's enough to comfortably retire — _50 times over._
---
It's enough to send a whole classroom of kids to _ any_ college of their choosing.
---
It's enough to ensure your family's financial security for generations, long after you're gone.
---
**_For my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott, $64 million is next to nothing._ **
---
That's how much of his own fortune he spent to bankroll his last campaign,
just to win by 0.12% of the nearly 8.2 million votes cast. **That's** **$6,379 for each one.**
---
(_Perhaps it's no wonder he didn't anticipate the nationwide, bipartisan backlash over his proposal to end Social Security and Medicare._)
---
So if $64 million was only enough to secure _*that thin*_ of a margin of victory back in 2018, then believe me:
---
**He will shell out as much — _if not more_ — to defeat me this fall.**
---
Unlike my opponent, I'm proud to be running a truly grassroots movement to flip Florida and defend our Senate majority.

_That also means I don't have a nearly quarter-billion dollar fortune to my name._
---
**[**So in order to defeat my out-of-touch opponent and his self-funded war chest this year, I'm going to need your help: **** Friend — if you're ready to join this people-powered movement in the fight to flip Florida blue, will you chip in $5 (or whatever you can spare) before midnight? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81474420/462554392/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk960-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzM3Yjc2MmMtODFlOC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tfbDWAsIMCqIiuuoRsxifRt3cbxkCR4qTvPEfDyz4Jo=)**

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Three weeks on the road
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Earlier this month, I spent three weeks on the road leading conversations
across the country about the voting rights struggles and victories that
have made us the world’s greatest democracy.

My hope was that we could encourage more people to take the kind of direct
action that we so badly need at this moment — whether that’s voting,
volunteering, or holding those who undermine our democracy accountable. I
got to meet a lot of people doing great work, and came back more hopeful,
more optimistic about our country and our future.

The first stop was in Minot, North Dakota — where we talked about recent
voting rights victories won by the Turtle Mountain Band of Chippewa
Indians and the Spirit Lake Tribe. From there, I traveled to meet people
in Minneapolis, Milwaukee, and Petoskey in northern Michigan.

In addition to voting rights, I heard what people are thinking about the
presidential election, immigration, gun policy, abortion, and the economy.
Everyone I met understood that action is both the key to victory and the
antidote to despair. People were getting the job done and they were
smiling and having fun while they were at it!

In Shepherdstown, West Virginia I met with students at Shepherd University
before addressing a packed house that evening. There was so much hope, so
much optimism in the air, so many people unwilling to accept the status
quo as their permanent future. They are fully in the fight there, not
waiting for someone to ride to their rescue.

In Oxford, Mississippi, I had the chance to speak at the historic Square
Books to folks who’d come in from Oxford and surrounding communities.
Again, the attitude was less “what are they doing to us?” and more “let’s
do this!”

And everywhere I went, I was reminded of our history — how we got here,
the battles we’ve fought, the victories that have made America possible.
Just miles out of Shepherdstown I had the chance to walk through the
Antietam Battlefield, where on just one day during the Civil War, more
than 26,000 soldiers were wounded or killed. It was the bloodiest day in
American history and one that helped decide the fundamental question of
the war. Only days later, Abraham Lincoln announced that enslaved people
would soon be free in what has been referred to as his “preliminary”
Emancipation Proclamation.

When I finished a morning run in Montgomery a few days later, I looked up
to a sign outside my hotel that told me that where I’d slept the night
before had at one time been the site of the first Confederate White House
(Montgomery was then the provisional Confederate capital). Amazing,
because only blocks away was the church basement where Dr. Martin Luther
King Jr. and Rosa Parks ran the 1955 Montgomery bus boycott, which is a
short walk from the Greyhound bus terminal where young freedom riders were
beaten unconscious in 1961. So much defining American history within a few
blocks.

But that’s true just about anywhere you go. Taking the time to drive to
each city (just under 5,000 miles total) and then to really listen and
learn about what inspires people about their town, what they want you and
the rest of the world to know about them, what they’re fighting, what
they’re working for, what they fear and what they dream, I just can’t help
but be proud of my fellow Americans.

We’ve come through a lot, from the Civil War to Civil Rights, binding this
nation together in shared sacrifice and purpose. And the people I’ve met
along the way are doing their best to honor the legacy that’s been left by
the generations before ours.

We know that we can overcome the threats to this country — the looming
authoritarianism of Trump, the rollback of constitutional rights by an
extremely conservative Supreme Court, the threat of political violence
that increases by the day — because we’ve overcome these kinds of threats
before, against much larger odds.

There are good people out there, doing what they can, with what they have,
where they are. And when we come together — in book talks, in political
clubs, in bars and coffee shops, in voter registration programs like the
one Powered by People is running in Texas — we recognize that there are
more of us than we had allowed ourselves to believe. Our strength is in
our numbers, in our history, in our willingness to push forward, whatever
the odds or circumstances.

We’re going to make it.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1001&akid=239529%2E444211%2EwYQ6f0

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
subject: I’d love for you to join me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
This announcement is going to shake up the political establishment.

|
---
| | | [**This announcement is really going to shake up the political establishment.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/vp-announcement?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vp_announcement_rfk_3_22_24_a4&n=1)

---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/vp-announcement?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vp_announcement_rfk_3_22_24_a4&n=2)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vp_announcement_rfk_3_22_24_a4&n=3)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/vp-announcement?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vp_announcement_rfk_3_22_24_a4&n=4)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
You’ve probably heard by now that I’m about to announce my running mate, the person who will stand by my side as Vice President.
Despite some misinformation circulating in the press, rest assured that I will set the record straight on March 26th in Oakland.
I am thrilled to introduce this remarkable individual who will not only serve as my partner in governance but will also embody the qualities needed to lead our great nation.
While I cannot tell you who it is right now, I can confidently say that they are the perfect companion to navigate the challenges ahead. And I’ll give you another hint: _this announcement is really going to shake up the political establishment_.
[I’d love for you to join me in Oakland to welcome this dynamic person into our campaign.](https://www.kennedy24.com/vp-announcement?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vp_announcement_rfk_3_22_24_a4&n=5)
[RSVP Now](https://www.kennedy24.com/vp-announcement?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vp_announcement_rfk_3_22_24_a4&n=6)
Together, we’re about to take my campaign to a whole new level.
Stay tuned for further updates, and get ready to witness history in the making.
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
Independent Candidate for President of the United States

clean_body: The House GOP's political games are putting people at risk. | | = Team, Over and over again, the House GOP blocks critical legislation and humanitarian aid — putting the American people and our allies in jeopardy. Our allies in Ukraine are fighting against Putin's brutal, relentless assault with their bare hands as supplies reach catastrophic lows — all while the House GOP plays politics, preventing us from delivering critical aid to save the lives of the Ukrainian people. It's clear: the House GOP is undermining democracy and our allies to score political points. That's not all. And after complaining unendingly about the border, the House GOP turned down a bipartisan deal on border security policy and investments — all at Trump's cynical request to avoid addressing the situation. Helping our country is always an afterthought for him. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = = — Pascrell HQ | The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. name: Team Alsobrooks
subject: Here’s the math
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=1275%2E52803%2E-NeLPd)

| | Peter, The thing about me is that I’m a numbers guy. And I’m looking at our numbers for Early Vote and they are **BIG**! Let me break it down for you: _1) Early vote is roughly**20% of the total vote.**_ _2) Early vote starts in**41 days** on May 2nd._ _3) May**2nd** , May **8th** , and May **9th** will be the biggest early vote days._ _4)**82%** of the early vote will be cast in the big **6** counties: Anne Arundel, Baltimore City and county, Howard, Montgomery, and Prince George’s County._ _5) There are**60 early vote polling locations** in those 6 counties._ _6) Every polling location will be open**13 hours.**_ _7) We need**2 volunteers** at every location for each **4 hour shift.**_ _8) That means we need to recruit over**2,520 shifts** to watch the polls during early vote._ Reaching voters at the polls is our last chance to persuade everyone to vote for Angela and we can’t leave any votes on the table during early vote! To hit our goals, we need to recruit at least 25% of our total shifts this week. That’s at least 630 shifts. **Can we count on you to watch the polls at least 5 times during early vote?** | | | [Yes, I can do 5+ shifts!](http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15324?t=7&akid=1275%2E52803%2E-NeLPd)
---
| | [Yes, I can do 4 shifts!](http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15324?t=8&akid=1275%2E52803%2E-NeLPd)
---
| | [Yes, I can do 3 shifts!](http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15324?t=9&akid=1275%2E52803%2E-NeLPd)
---
| | [Yes, I can do 2 shifts!](http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15324?t=10&akid=1275%2E52803%2E-NeLPd)
---
| | [Yes, I can do at least 1 shift!](http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15324?t=11&akid=1275%2E52803%2E-NeLPd)
---
I know it’s a big ask, but we need to do big things if we want to win against big money. Thank you for being a part of this team. You can find all our early vote shifts at **[angelaalsobrooks.com/earlyvote](http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15324?t=12&akid=1275%2E52803%2E-NeLPd)**.
Can’t watch the polls? Find other ways to get involved at **[angelaalsobrooks.com/events](http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12166?t=13&akid=1275%2E52803%2E-NeLPd)**.
In Solidarity,
Nick Meier
Organizing Director

| | I'll never forget the first time I was elected to the Nebraska Legislature in 2016. I'll never forget because I was so humbled by the way voters rallied behind my campaign. We knocked tens of thousands of doors, made countless calls, and won by taking our message directly to people. I'm hoping you'll give that same energy to my campaign for Congress [**— because right now, I need your support more than ever before.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81474719/462555410/1698357921?refcode=20240322_em_fr_b1_ntony_30_op_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmE3NDc5My04MmU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TeEC7D2JLWx3zpmnfH37sn5dmZG2zg-83IkFAIBZOIQ=) [**_To be honest with you, my race is emerging as one of the most consequential fights in our effort to retake the House from Republican extremists. Flipping Nebraska’s Second Congressional district could put Democrats back in control and end this reign of chaos. Not only that, it would mean electing a strong, capable representative that Nebraska families deserve to fight for them. So please, could you send in $15 to my campaign before my midnight deadline? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81474720/462555411/1698357921?refcode=20240322_em_fr_b1_ntony_30_op_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmE3NDc5My04MmU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TeEC7D2JLWx3zpmnfH37sn5dmZG2zg-83IkFAIBZOIQ=) I’ll be frank with you: Everything is on the line in this election. From lowering healthcare costs, to protecting Medicare and Social Security, to restoring abortion rights, we can’t afford to let Bacon’s extreme allies buy him another win. [**_That’s why I’m sincerely asking: Will you send in $15 — or whatever you can spare — before my midnight deadline? body:

Peter, here’s the truth:
If everyone reading this message donated $10 to Ruben Gallego’s campaign, we’d have the resources we need to absolutely CRUSH our fundraising goals before our first official FEC deadline of the Election Year.
And look — we send a lot of emails. We know that. We know you can’t chip in to every single one that hits your inbox. That would be ridiculous.
But if you are one of the people who understands how important this race is, how critical Arizona is to control of the Senate, and how we’ve got to hold the line here if we’re going to have any shot at defeating Donald Trump... we’re hoping you can chip in to this email.

name: Team Mazie
subject: Commitment and trust
body:
|
#
Peter, Mazie knows that when you chip in your hard-earned money toward her re-election campaign, you’re not just making a donation. **You’re making an investment.** An investment in her bold, progressive agenda for our working families, our planet, and our future. An investment to ensure the voices of AANHPI and immigrant communities are represented in the Senate. An investment in our movement to hold the right-wing Supreme Court accountable, defend reproductive freedom, and promote workers’ rights. And as we get closer to Election Day, an investment that will pay dividends in preserving our razor-thin Democratic majority. Mazie never takes your donations for granted, Peter. She knows that chipping in to her campaign takes commitment and trust. It’s why she’s so proud that grassroots supporters like you power her campaign — because while she fights for us in the Senate, she knows she can count on this team to fight for her, too. name: VoteVets HQ
subject: An update on our Ukraine work
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
We wanted to send you an update on our work pushing the House to pass aid for Ukraine.
#
Derek:
We wanted to send you an update on our work pushing the House to pass aid for Ukraine.
**FIRST:** You probably know that we spent $100,000 running our ad, Pointe du Hoc, on FOX News using Ronald Reagan’s words to push the GOP to buck Trump, stand up for democracy, and support Ukraine.
**THEN:** VoteVets also had a huge press conference on Capitol Hill with our supporters, Members of Congress, Senators, Alex Vindman, and American Veterans who fought in Ukraine.
**FINALLY:** We also put our new ad, Pointe du Hoc, on a mobile billboard, a big truck with TV screens on all sides, and drove that around Capitol Hill all day. At the end of the day, we broadcast Pointe du Hoc on the RNC itself.
That was **Phase One.**
**Phase Two** starts next week, because Speaker Johnson is letting the House leave for a two week “Spring Break” even though they’ve not come close to finishing the work on their desks. While Ukraine is fighting for their survival.
We’ll have more details on the next phase early next week, but we think you’ll like what we’ve got planned.
[**In the meantime, if you want to support what we’re doing, we’d be honored if you made a donation. Everything we accomplish happens thanks to the support we receive from people like you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-mar24.OaHNWk&refcode=em240322-1-30&t=1&akid=24995%2E3013755%2Ep11T-c)

name: Team Engel
subject: Kirsten has been busy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Peter,
Our campaign has been busy.
We recently announced endorsements from Planned Parenthood, the Brady PAC, and the American Federation of Government Employees. We also launched our merch store [https://store.engelforarizona.com/] . And Kirsten has been out in the district nonstop to meet with voters and spread our message.
We’re a people-powered campaign. Right now, we have incredible momentum — but we’re going to have to work hard through Election Day to defeat our Republican opponent’s dark-money-backed campaign.
We included some highlights from the month below. You can check them out and then chip in to support Kirsten in her campaign to flip southern Arizona blue and fight for our working families in Congress >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act]
Kirsten stopped by the UA Women's basketball team game to cheer on our Wildcats. While technically not a campaign stop, it was a great time. Bear down and go Cats!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act]
To kick off Women’s History Month, Kirsten attended the League of Women Voters of Greater Tucson Breakfast Forum on Missing & Murdered Indigenous People. In the Arizona legislature, she worked hard to ensure these terrible crimes got the attention they deserve — and she’ll continue to do so in Congress.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act]
Kirsten canvassed around Cochise County with Supervisor candidate Joy Banks. She heard from voters who want to see their leaders work across the aisle to get things done — precisely what Kirsten will do in Congress!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act]
At the Sun City Democratic and Independent candidate forum, Kirsten discussed the importance of water security for Arizona and protecting reproductive rights nationwide.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act]
Kirsten visited Casa Alitas, a facility that provides shelter, necessities, and travel assistance to asylum seekers — and helps prevent street releases. Without the Bipartisan Border Security Bill, they’ll lose the funding they need to keep their doors open.
This is the most competitive race in Arizona.
At the end of March, our quarterly fundraising numbers will become public — and everyone will be looking to see if we have the resources to take on Kirsten’s MAGA opponent and the establishment standing behind him.
Last year, we were outspent 6:1. We won’t let that happen again.
Will you chip in now to support Kirsten’s campaign for Congress? We have less than two weeks to hit our fundraising goal before our numbers go public. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act]
Thank you, Peter, for all that you do.
Team Engel
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_032224_EOQ_A_recap_act]

[] Kirsten visited Casa Alitas, a facility that provides shelter, necessities, and travel assistance to asylum seekers — and helps prevent street releases. Without the Bipartisan Border Security Bill, they’ll lose the funding they need to keep their doors open. This is the most competitive race in Arizona. At the end of March, our quarterly fundraising numbers will become public — and everyone will be looking to see if we have the resources to take on Kirsten’s MAGA opponent and the establishment standing behind him. Last year, we were outspent 6:1. We won’t let that happen again. Will you chip in now to support Kirsten’s campaign for Congress? We have less than two weeks to hit our fundraising goal before our numbers go public. [] DONATE NOW [] Thank you, Peter, for all that you do. Team Engel [] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: AIPAC knows the tide is turning against them.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We launched the Reject AIPAC coalition the very same week the right-wing
lobby group held its Congressional Summit in Washington, D.C., bringing
1,600 donors and members of U.S. House and Senate leadership together to
discuss their 2024 election strategy and lobby lawmakers for more
unconditional military aid to Israel.

The GOP megadonor-funded group knows the tide is turning against them. As
a result, they reportedly asked top donors to give more money to fuel
their attacks against progressive incumbents in this year’s primaries.

They even showed a video montage of Squad members criticizing Israel’s
genocide and human rights abuses against innocent Palestinians, followed
by a panel featuring their own hand-picked, moderate candidates
challenging Reps. Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman.

And they heard directly from far-right Benjamin Netanyahu himself via
video call.

While AIPAC rallies its dark money megadonors to help them try to oust the
progressive champions standing up for human rights, we’re building a
people-powered movement to reject their toxic money and influence in the
Democratic Party.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240322.ApX_HB&refcode=em20240322-33901&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=33901%2E1203867%2Eu8-GVh ]Will you fuel our work to counter AIPAC’s attacks and re-elect our
pro-peace incumbents during this crucial election year by pitching in
$5 now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240322.ApX_HB&refcode=em20240322-33901&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1020&akid=33901%2E1203867%2Eu8-GVh ]Contribute $5

If we come together in this moment, we can not only protect the Squad, but
we can also stop AIPAC’s interference in our Democratic primaries and
their dangerous influence on U.S. foreign policy.

Thanks for all you do,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240322-33901-footer&t=1021&refcode2=33901_1203867_u8-GVh&akid=33901%2E1203867%2Eu8-GVh

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=33901%2E1203867%2Eu8-GVh

Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603

[**If Senator Schumer and the left are coming after me with this much money, I know I must be doing something right.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=12c9726334754f678f2fe6ce82440060&_e=_dXyeF4ezP8S9et6hhTG7c4YPhmjVR9wPRUAVzSjXsi_Zt4NimvbmPLGRHwRDVOqodmA1IE_S31f-TuG8vaV5c4Bp8KzsgAbaWm-DlFcukY04XRkKAPUJZHy8M3h_7DL0dRcDY0WewfQlX5rHGveNv9kMaQcnQ3Aqp3f7LeqUbvDpO9YP522ls06izMsf4GVLf4oBFZSaFgOLSXUpjgFVXJDcl03vOv6mlDtaJaqJ3D5Lq67l650iWCaOWNSMNY46LFBneZVjrAXpH2pFxoBU_Ar8ioC2jYeyJjI-5S6PEiDBM-I-0XUWzeEDnivJNuJ_ryPFeB7SpBuaxqakEo6yli78VXYGqmcMn0ke0FXbimwAudSg4_jynyBxq2pyxLk-jB8wHfzC8GvCxrhiAJCrQd2tNghsxz5vM61uYpJ6Eg%3D) The Left loves to target strong Republican candidates - it's why they are attacking me.

name: Chairman Michael Whatley
subject: I wanted to personally deliver this invitation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
I want you to join the Chairman’s Society.
[](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e02a9b02ec13424ba2ebb734f97ac129&_e=nFvhveLPDk1uf5eIqZjObx0gTSTk6NpGcyvUq3-9xx9LTp93Cqz5cEbZoPNIicBbyoG5avw85UWlMsOhrEuIbyoodS1hh5qI0PKlzLEfkpZjjriRyYWoX0HqqmhRG6qIaZBds2CkRgNb6_zsOWeHHjHzp8Mq6xAlhSFlD4HJv9npLurQr0dTl_MAVMCilrRYUtPluW8beQnSlH_KSHg8WcxAj0yqQF4SnCG5AGBfJiUdFGcd-HXBV3mVDqtSKabwXK69hw4KX8rf9mKumduyxbE3yli0KOuVo37jScvOp6MI3329s7xJyUKmdlLOrB7AoMCDybEONQxXHH8zqcE2bQn_DN4i3SmAUHvTsd2aWbdwuE_m9gS1Y3PrO7yd_ExOi-IZUqqqZHphks1mWVI2NacZuYVG2zxUgKJ_kiTa9W3l7iZYxsZo5HPdTWfd3Oqu0DL01M5QFP9v0Fq53rIX7XsuIxtA66TxjE6501viGD0%3D)

Fellow American,

As the new RNC Chairman, I'm looking to put together a group of grassroots advisors I can trust to help make the decisions that will catapult Republicans across the country to victory.

_My team identified you as one of the top candidates in your area to be part of that effort. Spring's here, and it's time to declutter – not just our homes but our political climate too. name: Kevin
subject: Under attack, again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Reproductive rights are under attack, again.
As the Supreme Court’s decision lingers over new restrictions on reproductive rights, notably through limiting access to mifepristone , it underscores the vital work ahead of us.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Repro.jpg]
^Dr. Bob Lorinser speaking at reproductive rights rally.
We have only nine days until the end of our fundraising quarter and I'm asking you to please chip in today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] to help ensure a future where reproductive rights are protected and respected.
With your help, Dr. Bob can work tirelessly to codify Roe.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friends
The passage of Prop 3 was a significant step in safeguarding reproductive freedom in Michigan, yet the GOP, spearheaded by figures like Jack Bergman, persists in eroding these freedoms.
Dr. Bob Lorinser's opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman wants to restrict IVF and institute a national abortion ban.
In contrast, Dr. Bob, during his 2022 Congressional campaign, not only supported Prop 3 but he also facilitated its promotion, gathering signatures and hosting events to protect reproductive healthcare rights.
We held 350 events, offering platforms for advocates and aligning with candidates to voice their support for reproductive rights.
Dr. Bob has shown his unwavering support for choice, liberty, and medical privacy.
Medical decisions should remain private, respected between a woman and her doctor, free from governmental overreach.
If you agree, if you want to defeat people like Rep. Jack Bergman, I'm asking for your help [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] today.
To win, we need you with us in this critical fight.
-Kevin
Kevin Numerick
Campaign Manager
Dr. Bob for Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

With your help, Dr. Bob can work tirelessly to codify Roe. CONTRIBUTE [] Friends The passage of Prop 3 was a significant step in safeguarding reproductive freedom in Michigan, yet the GOP, spearheaded by figures like Jack Bergman, persists in eroding these freedoms. Dr. Bob Lorinser's opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman wants to restrict IVF and institute a national abortion ban. In contrast, Dr. Bob, during his 2022 Congressional campaign, not only supported Prop 3 but he also facilitated its promotion, gathering signatures and hosting events to protect reproductive healthcare rights. We held 350 events, offering platforms for advocates and aligning with candidates to voice their support for reproductive rights. Dr. Bob has shown his unwavering support for choice, liberty, and medical privacy. Medical decisions should remain private, respected between a woman and her doctor, free from governmental overreach. If you agree, if you want to defeat people like Rep. Jack Bergman, I'm asking for your help [] today. name: Rick Larsen
subject: I will not let hate go unanswered — especially from members of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
CW: Sexual Misconduct / LGBTQIA+ Hate
|
---
| | This month, I participated in a hearing on combatting and addressing sexual assault within the U.S. Coast Guard Academy. **I wrote to you about this issue back in September, sharing that I was cosponsoring a new piece of bipartisan legislation that would help protect our cadets when reporting instances of sexual misconduct**(you can read more about this in the forwarded email below). As you can imagine, I was eager to discuss this and other issues within the U.S. Coast Guard and determine what my colleagues in Congress and I could do to better support this branch of government through legislative and awareness efforts. **However, one of my colleagues dedicated his time in the meeting to spewing hateful disinformation about members of the LGBTQIA+ community within our military.** Let me make one thing clear: hate has no place _anywhere_ , but especially not within the halls of Congress or aimed at our dedicated servicepeople. I could not sit there and let another member of Congress read bigotry into the record unchallenged. I spoke up and, in no uncertain terms, made clear that my colleague's remarks were ignorant, unacceptable, and dangerous. **He and so many other members of the chaos caucus are determined to spread hate, misinformation, and fearmonger to inflame their base – all the while ignoring the real human beings whose lives they threaten.** That is not okay with me. That is why I spoke up. **Friends,****** when it co**mes to matters like this one, I will always stand up against hate, and I hope you will, too. ** Hopefully, I will have an update for you in a few weeks on the original objective of that hearing: ensuring the safety of our Coast Guard cadets. **I will not allow this issue to get co-opted by the chaos caucus for political culture wars, it is too important.** More soon, _Rick_ \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rick Larsen <campaign@ricklarsen.org>
Date: Thu, Sep 21, 2023 at 9:51 AM
Subject: New Legislation to Support U.S. Coast Guard Cadets
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com I am cosponsoring a piece of bipartisan legislation that would help protect our U.S. Coast Guard Academy cadets from being disciplined for minor collateral misconduct (think: underaged drinking, or violating curfew) when reporting sexual assault. Why now? Three reasons:
1. **Operation Fouled Anchor** : New information is available from a six-year internal investigation that looked into dozens of cases of sexual assault and misconduct from 1988-2006. The Coast Guard Academy has been mishandling these cases and must swiftly course-correct.
2. **Consistency Across Academies:** This policy change not only helps support survivors of sexual assault get the care and support they need, it also ensures that the Coast Guard cadets have the same provisions as the Department of Defense military academies through The National Defense Authorization Act in 2021.
3. **Supporting Survivors:** Finally, there is no shortage of action we can take at the Congressional- and community-level to help support survivors and work towards a world where these egregious assaults are a thing of the past.

Through policy changes like this one, we can usher in a new era of safety and security. _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: CW: Sexual Misconduct / LGBTQIA+ Hate | | | This month, I participated in a hearing on combatting and addressing sexual assault within the U.S. Coast Guard Academy. I wrote to you about this issue back in September, sharing that I was cosponsoring a new piece of bipartisan legislation that would help protect our cadets when reporting instances of sexual misconduct(you can read more about this in the forwarded email below). As you can imagine, I was eager to discuss this and other issues within the U.S. Coast Guard and determine what my colleagues in Congress and I could do to better support this branch of government through legislative and awareness efforts. However, one of my colleagues dedicated his time in the meeting to spewing hateful disinformation about members of the LGBTQIA+ community within our military. Let me make one thing clear: hate has no place anywhere , but especially not within the halls of Congress or aimed at our dedicated servicepeople. I could not sit there and let another member of Congress read bigotry into the record unchallenged. I spoke up and, in no uncertain terms, made clear that my colleague's remarks were ignorant, unacceptable, and dangerous. He and so many other members of the chaos caucus are determined to spread hate, misinformation, and fearmonger to inflame their base – all the while ignoring the real human beings whose lives they threaten. That is not okay with me. That is why I spoke up. Friends,** when it comes to matters like this one, I will always stand up against hate, and I hope you will, too. Hopefully, I will have an update for you in a few weeks on the original objective of that hearing: ensuring the safety of our Coast Guard cadets. I will not allow this issue to get co-opted by the chaos caucus for political culture wars, it is too important. More soon, Rick \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rick Larsen <campaign@ricklarsen.org> Date: Thu, Sep 21, 2023 at 9:51 AM Subject: New Legislation to Support U.S. Coast Guard Cadets To: dpwillis67@gmail.com I am cosponsoring a piece of bipartisan legislation that would help protect our U.S. Coast Guard Academy cadets from being disciplined for minor collateral misconduct (think: underaged drinking, or violating curfew) when reporting sexual assault. Why now? Three reasons: 1. Operation Fouled Anchor : New information is available from a six-year internal investigation that looked into dozens of cases of sexual assault and misconduct from 1988-2006. The Coast Guard Academy has been mishandling these cases and must swiftly course-correct. 2. Consistency Across Academies: This policy change not only helps support survivors of sexual assault get the care and support they need, it also ensures that the Coast Guard cadets have the same provisions as the Department of Defense military academies through The National Defense Authorization Act in 2021. 3. Supporting Survivors: Finally, there is no shortage of action we can take at the Congressional- and community-level to help support survivors and work towards a world where these egregious assaults are a thing of the past. Through policy changes like this one, we can usher in a new era of safety and security. Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by .** Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen PO Box 326 Everett, WA 98206 United States Email is an important way for Rick Larsen to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Team Evers
subject: Did you see Tony’s note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek — did you
see Tony’s message?

We recently witnessed egregious actions by Republicans in their firing of
another 8 highly qualified public servants appointed by Tony. Not only is
this a petty, partisan attack, but a blatant abuse of power.

We need to show them that we won’t stand for these actions by fighting
back against Republican extremism nationally and right here in Wisconsin.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2236?amount=&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_1.2&t=1001&akid=6662%2E1827488%2EgZgpHY ]Can we count on you to stand with us and chip in here before our
deadline on Sunday to close our $18,429 budget gap?

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Begin Forwarded Message:

Derek,

This is serious, so I’ll get right to the
point. The Republicans in the Senate will stop at nothing to with their
petty partisan politics – even if it means attacking hard working public
servants.

I take my job seriously, which is why I’ve always taken great care in
appointing hard working Wisconsinites focused on results, not partisan
games, to serve on the boards, commissions and councils of state
government.

Instead of putting our state first, Senate Republicans abused their power
by baselessly firing another 8 of these highly qualified appointees. We’re
witnessing attacks on our democracy right here in Wisconsin, and it’s time
to fight back.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2236?amount=&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_1.2&t=1002&akid=6662%2E1827488%2EgZgpHY ]That’s why I’m asking you to click here and pitch in to help us close
our $24,219 budget gap before our final deadline before end-of-quarter on
Sunday at midnight.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2243?refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_1.2&t=1003&akid=6662%2E1827488%2EgZgpHY ]Donate $5 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2238?refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_1.2&t=1004&akid=6662%2E1827488%2EgZgpHY ]Donate $10 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2239?refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_1.2&t=1005&akid=6662%2E1827488%2EgZgpHY ]Donate $25 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2244?refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_1.2&t=1006&akid=6662%2E1827488%2EgZgpHY ]Donate $100 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2245?refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_1.2&t=1007&akid=6662%2E1827488%2EgZgpHY ]Donate $250 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2236?amount=&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_1.2&t=1008&akid=6662%2E1827488%2EgZgpHY ]Another Amount

These are unprecedented attacks on capable Wisconsinites who are offering
their time to serve our state and are indispensable to our government.
When asked for answers, all the Republicans can provide are ridiculous
excuses that hide the truth — these appointees were wrongly fired because
they don’t serve their extreme political agendas.

While I am glad to be able to make new exceptional appointments of public
servants who I know will do good work on behalf of the people of our
state, there is no excuse for Republicans firing good folks for no reason.

Politics isn’t about agendas or strict partisanship,
Derek, it's
about serving the people. The honorable public servants who I appoint are
dedicated to doing just that, and these attacks on their hard work are
both petty, and egregious.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2236?amount=&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Mar2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_1.2&t=1009&akid=6662%2E1827488%2EgZgpHY ]Stand up against these attacks against democracy in Wisconsin and in
the Presidential race by pitching in what you can here.

Onward,

Tony

Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin

name: John Rich
subject: I’m not emailing you about my music
body:
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=34593d2345ec4b1cab72e9f9a46ada20&_e=eAYEtqZKQGCM6GxnR3jLv7Ui9iKg0k8uloItyv8LWZCVnnUVw_Dd22gAfLKkS87Iuep-PYesoAdVOxD4LmqqAgBGhFgihq8Mb6hAOoZoKft-86I7X8ggfCTa5l_AgzcnMeM_vEG5mqKJBtnoHBnYlcueMVFOwxtHtBritOJVy2iev8_e8TiVQP9wXvYbcwVFlVdygvZhz-aXvGfgwbnaGWjlHxaK8d3TlCdxu6LR6BdklIyAbgLdQ3DB_jcr2Cm41yYika693wsqNuNvDjt4yt5Rf22UsFoz_vz-ECjkeKuwOHN7POwDDia768DqPkQVOqFu3JjEOtwKtG4h1Bg96TPa0A-mazSpl5A6lCbGDduCXPa7bVTGY8QAOtzp_YsiDLQuS1mIEa6cf3MSPPUxF3KWr6k_VnMox1q7KOodw5-yu_FbyPwkP9UdmEHqe1M55IjUzee2NzsM32clkMJTsg%3D%3D "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Peter,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, "Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?"

My buddy Kirk Cameron did some research and discovered a shocking truth about the culprit putting disgusting materials in school libraries.

It's not Woke teachers (although they don't help).
It's not even school boards.
It's Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows, Huckleberry Finn, and other classics.

Scholastic is now promoting books like _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.

clean_body: "SkyTree Book Fairs" Peter, Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools. But have you ever wondered, "Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?" My buddy Kirk Cameron did some research and discovered a shocking truth about the culprit putting disgusting materials in school libraries. It's not Woke teachers (although they don't help). It's not even school boards. It's Scholastic Book Fairs. Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows, Huckleberry Finn, and other classics. Scholastic is now promoting books like Welcome to St. Hell , which promotes trans ideology to kids. I joined Kirk Cameron recently in Nashville to promote wholesome and age-appropriate book fairs for kids. It's called SkyTree Book Fairs, and Kirk helped jumpstart this amazing organization. SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda. Here's how you can help. SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you. The Woke and radically leftwing Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda. SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances. It's the same with our kids' literature. Thank you, and God bless, John Rich P.S. Here's a photo of Kirk Cameron and I. Together, we are supporting SkyTree Book Fairs to promote wholesome, family-friendly books to kids in schools. SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

| | Friends, The way we win this election isn’t exactly a secret. And if this MAGA-fried Congress has their way, they’re going to keep making it easier and easier. Because we’re seeing the consequences of letting the Wingnuts run the show in real time. With the clock ticking toward a government shutdown, Trump’s flunkies have decided to fight over who can be more far-right instead of just doing their damn jobs. MTG, Nick LaLota, and the rest of them can’t even govern themselves, let alone the country. This is exactly what’s wrong with Congress and exactly why we have to win it back. They aren’t interested in solving problems for the American people let alone Suffolk County families. That’s a firing offense. This is what happens when hyper-partisanship is allowed to run amok. We all know we can fix this and we all know what it is going to take. We need to get back to reasoning together and finding common ground and common solutions. That’s only going to happen if we elect people who believe there’s more that unites us than divides us. The way we win is simple. When voters are given the choice between chaos and common sense, they choose common sense every time. **[MAGA is forcing that choice. It’s up to us to make sure voters get the message. That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in to support: our campaign to end this MAGA insanity and win back the House for the common sense After this deadline, we are _legally required_ to report our fundraising data. Sure, we have done that before, but this FEC deadline is different. Why? This is the first FEC deadline of the election year and the first deadline of the general election.
Our MAGA opponent, John Briscoe, has been self-funding his campaign with loads of cash, so we must report the strongest numbers we can.

Team Robert Garcia

| **MEET ERIC**

Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others.

When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children.

body:

Democrat economist Lawrence Summers released a paper in February that could help explain Americans’ current dissatisfaction with the economy and also President Joe Biden’s low poll numbers. Summers, along with two other economists, proposed that high interest rates have effectively raised prices for Americans in a way that is not captured in government inflation estimates,

Friend,

I want to introduce myself.

My name is Nella Domenici – I’m a proud New Mexican, devoted mother, wife of a Navy veteran, businesswoman, and I’m excited to announce to you that **I am running to be the next Republican U.S. Senator from New Mexico.**

**It’s not breaking news for me to say our nation and state are clearly on the wrong track.**

To say that Joe Biden and my opponent Martin Heinrich’s policies have failed us seems inadequate – _it’s like they don’t even understand us._

**The cost of living is way up, the border is wide open, our crime and drug crises are out of control, and our public education system is leaving our kids behind.**

Hardworking New Mexicans are suffering from these failures, and they demand new leadership in Washington who will improve, energize, and restore hope to our state and our country.

That’s why I’m running for Senate and **why over 8,000 voters across all of New Mexico’s 33 counties – _nearly 4 times the required amount_ – have signed the official nominating petition to put me on the ballot. **

[**We have a clear path to victory in this race, and I’m asking for your support to help me restore commonsense and impactful leadership both in New Mexico and the U.S. Senate by donating to my campaign today.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=990915120a16453484240eaea920c172&_e=OhAYdkwcuqMS1we8tG5aoMrOl0gdRI0ASc_kUCYY_W-GntEGB4oaXNx-bGzQzz4C2UyMivMHZgexdejeO7htxuvsuEalbRtF1uShvbAT9yLv5VI8rPHv5IfIz_mezO2IkAnFIFPF_cWlgW8YqNyaAuMx-8bQPJBEWQhne1KSIzbWgREjOz_65SN6oXNg-I0dbaElNiim8Tj_A_edlerAlbvArpkbaJHULgZRnfCVIgD_GKfFz0wK6GH_OtdKNnHOG6TNlY1UcGxEZDXtNVj48fu8-MdUKxFIh-6ei10dQ7xAjzrf5l33NZa07ByN_1bi8XVX9R2PXaiwQqOlbSL3XU8MzachgjTC02kdiViIv08-LpUnClVQadZULJHvYPI9_9kJBXo9b6DsKoDBin844Q%3D%3D)

[ ** JOIN THE FIGHT WITH NELLA » **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=990915120a16453484240eaea920c172&_e=OhAYdkwcuqMS1we8tG5aoMrOl0gdRI0ASc_kUCYY_W-GntEGB4oaXNx-bGzQzz4C2UyMivMHZgexdejeO7htxuvsuEalbRtF1uShvbAT9yLv5VI8rPHv5IfIz_mezO2IkAnFIFPF_cWlgW8YqNyaAuMx-8bQPJBEWQhne1KSIzbWgREjOz_65SN6oXNg-I0dbaElNiim8Tj_A_edlerAlbvArpkbaJHULgZRnfCVIgDgtUWcqq8clKNZ9hgVSY5zieu7-yWyCwjfHGJ2wl88-7ZUe8cj2kIUUuaxdzbxf5fihYyMfipauadvwrVHCs1kL9h355kELMh2KzFxkINZmo7Ky-vP5KbFlYP_ld1wamxlunG2Xrgf05IP_iVoln0gk-_JUZhYyu8qJ9or24J6wg%3D%3D)
**My family’s roots run deep in New Mexico.** Our state is blessed with abundant natural resources, cultural diversity, rich traditions, hard-working people, and leading national laboratories and military installations. **But sadly, our leaders in Washington and Santa Fe have failed us.**

I will fight to secure our borders, bring costs down, ease financial burdens on New Mexico families struggling to get by, and ensure America is once again the land of opportunity and freedom.

**I’m in this fight to win – and with your support, we will get the job done to flip this seat and restore a Republican majority in the Senate!**

[**We can and must do better for New Mexico and America. Will you join me in this fight and help me win back this seat and the Senate majority by contributing to my campaign?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=990915120a16453484240eaea920c172&_e=OhAYdkwcuqMS1we8tG5aoMrOl0gdRI0ASc_kUCYY_W-GntEGB4oaXNx-bGzQzz4C2UyMivMHZgexdejeO7htxuvsuEalbRtF1uShvbAT9yLv5VI8rPHv5IfIz_mezO2IkAnFIFPF_cWlgW8YqNyaAuMx-8bQPJBEWQhne1KSIzbWgREjOz_65SN6oXNg-I0dbaElNiim8Tj_A_edlerAlbvArpkbaJHULgZRnfCVIgDdqbm2fft4Rq0vyJ3Yob5uMWdEX7QJ8HBRNwHKPZzwOCgB4D91yyk5Zmz8Sn4dPrT7GPLcKA_zi6dUjMAcUm712oifRGcuw6hmJoUIoFj1LyeCxtpOgplcesTdK7awBLNlflsd-Vb2L-zqYqnJnbIixeXA6PrtDg03CGVpM2WXpg%3D%3D)

[ ** STAND WITH NELLA » **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=990915120a16453484240eaea920c172&_e=OhAYdkwcuqMS1we8tG5aoMrOl0gdRI0ASc_kUCYY_W-GntEGB4oaXNx-bGzQzz4C2UyMivMHZgexdejeO7htxuvsuEalbRtF1uShvbAT9yLv5VI8rPHv5IfIz_mezO2IkAnFIFPF_cWlgW8YqNyaAuMx-8bQPJBEWQhne1KSIzbWgREjOz_65SN6oXNg-I0dbaElNiim8Tj_A_edlerAlbvArpkbaJHULgZRnfCVIgDC7W_62-SAb-qeCHtOaQxqodl-c7yDeWjZ5EH-MoEmBvwj1sCPZ3dIkv9G3SpsbK-Vd44Wq2K608AXjYz2jYAvOqoAQY7RPEng6y8H4tFusExxbb3lZ995f_7QJdFXuYpg-zstwvL1x0gRiVekQL7ZXHQVVqscxjDrnH5CxFoiXw%3D%3D)

| **ABOUT NELLA**
**New Mexico is Nella Domenici’s home. She was born in Albuquerque and lived for most of her childhood in a home near the intersection of Lomas and Monroe with her seven siblings, and her parents - Pete and Nancy Domenici. Nella began her education at Our Lady of Fatima, where she learned the values she holds today. Nella is a proud third-generation New Mexican, devoted mother of two, step-mom of four, and the wife of a Navy Veteran. Nella’s family’s roots run deep in New Mexico and she and her husband Pat enjoy their family home in New Mexico that they have owned for nearly twenty years.

Like most New Mexicans, Nella Domenici understands the importance of hard work. She waited tables to help pay for her undergraduate degree from Georgetown University, and worked her way through night school at Georgetown Law while holding down a full time job. She then graduated from Harvard Business School as a Baker Scholar, top 5% of the class, while 9 months pregnant.

Nella began her career at the bottom and worked her way up through the complex finance world, eventually serving as CFO for one of the world’s largest, most successful investment firms. In her career, Nella advised, invested in, grew, and led many companies, and served on public company boards. The industries she has worked in are vast and include areas such as health care, AI, food service, lodging, commercial real estate, mortgage lending, and consumer products. These companies have ranged from small family-owned businesses, to rapidly growing venture backed enterprises, to a Fortune 200 company. Several of these have been headquartered in New Mexico. Collectively, the companies Nella has been heavily involved with have employed thousands of Americans.

Like her father and mother, Nella has been a warrior for those who most need an advocate: for women competing in academics or business, for families dealing with mental illness, and for those without access to quality healthcare or education. **

[ ** JOIN NELLA **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=990915120a16453484240eaea920c172&_e=OhAYdkwcuqMS1we8tG5aoMrOl0gdRI0ASc_kUCYY_W-GntEGB4oaXNx-bGzQzz4C2UyMivMHZgexdejeO7htxuvsuEalbRtF1uShvbAT9yLv5VI8rPHv5IfIz_mezO2IkAnFIFPF_cWlgW8YqNyaAuMx-8bQPJBEWQhne1KSIzbWgREjOz_65SN6oXNg-I0dbaElNiim8Tj_A_edlerAlbvArpkbaJHULgZRnfCVIgD8i-jIPM-T0yZAU7uGWZkN4ZQg6GDORPGAHqmPk1ycLK1dcJQ9iIbEAFVC3KMDT88yIWQzRa_4747hPn8U20KSK-XRubD_qynl_F6r3j6a7jZ3MbQ5yz0H4FnrlGQZsEmFDQjzg1NPdTwIA1uNJYvmPLdTN4isVzRFeGywHrp4zQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: I will fight to secure our borders, bring costs down, ease financial burdens on New Mexico families struggling to get by, and ensure America is once again the land of opportunity and freedom. | | Friend, I want to introduce myself. My name is Nella Domenici – I’m a proud New Mexican, devoted mother, wife of a Navy veteran, businesswoman, and I’m excited to announce to you that I am running to be the next Republican U.S. Senator from New Mexico. It’s not breaking news for me to say our nation and state are clearly on the wrong track. To say that Joe Biden and my opponent Martin Heinrich’s policies have failed us seems inadequate – it’s like they don’t even understand us. The cost of living is way up, the border is wide open, our crime and drug crises are out of control, and our public education system is leaving our kids behind. Hardworking New Mexicans are suffering from these failures, and they demand new leadership in Washington who will improve, energize, and restore hope to our state and our country. That’s why I’m running for Senate and why over 8,000 voters across all of New Mexico’s 33 counties – nearly 4 times the required amount – have signed the official nominating petition to put me on the ballot. My family’s roots run deep in New Mexico. Our state is blessed with abundant natural resources, cultural diversity, rich traditions, hard-working people, and leading national laboratories and military installations. But sadly, our leaders in Washington and Santa Fe have failed us. I will fight to secure our borders, bring costs down, ease financial burdens on New Mexico families struggling to get by, and ensure America is once again the land of opportunity and freedom. I’m in this fight to win – and with your support, we will get the job done to flip this seat and restore a Republican majority in the Senate! With you in the fight, Nella Domenici Republican for Senate | ABOUT NELLA New Mexico is Nella Domenici’s home. The first $6,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $3,300/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $3,300/$5,000 for the general election. The next $41,300/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting contact@joebiden.com. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Biden Victory Fund does not accept contributions from corporations or their PACs, unions, federal contractors, national banks, those registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA, SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies, or foreign nationals.
