Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81480229/462573562/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGQ1Mjc4NC05MWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IVVlKlOQEZuYoZsHDCscz_468zXOHRmD8fKWokphKQo=&emci=7c30de28-86e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=44d52784-91e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4925535)_ **** _Final Platform Input Tour Stop Monday on Zoom_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81480230/462573563/1219534837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGQ1Mjc4NC05MWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IVVlKlOQEZuYoZsHDCscz_468zXOHRmD8fKWokphKQo=&emci=7c30de28-86e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=44d52784-91e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4925535)** We’ve made platform tour stops in Northern, Central, and Southern Indiana, and now we’re looking forward to our final, statewide platform tour date Monday on Zoom. We’ll gather at 6 PM ET to go over the 2022 platform, hear your comments, and discuss the potential 2024 platform changes. Learn more about the tour here, and submit your comments!

**Statewide Virtual Tour: Monday, March 25, 2024 from 6-8 PM ET - Virtual on Zoom
[SIGN UP HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81480231/462573564/1219534837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGQ1Mjc4NC05MWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IVVlKlOQEZuYoZsHDCscz_468zXOHRmD8fKWokphKQo=&emci=7c30de28-86e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=44d52784-91e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4925535)** **** _One Party Supermajority Rule is Bad for Indiana_ This week, IDP Chair Mike Schmuhl had the opportunity to address Hoosier voters in an [op-ed](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81480232/462573565/-1178239643?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGQ1Mjc4NC05MWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IVVlKlOQEZuYoZsHDCscz_468zXOHRmD8fKWokphKQo=&emci=7c30de28-86e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=44d52784-91e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4925535) to the Indianapolis Star. In it, he makes the case that the Republican supermajority is unaccountable and out of touch with the needs and wants of everyday Hoosiers. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81480233/462573566/787207215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGQ1Mjc4NC05MWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IVVlKlOQEZuYoZsHDCscz_468zXOHRmD8fKWokphKQo=&emci=7c30de28-86e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=44d52784-91e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4925535)**[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81480234/462573567/787207215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGQ1Mjc4NC05MWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IVVlKlOQEZuYoZsHDCscz_468zXOHRmD8fKWokphKQo=&emci=7c30de28-86e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=44d52784-91e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4925535) [**You can read Chairman Mike Schmuhl’s op-ed in the IndyStar this week about why it’s so important we break the supermajority and elect Jennifer McCormick this fall.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81480235/462573568/-1178239643?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGQ1Mjc4NC05MWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IVVlKlOQEZuYoZsHDCscz_468zXOHRmD8fKWokphKQo=&emci=7c30de28-86e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=44d52784-91e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4925535) Next week, we’ll be bringing this message directly to Hoosiers when we launch our Break the Supermajority Tour in Carmel. We know that Hoosiers are fed up with the attacks on women’s rights, public education, and our drinking water, and we are providing an alternative. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81480236/462573569/904211391?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGQ1Mjc4NC05MWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IVVlKlOQEZuYoZsHDCscz_468zXOHRmD8fKWokphKQo=&emci=7c30de28-86e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=44d52784-91e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4925535)**[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81480237/462573570/904211391?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGQ1Mjc4NC05MWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IVVlKlOQEZuYoZsHDCscz_468zXOHRmD8fKWokphKQo=&emci=7c30de28-86e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=44d52784-91e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4925535) This week we’re featuring the work of State Rep. Victoria Garcia Wilburn (Fishers). This session, she responded to the crisis in Indiana DCS by passing bipartisan language in an amendment to protect 18-21 year olds leaving the program and starting adulthood, and protects Hoosier taxpayers who fund the program. Rep. Garcia Wilburn knows how important solving the DCS crisis is, and won’t stop until every Hoosier child has the protections they need. **** __**Honoring the Life of State Senator Jean Breaux**__ We were saddened this week by the news of the passing of Indiana State Senator Jean Breaux of Indianapolis. Jean was an incredible leader in the Senate, and we’re eternally grateful for her leadership for the City of Indianapolis. Please view tributes to her life from Hoosier Democrats below.

Being part of this Rising cohort means receiving free individual support for developing your authentic message and effective tactics to win as well as connecting with other leaders in the Great Lakes states. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Final Platform Input Tour Stop Monday on Zoom We’ve made platform tour stops in Northern, Central, and Southern Indiana, and now we’re looking forward to our final, statewide platform tour date Monday on Zoom. We’ll gather at 6 PM ET to go over the 2022 platform, hear your comments, and discuss the potential 2024 platform changes. Learn more about the tour here, and submit your comments! Statewide Virtual Tour: Monday, March 25, 2024 from 6-8 PM ET - Virtual on Zoom One Party Supermajority Rule is Bad for Indiana This week, IDP Chair Mike Schmuhl had the opportunity to address Hoosier voters in an to the Indianapolis Star. In it, he makes the case that the Republican supermajority is unaccountable and out of touch with the needs and wants of everyday Hoosiers. Next week, we’ll be bringing this message directly to Hoosiers when we launch our Break the Supermajority Tour in Carmel. We know that Hoosiers are fed up with the attacks on women’s rights, public education, and our drinking water, and we are providing an alternative. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. This week we’re featuring the work of State Rep. Victoria Garcia Wilburn (Fishers). This session, she responded to the crisis in Indiana DCS by passing bipartisan language in an amendment to protect 18-21 year olds leaving the program and starting adulthood, and protects Hoosier taxpayers who fund the program. Rep. Garcia Wilburn knows how important solving the DCS crisis is, and won’t stop until every Hoosier child has the protections they need. Honoring the Life of State Senator Jean Breaux We were saddened this week by the news of the passing of Indiana State Senator Jean Breaux of Indianapolis. Jean was an incredible leader in the Senate, and we’re eternally grateful for her leadership for the City of Indianapolis. Please view tributes to her life from Hoosier Democrats below. Become a Delegate to the 2024 State and National Conventions Stay up-to-date with the latest news and updates on the 2024 Delegate Selection process. Head to for more information about how to be a part of history next year in Chicago. Sign Up to be a Rust Belt Rising Spring 2024 Leader RBR's sessions allow you to learn from some of the best practitioners in our region to gain strategies to draw on in your campaign. Being part of this Rising cohort means receiving free individual support for developing your authentic message and effective tactics to win as well as connecting with other leaders in the Great Lakes states. Rising works with candidates for any level of office (local, state, or federal) in Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Michigan, Ohio, Indiana, and Illinois as well as staffers and volunteer activists who are helping their local campaigns. Get Involved! Opportunities to Volunteer Near You! The 2024 campaign season is getting started, and campaigns around the state are needing help! Find an event near you and get involved to help 2024 Indiana Democratic Party Platform Input Tour We’re getting ready to finalize our party platform for 2024, and we want your input! Hoosier Democrats are invited to a series of events to provide feedback on our , and how we can make it even better and more representative of Indiana families this year! There are three events across the state, and a statewide virtual event on Zoom on Monday, March 25 from 6-8 PM ET. Statewide Virtual Tour: Monday, March 25, 2024 from 6-8 PM ET - Virtual on Zoom Upcoming Candidate Trainings Monday, March 25: 1 p.m. ET: Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Monday, March 25th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on Developing Your Campaign’s Core Message , designed to help you get across the finish line on Election Day. Save the Dates! Hoosier Hospitality Dinner 2024: July 12 at the Indiana Roof Ballroom Indiana State Democratic Convention: July 13 at the Indiana Convention Center IDEA French Lick: August 1-4 Democratic National Conevntion Chicago: August 19-22 INDems IN the News IndyStar: IndyStar: WBIW: WFYI: NWI Times: WFYI: Indianapolis Recorder: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

With just 8 months to go until Election Day, I wanted to share with you my vision for the future of our grassroots team.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81480493/462574319/-1494636936?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.03.22_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2I2YzA1OS05MmU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SByc_nb4yAiKL0bpRylQlWGs3E8G4LSpCLBs8WGnUmo=)

Team,

**With just 8 months to go until Election Day, I wanted to share with you my vision for the future of our grassroots team.**

Between now and November 5, it’s going to be all hands on deck. We’re building out a strong campaign infrastructure that will be able to knock every door in OH-01, respond to every attack the radical right throws our way, and ensure every voter hears our message about fighting for children and families in Southwest Ohio.

[**But I won’t be able to do any of it without you. So I’m asking: Will you chip in $10 today to join my team as we head into the general election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81480494/462574320/-1494636936?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.03.22_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2I2YzA1OS05MmU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SByc_nb4yAiKL0bpRylQlWGs3E8G4LSpCLBs8WGnUmo=)

Republicans in Washington are more concerned about partisan politics and their own radical agenda than about serving the American people. Meanwhile, Democrats in Congress are aligned and ready to take on the challenges that are impacting Ohioans the most.

**Protecting our democracy. Restoring our freedoms. Fixing our broken economy.**

**_That’s what we’re fighting for,_ and [I’m honored and fired up to be in this fight with you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81480495/462574321/-1494636936?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.03.22_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2I2YzA1OS05MmU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SByc_nb4yAiKL0bpRylQlWGs3E8G4LSpCLBs8WGnUmo=)**

Now let’s go win.

Appreciate you,

_Greg_

subject: IT FUNDS UKRAINE AND WOKE IDEOLOGY
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN COX FOR CONGRESS, INC
body:
My opponents all opposed vacating the Chair over past funding of Ukraine and Woke ideology. I stood alone against the SWAMP. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/coxforcongress/it-funds-ukraine-and-woke-ideology?e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| |
---
| | [CRITICAL DONATION TO END THE SWAMP AND ELECT DAN COX](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=6800683331&e=5bb5efcda7 "CRITICAL DONATION TO END THE SWAMP AND ELECT DAN COX")
---
|
# BUDGET BUST: A Crucial Moment in American History Is Now.
Dear , _If you want the SWAMP, vote for my opponents_. They all opposed patriots in Congress who work to stop the madness of funding foreign wars and woke ideology by removing "leadership" that sells us out and makes us last.

**Today the U.S. House of Representatives put America Last.**

[If you are like me and SICK OF THE SWAMP, then HELP ME WIN TODAY - I NEED YOUR SUPPORT AS WE ARE $18,000 SHORT](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=b58b348d70&e=5bb5efcda7).
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=7e243ac547&e=5bb5efcda7)
Congress just passed a horrific $1.2 TRILLION dollar budget bill that will increase our debt to $52 TRILLION dollars, or $150,000 in debt per citizen, over the next 10 years. Our payment of interest on this debt is right now exceeding our defense budget, and our debt to GDP ratio is 150% - an amount that indicates potential collapse of your bank account if this course is not corrected soon.

The vote today will cause our national debt to skyrocket and continue our financial peril.

Congress abused a longstanding rule to pass this bloated budget - by not ensuring a majority of the Party in charge is in agreement ([using Democratic votes instead](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=9af845cb1b&e=5bb5efcda7)), and which:
* fails to secure our border,
* sends [$300 MILLION to UKRAINE](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=0737b0095f&e=5bb5efcda7),
* funds late-term abortions, and
* funds the indoctrination of our youth with the Left's extreme transgender ideology.

As your next Member of Congress, I will lead the effort to end Washington's reckless spending once and for all. [Join me in my fight to stop out-of-control government spending and restore fiscal sanity in DC](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=7fad8741ce&e=5bb5efcda7)!
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=64c1b0127d&e=5bb5efcda7) My likely Democratic opponent in this race is part of the Swamp - with the backing of globalists and Big Tech, who are profiting off of the overspending of Congress.

And none of my Republican opponents in this race would likely have stood up to this madness in Congress. And when I say "stand up" I don't just mean a willy nilly vote the way the wind is blowing. **_I mean leadership that confronts this globalist madness and leads with authority against it in the direction of a secured AMERICAN future._**

_**I was the only candidate at our recent debates who agreed that vacating the Chair of the Speaker over this kind of lack of spine and courage was not only right, but necessary.**_ So if you want more of the SWAMP - vote my opponents in.

[But if you want real leadership with backbone - I need your immediate support before our FEC deadline and your commitment to vote for me](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=f3e07433ed&e=5bb5efcda7).
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=2dac7c414f&e=5bb5efcda7)
We are at a crucial moment in American history. Without real leadership, our country and economy cannot sustain the debt, and our funding of wars is fomenting a potential WWIII.

My campaign is $18,000 short of our goal to ensure we reach every voter in the Sixth District. [Help me win today with your contribution of any amount, whether $5, $15, $25, $50, $100, or some of you might be able to help with $1000 or more](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=c88b48e8b3&e=5bb5efcda7). Thank you.

Freedom and Victory,

[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=135cb33a79&e=5bb5efcda7)
Dan Cox, Candidate for Member of Congress (R-MD6)

P.S. I need your support tonight to buy the media and outreach beginning April 1st as the voting begins. Thank you!
---

name: Katherine Clark
subject: We need to reelect Dr. Kim Schrier
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81480904/462575517/1637682717?refcode=em24_240322_whiptd_fndt_gq_act___KC_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240322_whiptd_fndt_gq_act___KC_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=173ba058-93e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzNiYTA1OC05M2U4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wkOEySfMTXZOFfv3RjvPC073OnYx3OU6xh9zsn8_S8M=) Happy Women's History Month, Peter! My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts' 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip. It wasn't too long ago when there were hardly any women serving in Congress at all. When I first came to Congress in 2013, I was stopped and mistaken for someone's spouse (multiple times), making it difficult to even get into the Chamber to cast a vote. Fast forward to today, and thankfully, things have improved. **There are more women serving in Congress than ever before — 94 women in the House Democratic Caucus alone!** But our work is far from over. This election, there's so much at stake for women. While House Democrats continue to fight for reproductive freedom, Donald Trump brags about overturning _Roe_ , and has promised to lead the charge to ban abortion nationwide. clean_body: = Happy Women's History Month, Peter! My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts' 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip. It wasn't too long ago when there were hardly any women serving in Congress at all. When I first came to Congress in 2013, I was stopped and mistaken for someone's spouse (multiple times), making it difficult to even get into the Chamber to cast a vote. Fast forward to today, and thankfully, things have improved. There are more women serving in Congress than ever before — 94 women in the House Democratic Caucus alone! But our work is far from over. This election, there's so much at stake for women. While House Democrats continue to fight for reproductive freedom, Donald Trump brags about overturning Roe , and has promised to lead the charge to ban abortion nationwide. We cannot afford to let their extreme MAGA agenda win — for our freedoms, our families, or our futures. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for your support, Peter! I hope you take some time this month to reflect on our achievements, celebrate the women in your life, and recommit to building a stronger, more inclusive America. All my best, — Katherine Representative Katherine Clark Massachusetts 5th Congressional District Democratic Whip Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: We have an official opponent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter, Ohio's primary is over, and now, it's official: **We're going up against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate Bernie Moreno in the race experts say could decide Senate control.**
And it's not just Moreno we're up against. National Republicans are going ALL IN to flip this seat red -- they're already spending record amounts to defeat me. We need to fight back ASAP, or we could risk entering the general election at a disadvantage.
**So I'm personally asking:[Please, will you split $5 or more now between my campaign and Bob Casey to help me defend Ohio's critical seat and keep the Senate blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-3?refcode=em20240322-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2415_552475_Zahp9E&akid=2415%2E552475%2EZahp9E)**
In case you need a reminder, my opponent and I couldn't be more different:
* He wants a national abortion ban, **I want to restore Roe v. Wade.**
* He protects the wealthiest 1%, **I defend American workers.**
* He'll do Trump's and McConnell's bidding in the Senate, **I'm a champion for democracy.**

Unfortunately, that's not all. Moreno is also writing his campaign million-dollar checks, and now that he's through the primary, the GOP will be funneling even more money into this race. **They're trying to buy this Senate seat because they know they don't have a grassroots movement behind them like we do.**
**But that also means I'm relying on folks like you to power us to victory, one $5 donation at a time.[So please, will you split a $5 donation between my campaign and Bob Casey to help us defeat our GOP opponent, win in Ohio, and keep the Senate blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240322-3?refcode=em20240322-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2415_552475_Zahp9E&akid=2415%2E552475%2EZahp9E)**
Your support means the world -- especially now. Thank you,
Sherrod Brown

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=2415%2E552475%2EZahp9E)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2415%2E552475%2EZahp9E)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

A Pillar of Christian Faith and Freedom!!

| |

# Defending Religious Exemptions:
### A Pillar of Christian Faith and Freedom!!
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/redirect/c724e12e-baf4-4570-b551-8a9fb6eb6963?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Mar 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c724e12e-baf4-4570-b551-8a9fb6eb6963?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
In the ongoing discussions about vaccine mandates and exemptions, one aspect often overlooked is the vital role of religious exemptions, especially for devout Christians who hold conservative values close to our hearts. Within Christian circles, religious freedom is not just a legal concept--it is a deeply cherished belief grounded in the Bible and our nation's history. That is why safeguarding religious exemptions for vaccines is crucial, reflecting our core values of faith, autonomy, and moral conscience.

At the core of Christianity lies a deep respect for the sanctity of life. We believe that every person is created in the image of God, which gives us inherent dignity and autonomy over our bodies. This fundamental belief shapes our views on healthcare decisions, including vaccines. For many Christians, vaccines are not just about health; they touch on deeply held religious convictions.
One critical argument for religious exemptions is the idea of bodily autonomy and stewardship. The Bible teaches us that our bodies are temples of the Holy Spirit, and we are called to honor God with them (I Corinthians 6:19-20). That means we have a responsibility to make informed decisions about medical treatments, including vaccines, based on our faith and conscience.
[To Finish Reading Click Here:](https://substack.com/redirect/7bf6adc1-1f90-4c42-885c-bd71256f81d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Dan Carr

If you don’t have time to read it right now, we hope you’ll consider making a donation today to help us defeat MAGA extremist Beth Van Duyne and flip this district blue. | = To: Interested Parties From: Sam Eppler for Congress Re: TX-24 Campaign Update Memo Date: March 22, 2024 This is the busiest and most important month of our campaign so far, so we wanted to give top supporters like you an update on our race to flip Texas’ 24th Congressional District. We won our primary. Thanks to your contributions, support, encouragement, and votes, Sam won the Democratic Primary earlier this month and is now the official Democratic nominee for Congress in TX-24. We’re preparing for the general election now. We’re getting ready to face MAGA extremist Beth Van Duyne in November, which means we’re going up against the MAGA establishment and her large war chest. Our first FEC filing deadline of 2024 is almost here. This is the most important fundraising deadline of our campaign so far. | | | Friend,
I hope this message finds you thriving and inspired by the limitless potential of truth and freedom. Today, I come to you with a heart filled with gratitude and a spirit emboldened by the power of our shared convictions.
Today, I've taken a significant step forward in my journey for truth and freedom. I am independent and ready to take my fight for Truth directly to the American people. This is a pivotal moment, one filled with immense opportunity and boundless potential. | | | [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jz1vgzAQhn-N2YLss2NgYGiL0qFS907IXySuOEwOE5p_XxGlHe-5j_ceg_MYh3vLqlcGcIl-YQBMvjCA69eGtH7jx_sB5fnncNWfeNy78MYA8n0O_6PPK2VAE8edVl3hWzl4rorQikoIoVQjZHFpZWOEtU7UGioHQQUdqlpqM9TKN1zYIrbAQXEJAMCFqkppOW_ANoPlw1Dziin-yCkNBorOiCVvhiglLF3CYmwvOc_L47ETg5MzkzcupC1MS0nhditd2nHqfZr6hP1GvUuHcRK9pf4ve9-VpzVjv6SVXGCym9zIQO8Ig48rMtlZepIcaK83Egy0wbROmcnuyBloCm4litOZyS7TGgpq_bzFcYyL3l3ODxeX8DcAAP__AQ16xw)
---
| As a woman of Christian faith and a staunch advocate for free speech, I have encountered obstacles and faced relentless unfair attacks from anti-American groups like the Anti-Defamation League (ADL). But let me assure you, these challenges only fuel my determination to stand firm in my beliefs and to speak truth to power.
Now, more than ever, **[it is crucial that we unite in solidarity to defend the sacred principles of free speech and truth](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jz1vgzAQhn-N2YLss2NgYGiL0qFS907IXySuOEwOE5p_XxGlHe-5j_ceg_MYh3vLqlcGcIl-YQBMvjCA69eGtH7jx_sB5fnncNWfeNy78MYA8n0O_6PPK2VAE8edVl3hWzl4rorQikoIoVQjZHFpZWOEtU7UGioHQQUdqlpqM9TKN1zYIrbAQXEJAMCFqkppOW_ANoPlw1Dziin-yCkNBorOiCVvhiglLF3CYmwvOc_L47ETg5MzkzcupC1MS0nhditd2nHqfZr6hP1GvUuHcRK9pf4ve9-VpzVjv6SVXGCym9zIQO8Ig48rMtlZepIcaK83Egy0wbROmcnuyBloCm4litOZyS7TGgpq_bzFcYyL3l3ODxeX8DcAAP__AQ16xw)**. Together, we possess the strength and resilience to overcome any obstacle that stands in our way.
**[I invite you to join me on this journey, as we pave the way for a brighter, more truthful future.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jz1vgzAQhn-N2YLss2NgYGiL0qFS907IXySuOEwOE5p_XxGlHe-5j_ceg_MYh3vLqlcGcIl-YQBMvjCA69eGtH7jx_sB5fnncNWfeNy78MYA8n0O_6PPK2VAE8edVl3hWzl4rorQikoIoVQjZHFpZWOEtU7UGioHQQUdqlpqM9TKN1zYIrbAQXEJAMCFqkppOW_ANoPlw1Dziin-yCkNBorOiCVvhiglLF3CYmwvOc_L47ETg5MzkzcupC1MS0nhditd2nHqfZr6hP1GvUuHcRK9pf4ve9-VpzVjv6SVXGCym9zIQO8Ig48rMtlZepIcaK83Egy0wbROmcnuyBloCm4litOZyS7TGgpq_bzFcYyL3l3ODxeX8DcAAP__AQ16xw)** Your support, no matter the size, will play an instrumental role in our collective mission to champion the values that define us as a nation.
Together, let us rise above adversity and forge a path towards a future where honesty, integrity, and freedom reign supreme.
Thank you for your unwavering support and belief in the power of truth.
With gratitude,

Candace Owens

# How the Left is using the legal system...
In this episode of __[The Sean Spicer Show](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1f76d643c3&e=f6564bbe3b), Alan Dershowitz joins me to explain how the Left continues to use the legal system to their advantage. From Letitia James to “squatters rights,” Professor Dershowitz breaks it all down.
Click here to check it out and let me know what you think:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1427ffaf8a&e=f6564bbe3b)

Dear Peter,
As you may have seen, Congress is taking extraordinary measures to shut down the popular TikTok platform.

On TikTok, Team Kennedy is having incredible success spreading Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s message of protecting the environment, stopping regime change wars, medical freedom, and expanding America's middle class.
TikTok is especially popular with young voters, and our success on the platform shows why __Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is leading a nationwide poll among voters under 35__.
President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump have endorsed banning TikTok. But it goes far beyond that. The new legislation allows the President to ban ANY platform, software, or website, as long as he deems it to be guided by America’s adversaries. That gives the President dictatorial power over freedom of speech and the press.
Democracy is more than elections. It requires open public debate based on freely available information. Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s fight to get on the ballot is part of a much bigger crusade to restore genuine democracy in America.

clean_body: | | | | | | Friend, Lori's re-election campaign is going to be a battle until the very end. With only 4 seats needed for Democrats to take back the Majority in November, we need everyone to step up and support Lori. | | | | | Jamie McLeod-Skinner is too radical. She was an advocate for Measure 110 to decriminalize hard drugs- and we all know how that has negatively affected Oregon. It's clear the Radical Left prioritizes politics over Oregonian's best interests. This is a critical election for the future of our country \- Securing the Southern Border and protecting national security \- Locking up criminals flooding our streets with deadly drugs \- Supporting our veterans, small businesses, and workers \- Stabilizing our economy first over China | | | | | We cannot allow the Radical Left to take back the Majority. November is months away, but we need to continue building a strong grassroots movement now. Lori wants to continue being a voice for YOU in Washington. Thank you, Team Lori | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | A Note For You, From Lori Chavez-DeRemer Thank you for your unwavering support as we strive to build a stronger, safer, and more prosperous future for Oregon. I am committed to prioritizing the safety of our communities, putting America and Oregon first, supporting our veterans, empowering farmers, improving transportation and infrastructure, and addressing homelessness. With your continued support, we can work together to implement effective measures and policies that will positively impact the lives of our residents and the overall well-being of Oregon. Thank you for all your support! \- Lori Chavez-DeRemer | | | | | CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 | | | | | | | If you love Oregon as much as Lori does, claim your official Love Oregon T-Shirt!** | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Lori Chavez-DeRemer For Congress | |

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Re: North Carolina
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=6055%2E5257348%2E18fv5G ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — Today,
I’m hoping you will split a contribution between my campaign and Josh
Stein’s campaign for Governor in North Carolina.

He’s running against Mark Robinson, someone I cannot simply describe as a
run-of-the-mill MAGA Republican. Mark Robinson is a truly dangerous
individual, with vile views, who absolutely cannot win this election for
North Carolina’s chief executive. We need to defeat him.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em_stein.6TyB-Z&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240322_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1004&akid=6055%2E5257348%2E18fv5G ]Can you split
$10
between my campaign and Josh Stein’s so he has the resources to do
everything his campaign needs to win this race and defeat Mark Robinson?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em_stein.6TyB-Z&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240322_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=6055%2E5257348%2E18fv5G ]DONATE
$10

Josh Stein is running for governor to protect voting rights, improve
public schools, safeguard reproductive freedoms, and so much more.

But North Carolina is a toss-up state — and Trump’s MAGA base has
nominated one of the most extreme major party nominees in modern American
history.

He said he wants a total ban on abortion, with no exceptions for victims
of rape and incest. He’s questioned the Holocaust and quoted Hitler. He’s
insulted victims of school shootings. He’s called LGBTQ+ issues “filth,
and yes, I called it filth.”

Yes, this is the same Mark Robinson that Donald Trump bizarrely called
“Martin Luther King on steroids.”

Derek, we
cannot let Mark Robinson become governor.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em_stein.6TyB-Z&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240322_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1006&akid=6055%2E5257348%2E18fv5G ]Will you support my campaign and Josh Stein’s today with a contribution
of $10
split between us? Any amount will help defeat Mark Robinson — and if we
win North Carolina, Trump as well.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation between Adam Schiff and Josh Stein will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=mar2024_abs_em_stein.G_bLP0&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240322_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1007&akid=6055%2E5257348%2E18fv5G ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=mar2024_abs_em_stein.G_bLP0&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240322_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1009&akid=6055%2E5257348%2E18fv5G ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=mar2024_abs_em_stein.G_bLP0&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240322_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1010&akid=6055%2E5257348%2E18fv5G ]EXPRESS DONATE

We need to elect Josh Stein this November. Thank you for your support in

— Adam

With less than 100 days until the June primary, both Donald Trump and MAGA Speaker Mike Johnson just endorsed Boebert’s campaign for Colorado’s 4th district. = In case you need a reminder, Boebert switched districts and is running for CO-04 (a district on the opposite side of Colorado). This came after a closer-than-expected election and multiple polls showed her trailing behind her Democratic opponent. Now, she is so desperate to win the primary that Donald Trump and Mike Johnson are endorsing her. Help us respond to these late-breaking announcements: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your support! — Team Crow Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. As Commissioner of Public Lands, Hilary led innovative solutions that transformed the Department of Natural Resources into a national standard for wildfire prevention and mitigation.

Under Hilary's leadership, our state has:
* Kept 90% of wildfires under 10 acres
* Expanded economic opportunity through new technologies and apprenticeships
* Restored 600,000 acres of forest to keep the Evergreen State evergreen

Now, Hilary is running for Congress to continue this legacy of change. With her track record of success, she will bring groundbreaking solutions to the national stage, building on the progressive policies pioneered in Washington state.

name: Carmen Goers
subject: Make Waves with Carmen Goers This World Water Day
body:
Join the Team

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **Make Waves with Carmen Goers This World Water Day****!**
---

Dear Peter,
Today, as we observe World Water Day, we're reminded of the precious resource that sustains life on our planet. In Washington's 8th Congressional District, we're blessed with abundant waterways that nourish our land, communities, and economy. However, the challenge of preserving this vital resource for future generations has never been more critical.
Carmen Goers is deeply committed to water conservation and sustainable management practices. Her campaign prioritizes the protection of our natural water sources, ensuring clean and accessible water for all, and supporting policies that address climate change and its impact on water scarcity.

---
| | | |
---
|
On this World Water Day, we invite you to join Carmen in her commitment to safeguarding our most essential resource.
Your donation of $25, $50, or $100 will support Carmen's efforts to promote responsible water usage, enhance local water conservation projects, and champion environmental stewardship.

---
| [ DONATE TODAY! ](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/65fe03d4d0375466126f54bc/65f8aff854d382e1dcf56135/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=26ea3fd5e245372f3cf45cc447f1d583d26517ea27892c762b5c983cd767913d)
---
| | | By contributing to Carmen's campaign, you're not just supporting a candidate; you're investing in the future of our planet's water. Let's come together to ensure that our children and grandchildren inherit a world where water continues to flow, sustain, and enrich our lives.
Thank you for making a splash for our future.

Sincerely,

Carmen Goers

---
|
---
| | | | [](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/65fe03d4d0375466126f54be/65f8aff854d382e1dcf56135/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=26ea3fd5e245372f3cf45cc447f1d583d26517ea27892c762b5c983cd767913d) | [](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/65fe03d4d0375466126f54c0/65f8aff854d382e1dcf56135/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=26ea3fd5e245372f3cf45cc447f1d583d26517ea27892c762b5c983cd767913d)

Hi Friend,
Democrat Stuart Whitlow here. MAGA Republicans like my opponent, John Carter, just showed how cruel their extreme agenda will be if they remain in power.
**If Republicans win control of Congress and the White House this election, no one will escape their vindictive plans. Not even our nation’s seniors.**
John Carter is already pushing to raise the Social Security retirement age and slash seniors’ benefits. As President Biden said, this “shows what Republicans value” — and it’s _not_ working folks like us.
[](https://whitlowforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cf1793176d2a08f7e745bb54&id=301dc1955e&e=b9b3f70fc1)
I’m our nation’s best line of defense against John Carter’s radical agenda, and I’ll never stop fighting to save Social Security. But I need you in my corner. [**Please, if you’re able, chip in $5 or whatever you can afford now to support my campaign to defeat John Carter and help protect our nation’s senior citizens.**](https://whitlowforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cf1793176d2a08f7e745bb54&id=4810caa6d5&e=b9b3f70fc1)

Stuart Whitlow is a lifelong Democrat and a fifth-generation resident of TX-31 running to unseat Trump’s ally in Congress, MAGA Republican John Carter.
As a lawyer, Stuart has more than 35 years experience representing folks like us and taking on those in power. Now, he’s running for Congress to stand up for ALL Texans against the extremism of the MAGA movement.
Stuart’s opponent has put Trump’s interests ahead of America’s interests, and it’s wrecked havoc on Capitol Hill and here at home. Stuart knows that TX-31 needs a Congress that works for all us, not just for Donald Trump.
“We take care of each other here in Texas, and we deserve leaders in Congress who can be trusted to do the same. That's why I'm ready to fight for our values in Congress and stand up for ALL Texans. I'm asking for your support in the Democratic Primary on March 5th — so together, we can make sure our Texas values live on.”
— Stuart Whitlow
_Democrat for U.S. Congress, TX-31_

I’m our nation’s best line of defense against John Carter’s radical agenda, and I’ll never stop fighting to save Social Security. But I need you in my corner. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for standing with me to protect our senior citizens, Stuart WhitlowDemocrat for U.S. Congress, TX-31 | | Stuart Whitlow is a lifelong Democrat and a fifth-generation resident of TX-31 running to unseat Trump’s ally in Congress, MAGA Republican John Carter. As a lawyer, Stuart has more than 35 years experience representing folks like us and taking on those in power. Now, he’s running for Congress to stand up for ALL Texans against the extremism of the MAGA movement. Stuart’s opponent has put Trump’s interests ahead of America’s interests, and it’s wrecked havoc on Capitol Hill and here at home. Stuart knows that TX-31 needs a Congress that works for all us, not just for Donald Trump. “We take care of each other here in Texas, and we deserve leaders in Congress who can be trusted to do the same. That's why I'm ready to fight for our values in Congress and stand up for ALL Texans. I'm asking for your support in the Democratic Primary on March 5th — so together, we can make sure our Texas values live on.” — Stuart Whitlow Democrat for U.S. Congress, TX-31 | | | [Paid for by Whitlow for Congress]() | | | Whitlow for Congress 910 Quest Pkwy Apt 6113 Cedar Park, TX 78613-2658 * USA

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: this is where we are huh?
body:
|
---
| | Ten years ago, this would have been a joke...

But in post-Christian America, it's a sad reality... the new normal.

We shouldn't even have to _argue_ this stuff.

Yet, here we are on the Senate floor, arguing about whether or not we should spend taxpayer money to mutilate the genitals of Idahoans.

_Yes, this really happened today._

Thankfully, we passed the bill to say NO... **_we won't allow it._**

(But, not before I got my hand slapped for speaking about it plainly)

>> **[Here's the clip](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=077dc86f15&e=dea908e0fe "watch") **

Have an awesome weekend,

Brian

Alabama’s two senators are hard at work protecting the state’s farm-raised catfish industry. Sens. Katie Britt and Tommy Tuberville have played a significant role in the U.S. Department of Commerce reversing a preliminary decision that would have slashed antidumping duties on imported catfish from companies controlled by the Vietnamese government.
---
[**READ MORE >>**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=9fcb7a3d854348c1b6d4c4298296bd00&_e=MoTBcjiYXHJQXHNxEjBt7z0_cyro5KdJLiF3_UGNW7-Xp2WZeAcs4J151EactTLUPUH1D02v757RsT7yWQviRcGvTEfGh4z5iXrAvUzH-NdwU5ilpSMXRvPxPFYl6o-rAGiLAmTaw0Ww0DwjD0HSnehlteUrGRGtHAZKDZP1kNPdyh5jDAT4exgvIvhnLo0SZwWvqnneqtKF5Y6v79Uytou35ZYSAzv4xtHnTw_Dp3IYqih97FUf6TfQW3Td0dFfiKPg2WIy3g7MWLtHLXC_e9mXYm7LkU2_s6LjOOCAWnw%3D)
---

| | Fellow American, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=3601e862cbdc4947ab3e64bfbfb17972&_e=A9PUn1ZU1ZXbR0-b-X4D2FxyS8sSFsqHwJXvg0js8ikbH08aUnlug-pNRTzP4dxz3ow-MFheX-N24rppFStsYUPvhBmDfNJaORslTB_KT_nGAW7hyFixfZt3PfxEoLid1N3IUxN9OcvdYOgkn15VhJDWP8T_IJzBz-bXeipi2TCMWX1Z7yJzLf8DF_7kZsCow2w7LuD_RDSNtIEUU3fOHcF7Y2gEMvWGehPQcXyfEjgS5rT7GOoc86Uu71pi5UReVQ8Rku7Jt9-LejDBssoECS20f8qPoy6lcCne2N4OWGDUEeNL-KRTPcqvIPaIxp_TqyztjmT3DZFQyM-8vSIa_joQCxA43ecJKGjuaewIucRI6u_86TGpDKs-T1Hc_x7rMQAZj5OFa_IN6BZBav-5Yg%3D%3D)** There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I _must_ win this race. **[That's why I'm humbly asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today to defeat Adam Schiff in November.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=3601e862cbdc4947ab3e64bfbfb17972&_e=A9PUn1ZU1ZXbR0-b-X4D2FxyS8sSFsqHwJXvg0js8ikbH08aUnlug-pNRTzP4dxz3ow-MFheX-N24rppFStsYUPvhBmDfNJaORslTB_KT_nGAW7hyFixfZt3PfxEoLid1N3IUxN9OcvdYOgkn15VhJDWP8T_IJzBz-bXeipi2TCMWX1Z7yJzLf8DF_7kZsCow2w7LuD_RDSNtIEUU3fOHcF7Y2gEMvWGehPQcXyfEjg6cAcNLOK7f4Wpozt940FGcHYoa-2Xu-alMYu0mqB1GupGDQclAuzRsLOpK33RLV8Faloh8ap5-QgKbEA5TSmTML1t-nP9S3VP3fDMykZxzq7ftTp8Vv4B7Pz5ZOHGaWK3NAqB7-0vZLJ8N58wo4-TNxmunht8Be0be6hYpazYPQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: There’s no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it’s so important we win this election. | | | | | Fellow American, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his ActBlue allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's deja vu all over again." Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I must win this race. | | Sincerely, | | Steve Garvey #6 | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 |

**** Peter, Mad is hard at work in D.C. – we don’t want you to miss these important updates from her!
| Mad joined Joy Reid from _MSNBC_ to discuss special counsel Robert Hur’s report regarding President Biden’s handling of classified documents. It was gratuitous to attack the President’s memory; it was cruel, calculated, and political to do so using the death of his son, Beau. Mad re-upped her call for Hur to correct the record on his unqualified findings – **[watch more below:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81483088/462583103/-1023043741?refcode=03222024_md_mediaroundup_en_1&refcode2=bb5a296d-9ce8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjVhMjk2ZC05Y2U4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6Vro0jcPJkOjeXzbgwWczLcEkmp_Cr_qVVrzloGJGo=&emci=26e1a430-60e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=bb5a296d-9ce8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=36373569)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81483089/462583104/-1023043741?refcode=03222024_md_mediaroundup_en_1&refcode2=bb5a296d-9ce8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjVhMjk2ZC05Y2U4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6Vro0jcPJkOjeXzbgwWczLcEkmp_Cr_qVVrzloGJGo=&emci=26e1a430-60e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=bb5a296d-9ce8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=36373569) | | [ **WATCH HERE** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81483090/462583105/-1023043741?refcode=03222024_md_mediaroundup_en_1&refcode2=bb5a296d-9ce8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjVhMjk2ZC05Y2U4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6Vro0jcPJkOjeXzbgwWczLcEkmp_Cr_qVVrzloGJGo=&emci=26e1a430-60e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=bb5a296d-9ce8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=36373569)

* * *
The La Mott Community Center shares ground with what was once the largest federal training camp for Black troops in the American Civil War: Camp William Penn. Back in October 2021, they had to close their doors because of failed infrastructure and COVID-19 shutdowns. But Mad put forward a Congressional request for over $3.8 million in federal funds. **[Read more on this here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81483094/462583109/-1984263253?refcode=03222024_md_mediaroundup_en_1&refcode2=bb5a296d-9ce8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjVhMjk2ZC05Y2U4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6Vro0jcPJkOjeXzbgwWczLcEkmp_Cr_qVVrzloGJGo=&emci=26e1a430-60e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=bb5a296d-9ce8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=36373569)**

During President Biden’s State of the Union address earlier this month, Mad was honored to be joined by Benjamin Hoffman, an educator in the Visual Arts Department at Kutztown Area High School. For the last 8 years, Ben has been working to expand artistic and educational learning throughout Pennsylvania, and in his free time, he works as a volunteer firefighter. clean_body: ** Peter, Mad is hard at work in D.C. – we don’t want you to miss these important updates from her! | Mad joined Joy Reid from MSNBC to discuss special counsel Robert Hur’s report regarding President Biden’s handling of classified documents. It was gratuitous to attack the President’s memory; it was cruel, calculated, and political to do so using the death of his son, Beau. Mad re-upped her call for Hur to correct the record on his unqualified findings – | | Mad secured nearly $12 million in funding for projects in PA-04, including funding for SEPTA; the La Mott Community Center; the Montco Housing Authority’s Affordable Housing Preservation Initiative; infrastructure upgrades; PFAS treatment; and more! This is great news for the Philadelphia Suburbs – and will bring jobs and progress to our communities. | The La Mott Community Center shares ground with what was once the largest federal training camp for Black troops in the American Civil War: Camp William Penn. Back in October 2021, they had to close their doors because of failed infrastructure and COVID-19 shutdowns. But Mad put forward a Congressional request for over $3.8 million in federal funds. | During President Biden’s State of the Union address earlier this month, Mad was honored to be joined by Benjamin Hoffman, an educator in the Visual Arts Department at Kutztown Area High School. For the last 8 years, Ben has been working to expand artistic and educational learning throughout Pennsylvania, and in his free time, he works as a volunteer firefighter. As a former professor, Mad knows just how much educators give back to their communities, and she was thrilled that Benjamin was able to join her. | Thanks for reading along as Mad continues her work for the Commonwealth. name: Rick Coplen
subject: Fighting for affordable healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
This week marks 14 years since the Affordable Care Act (ACA) was enacted. The ACA has made it possible for millions of Americans to afford healthcare who did not have coverage and to get healthcare regardless of pre-existing conditions.

While this landmark law has undoubtedly improved the health and lives of Americans everywhere, extremists like Scott Perry have continuously tried to destroy the ACA time and time again since its enactment.

**I support expanding the ACA to include a public option for those who choose it because I believe that everyone deserves access to quality, affordable health care.** [If you agree, add your name with mine here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81483401/462583953/2076078412?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_240322_1_1&refcode2=32c5f0ce-9de8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&contactdata=xnUlvjGAYCWdRT1+2Gef9c5nk+c7LcsFvwW+eGYG0wVMhMEG80nqChpFcqiXcSfG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmM1ZjBjZS05ZGU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eU8ievT3a7pfBdqxQMrEt228tjbXJxmzRk8uWuCcm1E=&emci=51f472d8-99e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=32c5f0ce-9de8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=24669367) | | **[PROTECT AFFORDABLE HEALTH CARE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81483402/462583954/2076078412?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_240322_1_1&refcode2=32c5f0ce-9de8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&contactdata=xnUlvjGAYCWdRT1+2Gef9c5nk+c7LcsFvwW+eGYG0wVMhMEG80nqChpFcqiXcSfG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmM1ZjBjZS05ZGU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eU8ievT3a7pfBdqxQMrEt228tjbXJxmzRk8uWuCcm1E=&emci=51f472d8-99e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=32c5f0ce-9de8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=24669367)**
---
Expanding health insurance coverage not only helps individuals, but it helps business because a healthy economy thrives with a healthy workforce.

In Congress, I’ll carry on the mission of the Affordable Care Act and work to lower prescription drug costs, defend women’s comprehensive reproductive care, prioritize mental health treatment, and expand access further to ensure better health outcomes for _all_.

[We need leaders who stand up to those trying to sabotage our healthcare, and I will do just that. Please add your name to join me in the fight for affordable, accessible care.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81483403/462583955/2076078412?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_240322_1_1&refcode2=32c5f0ce-9de8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&contactdata=xnUlvjGAYCWdRT1+2Gef9c5nk+c7LcsFvwW+eGYG0wVMhMEG80nqChpFcqiXcSfG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmM1ZjBjZS05ZGU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eU8ievT3a7pfBdqxQMrEt228tjbXJxmzRk8uWuCcm1E=&emci=51f472d8-99e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=32c5f0ce-9de8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=24669367) | **[PROTECT AFFORDABLE HEALTH CARE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81483404/462583956/2076078412?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_240322_1_1&refcode2=32c5f0ce-9de8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&contactdata=xnUlvjGAYCWdRT1+2Gef9c5nk+c7LcsFvwW+eGYG0wVMhMEG80nqChpFcqiXcSfG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmM1ZjBjZS05ZGU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eU8ievT3a7pfBdqxQMrEt228tjbXJxmzRk8uWuCcm1E=&emci=51f472d8-99e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=32c5f0ce-9de8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=24669367)**

Rick

While this landmark law has undoubtedly improved the health and lives of Americans everywhere, extremists like Scott Perry have continuously tried to destroy the ACA time and time again since its enactment. I support expanding the ACA to include a public option for those who choose it because I believe that everyone deserves access to quality, affordable health care. | | Expanding health insurance coverage not only helps individuals, but it helps business because a healthy economy thrives with a healthy workforce. In Congress, I’ll carry on the mission of the Affordable Care Act and work to lower prescription drug costs, defend women’s comprehensive reproductive care, prioritize mental health treatment, and expand access further to ensure better health outcomes for all. | Thanks for adding your voice, Rick | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

name: Tim Burchett
subject: You Deserve Better 👎
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress** [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ae05d39d4ea84a018eef592696fbfd0a&_e=07bFDAwOKKSV_v7yuUjS7cWqt45bE4PAfPlF-P6XtEdI3BRLmBkljAG1LbKBO_nUXihqEbhJlCiHkFLUD6OHgNu35OKP1Ga183ZyYzHNz-D2Mwr4CHsbHEiCkITEkCOZs9ZFxsXl0eMapw6GYwAYITD8Ji8menKFsE5VIutNN6MCmHnjtH3R6ryX4msnXHo6UOjsvWXtS1zb9i3bviFQfO9paH3AeJYCoXqKguRPCR7FU2RmFUeclbJr58gCD_3_j8Kq9EcgWwxBauV7U1KN1DO0KEpjn7HFFXaYPodiBUTmeugLoFA0F11xuOJjEsG5K9RZBmgZM5HTayaozZ5gopPb7fe1GhCD9Sc-P3M8KKs%3D)
---
| | ****You Deserve Better 👎****
---
| |
---
Another day, another [trillion dollars](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ae05d39d4ea84a018eef592696fbfd0a&_e=07bFDAwOKKSV_v7yuUjS7fNBXElLzqTVGtMA6gevBlf8g3B1_5qoa1PKehzrapoDeLjQiCIixjLvVrtQS6OJ6cDzuZlU6FU1VpPLUAaaDtgEgUxblLdAAGdcwgfHmdX_EPRFKUcrWZvnBeUqQugGcJopxQ8WbzdPFvxSt8OL_LOij4Ana5EJypZSdzA1-Rg-4gFkLOc7UFcfVI5TwSvQf_hgKgjYisEa8m0M9bPorMDMuRFt6QFsSal175ZLdt7aYi9yY3q3TENl1oqDmzrvvNqhaFlCZDEE6sdfp7IsBSQ%3D) spent. Somebody asked why I voted against the latest monstrosity of a spending bill, and the answer is simple: I actually read it! More than [1,000 pages](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ae05d39d4ea84a018eef592696fbfd0a&_e=07bFDAwOKKSV_v7yuUjS7YKB240mLOfQPSsMa1x4B2JDVKjswD9SU2J9BIOVuHnfNJbtcLDLDPaJVtr9nS5nMmfPYq06rsMSZcxZVqtxvL_iY3rAIqgekis-6egXIzGyAzTEG4rIOGpIA_3w-HAY2ZoaEkTZLBrlkq63OWjFELvMqNS4OM2A-nJQZBzYh0Q5F_2-GypyxwJKD8To1YDVMcJPseYPRFDspyBOHkTex1Q7AON1B8sGAi-9QzwkhMtWrmBlHXbrDIw-k-rLE3I2cftG1IKpV9pV2jg5T_1cDZaLuAVmfBhq5kKOS7AWzVu3) of fluff that will do nothing to fix the mountain of problems we’ve got in this country. Sure, we’ll fund the government right in the nick of time to avoid a [shutdown](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ae05d39d4ea84a018eef592696fbfd0a&_e=07bFDAwOKKSV_v7yuUjS7ZbeYQwh2xeoIPWX7lJjEU7euWj9Iczyo-gLtmQCNiDPNFgwjXETN1Aeb2IP5smRP5F3uNns--TVXsT52tyCwxu0uqg9bsDbUXWZcvxzCwg6SVVYck_c3jcN3atKGNTjryBznRd5lukBHRFXJpSaW38LXZ_ORf1aqJDmO1f3rkGs0ntjlWCDg3VRDtXjkWPUch4TW-ytIFW0JJOHF9tSIOv7NA4uCH7AwLBNykc7jQ3Nav6r41aPQzqXH3Ezl2BkRw%3D%3D), but we’re just kicking the can down the road and adding to our growing debt that will eventually be due—and I guess that time bomb isn’t ticking loud enough to knock some sense into my colleagues. But there’s another big problem with this bill: a total lack of regard for the crisis at our southern border. I’ve said it before, folks, and I’ll say it again: no border, no budget. My constituents back in Tennessee say the [number one issue](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ae05d39d4ea84a018eef592696fbfd0a&_e=07bFDAwOKKSV_v7yuUjS7V3RxX7WR54fK5Qssyv1sZAwqn28_j6d0Jd0FH9Le8VNs9Pl9huyBq4ivGyuTQObeezgGGJ3svBg4J4vVoKkyAl4HUbbCsU1ZUIdM2cKHrLKcL2TC--RhsPeOmvf-25UoJk21ZNXRYfy9-5WleyP0oG4wrCDGw2N18Szdl-mce--t6K-x0GKYBn0qlmSNO6V1dvQFkxejjnTHYGnyuNuQzI_mBDZuMPBbw05HHYX7UBh2Hb4487mTER2tAwtkIHxFrq-TVrJhMl5OXuEHoMDHr0%3D) they’re concerned about is illegal immigration and the impact it’ll have on [our state](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ae05d39d4ea84a018eef592696fbfd0a&_e=07bFDAwOKKSV_v7yuUjS7R46_2a9hieg2YoZa93I5CK3oDa_6dyxUAUapceRhp2jxUabCFRhg3XtZa8H3I_NP3PDZkDavD1v1VnM5LTfxM8Z6Jlv9_ujjc2uNWi5SllG_-Yt0ezRB5vem3xHFz2ckOyPV_EYQZyrDr5S7kv945xySlL_CtlRXLj3wBo6hSx025N45atwQwGn4uzsuibBCrfZopkrrMiyIEeSG84v5TP8r_9-xvrl92xqkDzi1XSXXIOJO_KUXfDyk5_2g-gMfMAPzjoM5lKp9BqQignIRAZUEUApo9k-4bZOz1BHDFc53yX4dVhZhhzjgNeJuDNSJQ%3D%3D). They’re frustrated by the federal government’s dilly-dallying because no one is doing anything about it—even the Republicans who got themselves into power on the promise of holding the line. I refuse to be one of them, and that’s why I refused to vote in favor of today’s spending bill. These so-called “bipartisan solutions” add more bureaucracy to an issue spiraling out of control. Considering [100 migrants](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ae05d39d4ea84a018eef592696fbfd0a&_e=07bFDAwOKKSV_v7yuUjS7YvHaogzxMamBtxN9PcFV2EOQ-M5q48AmDTO9ygjraA0gPzijX10Q0Jyw5mwsPmONR8eeMnQympyBKGw6qBG4UemLegZx_YRPILkBRJj0LvJHcvAzppSBoS8XQ9Z-hEZihnaGZlXx108-X4FY5dByuzk1cIU5FMhTxvsb2sQda4zqNUeNBFsfXT0SpljWAGmHKA70I9AliWObuKllvuB5bxEVW6fm7FSgOwpHTZAbowXodPuvaBtTyWkbN1cUEN0F2UhrZHvsdsAZMgU0J5aYkw%3D) just broke through razor wire and trampled over guards yesterday in a total [display of lawlessness](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ae05d39d4ea84a018eef592696fbfd0a&_e=07bFDAwOKKSV_v7yuUjS7XGHMPGTFVmisnOjujnCH-ltTN1C93ysYYPGGMG7s-dQFNgFWWnzVL3qvn16ngoUReXY27-YgBz_0S9QIkcCL6wChNv_C86Wim1Wli7JiplnD2Vi0xH1WGyn7HPVu6dJ8LZ3xHMi-0LGKDKlwo5VyUbO4lfeVAo6IgEoJiJ7GQaPvSYxLjAfdYsVDhNoWd1tlq6q5NZ7V4pZ0KOvhsMBOxetn-IBKpAlSFpdQbZeGh1GCSmgFudqXCzTJRFgtbI6KgqvmEafC14pZ9XVJ6evZjSVxxjK9VNmfaCYRUOnwdO6DCFiMXCeXSvEzc_Wwht4Tw%3D%3D), I’d say it’s high time we do something. Build a wall, bring our troops home from foreign wars, and put them down at the border to get ahold of this mess. We’re witnessing something that is far beyond chaos at this point. The border situation is a mounting national security threat that we can’t continue to ignore. I refuse to throw my hands up in surrender and let this all unfold. Today, I took a stand for what’s right because Biden’s America is broken, and you deserve better.
---
| | |
---
| | **Community Helpers 🧡**

| | Thank you to the [Wesley House](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ae05d39d4ea84a018eef592696fbfd0a&_e=07bFDAwOKKSV_v7yuUjS7Qsvl5hV0nBlc4h44C8MjY57TK7CVEElglyTtYB8yxhU806cs95Bv742Xu60WywO1e1KKTW9Z_Jv6wuJUR0L_Wr_SqjNV-NGs5rRXH3XSp5rEi3NIA-kTLx9KSTbewY89Rl7NWd-PmoS005kq5gvuYGaB7H0NA3c5HB6qCtoBoFlfOBDodD3j7mnU4a9GZTiRA%3D%3D) in Knoxville for allowing me to come tour their renovation project and learn about the many ways they serve our community. Established in 1907 by three United Methodist Women groups, the organization was formed to support mothers working at the cotton mill to support their families. The UMW recognized their need for childcare and stepped in to fill the gap with that helpful Knoxville spirit we all know and love. More than a century later, the organization now provides after school and summer camp services for Knoxville’s most under-resourced and marginalized communities, and they also have a program for senior citizens looking for social connections. It was a privilege to see their dedication in action, and I look forward to seeing how they continue to grow and make an impact once the renovation is complete. I know I speak for all of us in Knoxville when I say the community is blessed by your efforts!

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | **You Deserve Better 👎 | | Another day, another spent. Somebody asked why I voted against the latest monstrosity of a spending bill, and the answer is simple: I actually read it! More than of fluff that will do nothing to fix the mountain of problems we’ve got in this country. Sure, we’ll fund the government right in the nick of time to avoid a , but we’re just kicking the can down the road and adding to our growing debt that will eventually be due—and I guess that time bomb isn’t ticking loud enough to knock some sense into my colleagues. But there’s another big problem with this bill: a total lack of regard for the crisis at our southern border. I’ve said it before, folks, and I’ll say it again: no border, no budget. My constituents back in Tennessee say the they’re concerned about is illegal immigration and the impact it’ll have on . They’re frustrated by the federal government’s dilly-dallying because no one is doing anything about it—even the Republicans who got themselves into power on the promise of holding the line. I refuse to be one of them, and that’s why I refused to vote in favor of today’s spending bill. These so-called “bipartisan solutions” add more bureaucracy to an issue spiraling out of control. Considering just broke through razor wire and trampled over guards yesterday in a total , I’d say it’s high time we do something. Build a wall, bring our troops home from foreign wars, and put them down at the border to get ahold of this mess. We’re witnessing something that is far beyond chaos at this point. The border situation is a mounting national security threat that we can’t continue to ignore. I refuse to throw my hands up in surrender and let this all unfold. Today, I took a stand for what’s right because Biden’s America is broken, and you deserve better. | | | | | Community Helpers 🧡 | | Thank you to the in Knoxville for allowing me to come tour their renovation project and learn about the many ways they serve our community. Established in 1907 by three United Methodist Women groups, the organization was formed to support mothers working at the cotton mill to support their families. The UMW recognized their need for childcare and stepped in to fill the gap with that helpful Knoxville spirit we all know and love. More than a century later, the organization now provides after school and summer camp services for Knoxville’s most under-resourced and marginalized communities, and they also have a program for senior citizens looking for social connections. It was a privilege to see their dedication in action, and I look forward to seeing how they continue to grow and make an impact once the renovation is complete. I know I speak for all of us in Knoxville when I say the community is blessed by your efforts! | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → Spreading smiles 👋 ()→ Lookin’ cool 😎 () → A match made at any age ❤️ () | | | | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress**

| | On Tuesday, Ohio Republicans nominated the most MAGA candidate in their Senate primary – who was endorsed by Donald Trump – to take on my friend Sherrod Brown. **Sherrod needs our immediate help to keep his seat in the Senate because this race will be one of the closest and most expensive of 2024. The Republican Establishment is ready to pour dark money into this race to elect another Trump yes-man to the Senate. [Can you split $3 right now between my campaign and Sherrod Brown's so we can keep a true champion of working families in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81484579/462587938/857194678?refcode=2024-03-22-sherrod&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=52f10250-a1e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmYxMDI1MC1hMWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r364QT-M4Rt63w1AejpH_W0PXz55Vx41aETCWd1TZbI=)** **[Chip in today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81484580/462587939/857194678?refcode=2024-03-22-sherrod&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=52f10250-a1e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmYxMDI1MC1hMWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r364QT-M4Rt63w1AejpH_W0PXz55Vx41aETCWd1TZbI=)** Sherrod always puts people before politics. I have seen firsthand his commitment to fighting for the people who make our country work, not the wealthy and well-connected. He's been a crucial ally of mine in the fight to expand and protect workers' rights as well as efforts to protect overtime pay and increase access to health care. Meanwhile, Sherrod's opponent – Bernie Moreno – is a far-right Trump ally. He supports a national abortion ban, opposes fair wages, and has embraced election denialism. **Unfortunately, he has the ability to self-finance a campaign with millions of his own dollars.** So we need to get to work _now_ on behalf of Sherrod. He has won many tough races before, and every time, it was because he had consistent support from hardworking families – not big special interests. If we hold this seat in Ohio, our chances of keeping the Senate in Democratic hands this November go _way up_. But if Sherrod loses, our majority is almost certainly gone. **[The stakes couldn't be higher. That's why I hope you'll split $3 to re-elect Sherrod Brown today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81484581/462587940/857194678?refcode=2024-03-22-sherrod&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=52f10250-a1e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmYxMDI1MC1hMWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r364QT-M4Rt63w1AejpH_W0PXz55Vx41aETCWd1TZbI=)** clean_body: Sherrod Brown is counting on our help to win a critical Senate race. | | | | On Tuesday, Ohio Republicans nominated the most MAGA candidate in their Senate primary – who was endorsed by Donald Trump – to take on my friend Sherrod Brown. Sherrod needs our immediate help to keep his seat in the Senate because this race will be one of the closest and most expensive of 2024. The Republican Establishment is ready to pour dark money into this race to elect another Trump yes-man to the Senate. = = Sherrod always puts people before politics. I have seen firsthand his commitment to fighting for the people who make our country work, not the wealthy and well-connected. He's been a crucial ally of mine in the fight to expand and protect workers' rights as well as efforts to protect overtime pay and increase access to health care. Meanwhile, Sherrod's opponent – Bernie Moreno – is a far-right Trump ally. He supports a national abortion ban, opposes fair wages, and has embraced election denialism. Unfortunately, he has the ability to self-finance a campaign with millions of his own dollars. So we need to get to work now on behalf of Sherrod. He has won many tough races before, and every time, it was because he had consistent support from hardworking families – not big special interests. If we hold this seat in Ohio, our chances of keeping the Senate in Democratic hands this November go way up. But if Sherrod loses, our majority is almost certainly gone. = Fired up to win, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your split contribution to Sherrod Brown and Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Ramadan Mubarak 🌙
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
We’re nearly halfway through the sacred Islamic month of Ramadan, a time when our Muslim neighbors fast throughout the day to privately reconnect with their spirituality, and to empathize with those less fortunate.
Muslim community organizations and mosques provide meals to worshippers breaking their fast at the end of each day of Ramadan — and many in New York City are now facing financial hardship as they _also_ provide direct relief to migrants arriving at their door with no support system.
So today, in the spirit of charity and generosity of Ramadan, we’re launching a fundraiser for 3 of these organizations supporting our Muslim community.
[Will you make a $5 contribution today, or chip in whatever you can, to support our Muslim neighbors during a difficult time? 100% of your donation will be split between Sapna NYC, Malikah, and ICNA Relief. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2024ramadan.-PRYim&refcode=em20240322-6058-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6058%2E2526796%2Ewk0PmA)
**[Contribute](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2024ramadan.-PRYim&refcode=em20240322-6058-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=6058%2E2526796%2Ewk0PmA)**
In the last year, the number of migrants coming to New York City from majority-Muslim countries has nearly tripled. Of the nearly 68,000 migrants currently in the city’s shelter system, 14% are from West Africa.1
In addition to providing a place to worship, some of these hyperlocal community groups provide temporary housing. Others provide job training, while still others open their doors for migrants to charge phones, rest, or use wifi to contact family.
Here are more details about the organizations we’re supporting this Ramadan:
• **Malikah, Inc.** is providing hundreds of bags of free groceries to migrants, low-income families, and single parent households every week of Ramadan. Your support will fund the purchase of essential groceries such as grains, lentils, vegetables, fruits, and other staples of Ramadan.
• **ICNA Relief** provides medical services to the uninsured, food assistance, and educational programming to the Muslim community across NYC — and at Ramadan, they host iftars regardless of ability to pay, as well as delivering Ramadan food boxes to low-income families.
• **Sapna NYC** promotes health and social justice for South Asian immigrant women in New York City. This Ramadan, they are hosting iftars-on-the-go and food distributions in Alexandria’s district.
[If you can, will you join us in the spirit of Ramadan to lift up these organizations helping the less fortunate? Every dollar goes toward their work supporting our Muslim neighbors and the migrant community in NYC. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2024ramadan.-PRYim&refcode=em20240322-6058-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=6058%2E2526796%2Ewk0PmA)
**[Contribute](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2024ramadan.-PRYim&refcode=em20240322-6058-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=6058%2E2526796%2Ewk0PmA)**
Whether or not you can donate today, thank you for standing with our movement.
Yours in community,
Team AOC
1 - [**Gothamist** : NY mosques are struggling to serve migrants as Ramadan begins](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/23408?t=23&akid=6058%2E2526796%2Ewk0PmA)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-2024ramadan?refcode=em20240322-6058-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=24&refcode2=6058_2526796_wk0PmA&akid=6058%2E2526796%2Ewk0PmA)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240322-6058-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=25&akid=6058%2E2526796%2Ewk0PmA)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=6058%2E2526796%2Ewk0PmA) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=6058%2E2526796%2Ewk0PmA) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=6058%2E2526796%2Ewk0PmA)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=6058%2E2526796%2Ewk0PmA)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=6058%2E2526796%2Ewk0PmA)
