name: Sherrod Brown
subject: The General Election is here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by End Citizens United-Nonfederal
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21049%2E4449941%2Ed3IBQZ)
---
[ ]() It's official: the general election is here!

**I couldn't be more honored to represent the people of Ohio and have the opportunity to keep fighting for the Dignity of Work in the Senate. I want to personally thank every member of this team – including you – for powering our grassroots movement this far.**

All we have accomplished together so far makes it clearer than ever, Ohio voters want someone who will fight for them in the Senate. Better wages and working conditions, reproductive freedom, affordable housing and health care – I promise to keep up these critical fights for all of us.

But our real fight starts now, friend. We now have an official opponent, Bernie Moreno, and he's a deep-pocketed Donald Trump ally that's ready to spend millions of dollars to try to buy this seat. Polls show this race is neck and neck, Republicans are already spending record-breaking sums to defeat me and flip the Senate red, and it's only going to get worse.

**So I'm personally asking:** [**Will you split $10 or more right now between Fight for Reform to help them elect state and local Dems and my campaign to make sure we have the resources to fight back against GOP attacks, protect this seat, and keep the Senate blue?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/40085?t=7&akid=21049%2E4449941%2Ed3IBQZ) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Sherrod Brown will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/40086?t=8&akid=21049%2E4449941%2Ed3IBQZ)

clean_body: | [ ]() It's official: the general election is here! I couldn't be more honored to represent the people of Ohio and have the opportunity to keep fighting for the Dignity of Work in the Senate. I want to personally thank every member of this team – including you – for powering our grassroots movement this far. All we have accomplished together so far makes it clearer than ever, Ohio voters want someone who will fight for them in the Senate. Better wages and working conditions, reproductive freedom, affordable housing and health care – I promise to keep up these critical fights for all of us. But our real fight starts now, friend. We now have an official opponent, Bernie Moreno, and he's a deep-pocketed Donald Trump ally that's ready to spend millions of dollars to try to buy this seat. Polls show this race is neck and neck, Republicans are already spending record-breaking sums to defeat me and flip the Senate red, and it's only going to get worse. name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Did you know?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Less than 20% of people who receive this email will open it.
#
Peter,
We know you receive a lot of emails from us.
**But did you know that these emails are one of the greatest sources of online donations for our grassroots campaign?**
We send a lot of emails because Lucas is committed to running this campaign the right way, with $0 from corporate PACs or Big Oil + Big Pharma execs. Real people like you are powering this movement forward — and _every single donation,_ whether it’s $5 or $50, is critical to our ability to reach voters across Missouri.
Here’s something you probably didn’t know:
On average, **less than 20%** of people will open an email we send. Of that, **less than one percent** of readers will click to make a donation.
By opening this email, you’re already part of the small percentage of people who will read this message. _Thank you for being part of that group, Peter._
Now, will you take the next step and become one of the 1% of readers who **[clicks this link and makes a donation to help elect Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44704?refcode=em20240322-5104&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5104%2E614464%2E6X21d5)**
We know you receive a lot of emails every day, and we’re so grateful you choose to read ours. Your support is what powers this grassroots movement.
Thank you so much, Peter. We really couldn’t do it without you.
— Team Lucas Kunce

| | | | [ ](http://links.rogerwilliamsforcongress.com/els/v2/GaY9CmZqbRfR/bTJmaTBMYXdpUWs4djI4cUhLdEFRcEQ0a2xrVWwzN1BHcjJyRnFXdUwrSjJWQlBVc2J4VUU3TWRZR3lrd3dsYUlvVHhjNVEvWWV4Q3JkeFRMdDVmVitzcHFIbEIrYTZiRVlhTHZJSmtja1U9S0/)

| | Peter, While Israel continues to be terrorized by Hamas, _Joe Biden is blaming Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu for hurting Israelis more._ _**First,**_ Biden never gave a clear answer on his support for Israel. _**Then,**_ he said a ceasefire was imminent in the first week of March 2024. _**NOW,**_**** he’s asking Israel to stand down to terrorism.
---
| | | [ AMERICA SHOULD STAND WITH ISRAEL ](http://links.rogerwilliamsforcongress.com/els/v2/zAZbcRpqAyM3/bTJmaTBMYXdpUWs4djI4cUhLdEFRcEQ0a2xrVWwzN1BHcjJyRnFXdUwrSjJWQlBVc2J4VUU3TWRZR3lrd3dsYUlvVHhjNVEvWWV4Q3JkeFRMdDVmVitzcHFIbEIrYTZiRVlhTHZJSmtja1U9S0/)
---
| | _**This is outrageous. **_ Israel has _every right to defend itself_ from Hamas. Asking for a ceasefire would be caving to the Radical Islamists who want to destroy Israel. _America is Israel’s strongest ally_ and we shouldn’t be advocating for terrorists to win. We must stand with Israel and against terrorism. If we allow a ceasefire to happen, _what is that showing the world? _
---
| | | [ I STAND WITH ISRAEL ](http://links.rogerwilliamsforcongress.com/els/v2/6-_KFZpgkzMX/bTJmaTBMYXdpUWs4djI4cUhLdEFRcEQ0a2xrVWwzN1BHcjJyRnFXdUwrSjJWQlBVc2J4VUU3TWRZR3lrd3dsYUlvVHhjNVEvWWV4Q3JkeFRMdDVmVitzcHFIbEIrYTZiRVlhTHZJSmtja1U9S0/)

---

Friend -

Losing the NY-03 Special Election was devastating for Republicans everywhere. Liberal dark money organizations, special interest groups, and Democrat megadonors POURED cash into this race at the eleventh hour. And the well-funded, well-connected Democrat came out on top.

Now we have a choice to make: we can either dwell on the past, or get even in the future.

**As of this week, we will have FOUR MORE Special Elections in the next few months and - if we all rise to the occasion - we could win most if not all of them!**

Here's our plan:

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN"** at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | | "START HERE >>" | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. name: Jaclyn Corin
subject: February 14 to March 26
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Six minutes.
That’s all it took to change my life forever, team.
On February 14, 2018, I survived the shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School, but 17 of my classmates and teachers did not. These six minutes put me on the path to make sure this never happens again.
Six weeks.
That’s how much time we had between the shooting at our high school and when more than one million Americans marched to demand an end to gun violence. In that short time we:
*
Organized
students
and
went
to
Tallahassee
to
demand
no
one
can
purchase
a
gun
under
age
21
—
and
we
won
*
Supported
nearly
1
million
students
from
3,000
schools
to
walk
out
of
class
to
protest
gun
violence
*
Energized
a
nationwide
movement
to
end
gun
violence
Six years.
That’s how long it’s been since our first March. The anniversary is just a few days away.
Every day, when we’re doing this work, we’re trying to recapture the energy we felt that day in Washington, DC. That energy, where we all come together to demand action – that’s what gets results.
With our anniversary just a few days away, I’m asking you to step up and join me just like you did 6 years ago. Support our work to end gun violence by splitting a gift between our partner Serve America and March For Our Lives. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-mfol]
Thanks for being in this fight with us.
Jaclyn Corin
Co-Founder and Board Member, MFOL

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Friends, this is bothersome.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Help me stand up to the
so-called 'Freedom Caucus'
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Events%20%281%29_2.png]
CONTRIBUTE $20.24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=20.24&refcode=express_lane_20.24]

Friends,
What does Rep. Jack Bergman have in common with Matt Gaetz, Jim Jordan, Lauren Boebert, and Marjorie Taylor Greene?
Quite a lot, but specifically, their voting records. Today, for the same incoherent reasons , they all voted to shut down the government.
Extremists have no concept of bipartisanship. They don’t cooperate, collaborate, or compromise.
If, for a moment, you thought we were up against reason and dignity, think again. Help me defeat this nonsense. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
-Bob

name: Ami Bera
subject: protect seniors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| To be frank, Peter, extremist attacks against Social Security and Medicare will never stop.

Americans deserve to reap the benefits of their years of hard labor—not have them cut down by extremist politicians.

Programs like these help millions of Americans put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads. **Click the link below to sign my petition and help me protect these programs before the deadline at midnight tonight.**

**_[https://beraforcongress.com/socialsecurity-medicare/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81484846/462588965/1808217759?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240322_PT_1.3_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_ss_medicare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2FmYTg1Yy1hNWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_E27QWzhAiiLCOqSgqYPiXLOsIsTw7U5Rywt4w5Y7PM=&emci=28d20c55-a5e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=47afa85c-a5e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=32394541)_**

As a doctor, I’ve seen many seniors who end up rundown and sick because they can’t make ends meet, and many more who could not afford basic health care without Medicare. We can’t stand by and watch as Republicans try to undercut these lifesaving programs. This battle is not over yet.

**_[Sign on to help protect a secure and safe retirement for hardworking seniors.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/81484847/462588966/1808217759?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240322_PT_1.3_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_ss_medicare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2FmYTg1Yy1hNWU4LWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_E27QWzhAiiLCOqSgqYPiXLOsIsTw7U5Rywt4w5Y7PM=&emci=28d20c55-a5e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=47afa85c-a5e8-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=32394541)_**

Be well,

Ami Bera

subject: Exciting News
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/opening-day-12788171?e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=59d69ca6b3&e=1722d05e10)
---
| | Dear Friend,

This week was great. Coming out of the March Primary, momentum is building nationwide for Republicans. People are starting to see the real opportunity to flip this seat from Blue to Red.

Assemblyman Fong joined a notable list of Central Valley leaders endorsing my campaign for Congress, including Congressman Tom McClintock, former Congresswoman Connie Conway, State Senator Shannon Grove, and Tulare County Sheriff Mike Boudreaux.

Now I need your support. Will YOU endorse me for Congress? Will you commit to helping us flip this seat?

There are two ways to do that.

1\. Make a quick gift of $5 and go on record supporting this campaign
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=1821a56518&e=1722d05e10 "DONATE NOW")
---
| 2\. Sign up to volunteer in your neighborhood and place our campaign sign in your yard.
---
| [VOLUNTEER & GET A YARD SIGN](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=3cf31c9c1d&e=1722d05e10 "VOLUNTEER & GET A YARD SIGN")
---
| I am thrilled at how we over-performed in the March Primary! This race for the 21st Congressional District will be close and competitive. Based on my conversations with voters at doorsteps across this district, I know that Republicans, Democrats, and independents are eager for change—they want someone to step up and deliver results.

We can flip this seat. We can get new Republican leadership for our Central Valley! Join me and this campaign today. Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress
---
| [JOIN THE TEAM](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=83c0e54b00&e=1722d05e10 "JOIN THE TEAM")
---
|
---
| **About:**_ Michael Maher grew up in Tulare County where he owns and operates a Central Valley based aviation business. Maher’s parents settled in Visalia, where his father still serves as a local pastor. His wife Anne comes from a local multigenerational farming family and they have two children.

Maher is a United States Navy veteran, and served abroad the USS Salt Lake City, a Los Angeles Class Fast Attack Submarine. Following the Navy, Michael graduated from Fresno Pacific University and then was accepted and graduated from FBI Academy in Quantico, Virginia. Michael served as a Special Agent for the Bureau working in the National Security Division. Additionally with the FBI, Maher was the Counterproliferation Coordinator for the Los Angeles Field Office which included responsibility in supervision of Chemical Weapons Inspections._
---
| | | | | | | [](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=e8b3951ca9&e=1722d05e10)
